authors_text: Jae Soon Baik,In Young Yoon,Jun Won Choi
title: DBN-Mix: Training Dual Branch Network Using Bilateral Mixup Augmentation for Long-Tailed Visual Recognition
title_zh: DBN-Mix：使用双边混合增强训练双分支网络进行长尾视觉识别
abstract: There is growing interest in the challenging visual perception task of learning from long-tailed class distributions. The extreme class imbalance in the training dataset biases the model to prefer recognizing majority class data over minority class data. Furthermore, the lack of diversity in minority class samples makes it difficult to find a good representation. In this paper, we propose an effective data augmentation method, referred to as bilateral mixup augmentation, which can improve the performance of long-tailed visual recognition. The bilateral mixup augmentation combines two samples generated by a uniform sampler and a re-balanced sampler and augments the training dataset to enhance the representation learning for minority classes. We also reduce the classifier bias using class-wise temperature scaling, which scales the logits differently per class in the training phase. We apply both ideas to the dual-branch network (DBN) framework, presenting a new model, named dual-branch network with bilateral mixup (DBN-Mix). Experiments on popular long-tailed visual recognition datasets show that DBN-Mix improves performance significantly over baseline and that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in some categories of benchmarks.
summary: There is growing interest in the challenging visual perception task of learning from long-tailed class distributions. The extreme class imbalance in the training dataset biases the model to prefer recognizing majority class data over minority class data. Furthermore, the lack of diversity in minority class samples makes it difficult to find a good representation. In this paper, we propose an effective data augmentation method, referred to as bilateral mixup augmentation, which can improve the performance of long-tailed visual recognition. The bilateral mixup augmentation combines two samples generated by a uniform sampler and a re-balanced sampler and augments the training dataset to enhance the representation learning for minority classes. We also reduce the classifier bias using class-wise temperature scaling, which scales the logits differently per class in the training phase. We apply both ideas to the dual-branch network (DBN) framework, presenting a new model, named dual-branch network with bilateral mixup (DBN-Mix). Experiments on popular long-tailed visual recognition datasets show that DBN-Mix improves performance significantly over baseline and that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in some categories of benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 人们对从长尾类别分布中学习这一具有挑战性的视觉感知任务越来越感兴趣。训练数据集中的极端类别不平衡使模型倾向于识别多数类数据而不是少数类数据。此外，少数群体样本缺乏多样性，导致很难找到良好的代表性。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的数据增强方法，称为双边混合增强，可以提高长尾视觉识别的性能。双边混合增强结合了均匀采样器和重新平衡采样器生成的两个样本，并增强了训练数据集以增强少数类的表示学习。我们还使用逐类温度缩放来减少分类器偏差，这会在训练阶段以不同的方式缩放每个类别的逻辑。我们将这两种思想应用到双分支网络（DBN）框架中，提出了一种新模型，称为双边混合双分支网络（DBN-Mix）。在流行的长尾视觉识别数据集上进行的实验表明，DBN-Mix 的性能比基线显着提高，并且所提出的方法在某些类别的基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DBN-Mix方法，通过双边Mixup增强和类温度缩放技术，解决长尾视觉识别中类别不平衡导致的模型偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 长尾分布数据集中多数类与少数类样本数量悬殊，导致模型偏向多数类且难以学习少数类有效表示，现有方法未能有效缓解该问题。
AI.method: 设计双边Mixup增强技术，融合均匀采样与再平衡采样生成样本；结合类温度缩放动态调整分类器输出，最终集成至双分支网络框架形成DBN-Mix模型。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-LT等长尾数据集上显著优于基线方法，在多个类别上达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: DBN-Mix通过数据增强与分类器校正双路径优化，有效缓解长尾分布带来的类别不平衡问题，为视觉识别提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出DBN-Mix方法，通过双边Mixup增强和类温度缩放技术，解决长尾视觉识别中类别不平衡导致的模型偏差问题。

search_text: DBN-Mix: Training Dual Branch Network Using Bilateral Mixup Augmentation for Long-Tailed Visual Recognition DBN-Mix：使用双边混合增强训练双分支网络进行长尾视觉识别 There is growing interest in the challenging visual perception task of learning from long-tailed class distributions. The extreme class imbalance in the training dataset biases the model to prefer recognizing majority class data over minority class data. Furthermore, the lack of diversity in minority class samples makes it difficult to find a good representation. In this paper, we propose an effective data augmentation method, referred to as bilateral mixup augmentation, which can improve the performance of long-tailed visual recognition. The bilateral mixup augmentation combines two samples generated by a uniform sampler and a re-balanced sampler and augments the training dataset to enhance the representation learning for minority classes. We also reduce the classifier bias using class-wise temperature scaling, which scales the logits differently per class in the training phase. We apply both ideas to the dual-branch network (DBN) framework, presenting a new model, named dual-branch network with bilateral mixup (DBN-Mix). Experiments on popular long-tailed visual recognition datasets show that DBN-Mix improves performance significantly over baseline and that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in some categories of benchmarks. 人们对从长尾类别分布中学习这一具有挑战性的视觉感知任务越来越感兴趣。训练数据集中的极端类别不平衡使模型倾向于识别多数类数据而不是少数类数据。此外，少数群体样本缺乏多样性，导致很难找到良好的代表性。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的数据增强方法，称为双边混合增强，可以提高长尾视觉识别的性能。双边混合增强结合了均匀采样器和重新平衡采样器生成的两个样本，并增强了训练数据集以增强少数类的表示学习。我们还使用逐类温度缩放来减少分类器偏差，这会在训练阶段以不同的方式缩放每个类别的逻辑。我们将这两种思想应用到双分支网络（DBN）框架中，提出了一种新模型，称为双边混合双分支网络（DBN-Mix）。在流行的长尾视觉识别数据集上进行的实验表明，DBN-Mix 的性能比基线显着提高，并且所提出的方法在某些类别的基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出DBN-Mix方法，通过双边Mixup增强和类温度缩放技术，解决长尾视觉识别中类别不平衡导致的模型偏差问题。 Jae Soon Baik,In Young Yoon,Jun Won Choi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ioannis N. Tzortzis,Ioannis Rallis,Konstantinos Makantasis,Anastasios Doulamis,Nikolaos Doulamis,Athanasios Voulodimos
title: Automatic inspection of cultural monuments using deep and tensor-based learning on hyperspectral imagery
title_zh: 使用基于高光谱图像的深度和张量学习自动检查文化古迹
comment: Accepted for presentation in IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP 2022)
comments: Accepted for presentation in IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP 2022)
abstract: In Cultural Heritage, hyperspectral images are commonly used since they provide extended information regarding the optical properties of materials. Thus, the processing of such high-dimensional data becomes challenging from the perspective of machine learning techniques to be applied. In this paper, we propose a Rank-$R$ tensor-based learning model to identify and classify material defects on Cultural Heritage monuments. In contrast to conventional deep learning approaches, the proposed high order tensor-based learning demonstrates greater accuracy and robustness against overfitting. Experimental results on real-world data from UNESCO protected areas indicate the superiority of the proposed scheme compared to conventional deep learning models.
summary: In Cultural Heritage, hyperspectral images are commonly used since they provide extended information regarding the optical properties of materials. Thus, the processing of such high-dimensional data becomes challenging from the perspective of machine learning techniques to be applied. In this paper, we propose a Rank-$R$ tensor-based learning model to identify and classify material defects on Cultural Heritage monuments. In contrast to conventional deep learning approaches, the proposed high order tensor-based learning demonstrates greater accuracy and robustness against overfitting. Experimental results on real-world data from UNESCO protected areas indicate the superiority of the proposed scheme compared to conventional deep learning models.
abstract_zh: In Cultural Heritage, hyperspectral images are commonly used since they provide extended information regarding the optical properties of materials.因此，从要应用的机器学习技术的角度来看，处理这种高维数据变得具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Rank-$R$ 张量的学习模型来识别和分类文化遗产纪念碑上的材料缺陷。 In contrast to conventional deep learning approaches, the proposed high order tensor-based learning demonstrates greater accuracy and robustness against overfitting. Experimental results on real-world data from UNESCO protected areas indicate the superiority of the proposed scheme compared to conventional deep learning models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于秩-R张量的学习模型，用于利用高光谱图像自动检测和分类文化纪念碑的材料缺陷。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像在文化遗产保护中广泛应用，但其高维数据处理对传统深度学习方法存在准确性和过拟合问题，需更稳健的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计高阶张量学习框架，通过秩-R分解处理高光谱数据，对比传统深度学习方法提升缺陷识别性能。
AI.result: 在UNESCO保护区真实数据集上，该方法在缺陷分类准确率和抗过拟合能力上优于传统深度学习模型。
AI.conclusion: 张量学习方法在文化遗产材料缺陷检测中展现更高精度和鲁棒性，为高光谱图像分析提供有效技术路径。

authors_text: Paolo Maramotti,Alessandro Paolo Capasso,Giulio Bacchiani,Alberto Broggi
title: Tackling Real-World Autonomous Driving using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习应对现实世界的自动驾驶
comment: Oral Presentation at Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2022
comments: Oral Presentation at Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2022
abstract: In the typical autonomous driving stack, planning and control systems represent two of the most crucial components in which data retrieved by sensors and processed by perception algorithms are used to implement a safe and comfortable self-driving behavior. In particular, the planning module predicts the path the autonomous car should follow taking the correct high-level maneuver, while control systems perform a sequence of low-level actions, controlling steering angle, throttle and brake. In this work, we propose a model-free Deep Reinforcement Learning Planner training a neural network that predicts both acceleration and steering angle, thus obtaining a single module able to drive the vehicle using the data processed by localization and perception algorithms on board of the self-driving car. In particular, the system that was fully trained in simulation is able to drive smoothly and safely in obstacle-free environments both in simulation and in a real-world urban area of the city of Parma, proving that the system features good generalization capabilities also driving in those parts outside the training scenarios. Moreover, in order to deploy the system on board of the real self-driving car and to reduce the gap between simulated and real-world performances, we also develop a module represented by a tiny neural network able to reproduce the real vehicle dynamic behavior during the training in simulation.
summary: In the typical autonomous driving stack, planning and control systems represent two of the most crucial components in which data retrieved by sensors and processed by perception algorithms are used to implement a safe and comfortable self-driving behavior. In particular, the planning module predicts the path the autonomous car should follow taking the correct high-level maneuver, while control systems perform a sequence of low-level actions, controlling steering angle, throttle and brake. In this work, we propose a model-free Deep Reinforcement Learning Planner training a neural network that predicts both acceleration and steering angle, thus obtaining a single module able to drive the vehicle using the data processed by localization and perception algorithms on board of the self-driving car. In particular, the system that was fully trained in simulation is able to drive smoothly and safely in obstacle-free environments both in simulation and in a real-world urban area of the city of Parma, proving that the system features good generalization capabilities also driving in those parts outside the training scenarios. Moreover, in order to deploy the system on board of the real self-driving car and to reduce the gap between simulated and real-world performances, we also develop a module represented by a tiny neural network able to reproduce the real vehicle dynamic behavior during the training in simulation.
abstract_zh: 在典型的自动驾驶堆栈中，规划和控制系统是两个最关键的组成部分，其中传感器检索的数据和感知算法处理的数据用于实现安全舒适的自动驾驶行为。特别是，规划模块可以预测自动驾驶汽车采取正确的高级操作时应遵循的路径，而控制系统则执行一系列低级操作，控制转向角、油门和制动。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种无模型的深度强化学习规划器，训练预测加速度和转向角的神经网络，从而获得能够使用自动驾驶汽车上的定位和感知算法处理的数据来驱动车辆的单个模块。特别是，经过充分模拟训练的系统能够在模拟和帕尔马市的真实城区无障碍环境中平稳、安全地行驶，证明该系统在训练场景之外的部分也具有良好的泛化能力。此外，为了将该系统部署在真实的自动驾驶汽车上，并缩小模拟与现实世界性能之间的差距，我们还开发了一个以微型神经网络为代表的模块，能够在模拟训练期间重现真实车辆的动态行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的自动驾驶规划与控制一体化方法，通过神经网络直接预测加速度和转向角，实现模拟到现实环境的迁移。
AI.motivation: 传统自动驾驶系统需独立处理规划与控制模块，存在模块间协调复杂、泛化能力不足的问题，需探索更高效的端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 采用无模型深度强化学习训练神经网络，联合输出加速度和转向角；开发轻量级动态模型缩小仿真与现实性能差距。
AI.result: 系统在仿真环境及帕尔马市真实道路均表现良好，证明其具备跨场景的泛化能力与实际部署可行性。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习可有效整合自动驾驶核心模块，为现实场景下的端到端控制提供新思路与验证范式。

authors_text: Israa Khalaf Salman Al-Tameemi,Mohammad-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi,Saeed Pashazadeh,Mohammad Asadpour
title: A Comprehensive Review of Visual-Textual Sentiment Analysis from Social Media Networks
title_zh: 社交媒体网络视觉文本情感分析的综合综述
abstract: Social media networks have become a significant aspect of people's lives, serving as a platform for their ideas, opinions and emotions. Consequently, automated sentiment analysis (SA) is critical for recognising people's feelings in ways that other information sources cannot. The analysis of these feelings revealed various applications, including brand evaluations, YouTube film reviews and healthcare applications. As social media continues to develop, people post a massive amount of information in different forms, including text, photos, audio and video. Thus, traditional SA algorithms have become limited, as they do not consider the expressiveness of other modalities. By including such characteristics from various material sources, these multimodal data streams provide new opportunities for optimising the expected results beyond text-based SA. Our study focuses on the forefront field of multimodal SA, which examines visual and textual data posted on social media networks. Many people are more likely to utilise this information to express themselves on these platforms. To serve as a resource for academics in this rapidly growing field, we introduce a comprehensive overview of textual and visual SA, including data pre-processing, feature extraction techniques, sentiment benchmark datasets, and the efficacy of multiple classification methodologies suited to each field. We also provide a brief introduction of the most frequently utilised data fusion strategies and a summary of existing research on visual-textual SA. Finally, we highlight the most significant challenges and investigate several important sentiment applications.
summary: Social media networks have become a significant aspect of people's lives, serving as a platform for their ideas, opinions and emotions. Consequently, automated sentiment analysis (SA) is critical for recognising people's feelings in ways that other information sources cannot. Many people are more likely to utilise this information to express themselves on these platforms. We also provide a brief introduction of the most frequently utilised data fusion strategies and a summary of existing research on visual-textual SA. Finally, we highlight the most significant challenges and investigate several important sentiment applications.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体网络已成为人们生活的一个重要方面，成为他们表达想法、观点和情感的平台。因此，自动情绪分析 (SA) 对于以其他信息源无法做到的方式识别人们的感受至关重要。对这些感受的分析揭示了各种应用，包括品牌评估、YouTube 电影评论和医疗保健应用。随着社交媒体的不断发展，人们以不同的形式发布海量的信息，包括文字、照片、音频和视频。因此，传统的 SA 算法已经变得有限，因为它们没有考虑其他模态的表达能力。通过包含来自各种材料来源的此类特征，这些多模式数据流为优化基于文本的 SA 之外的预期结果提供了新的机会。我们的研究重点是多模式 SA 的前沿领域，该领域检查社交媒体网络上发布的视觉和文本数据。许多人更有可能利用这些信息在这些平台上表达自己。为了作为这个快速发展领域的学者的资源，我们介绍了文本和视觉 SA 的全面概述，包括数据预处理、特征提取技术、情感基准数据集以及适合每个领域的多种分类方法的功效。我们还简要介绍了最常用的数据融合策略，并对视觉文本 SA 的现有研究进行了总结。最后，我们强调了最重大的挑战并研究了几个重要的情感应用。

AI.tldr: 本文对社交媒体中的视觉-文本情感分析进行综述，探讨多模态数据在情感分析中的应用与挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统情感分析仅依赖文本，难以捕捉社交媒体中图像、视频等多模态信息的情感表达，需探索更全面的分析方法。
AI.method: 系统梳理多模态情感分析的数据预处理、特征提取技术、基准数据集、分类方法及数据融合策略，总结现有研究与应用。
AI.result: 提出多模态情感分析的关键技术框架，归纳主流数据融合方法，并指出当前研究的主要挑战与潜在应用场景。
AI.conclusion: 多模态情感分析能更准确地理解社交媒体用户情感，但需解决跨模态对齐、数据异质性等难题以推动技术发展。

search_text: A Comprehensive Review of Visual-Textual Sentiment Analysis from Social Media Networks 社交媒体网络视觉文本情感分析的综合综述 Social media networks have become a significant aspect of people's lives, serving as a platform for their ideas, opinions and emotions. Consequently, automated sentiment analysis (SA) is critical for recognising people's feelings in ways that other information sources cannot. The analysis of these feelings revealed various applications, including brand evaluations, YouTube film reviews and healthcare applications. As social media continues to develop, people post a massive amount of information in different forms, including text, photos, audio and video. Thus, traditional SA algorithms have become limited, as they do not consider the expressiveness of other modalities. By including such characteristics from various material sources, these multimodal data streams provide new opportunities for optimising the expected results beyond text-based SA. Our study focuses on the forefront field of multimodal SA, which examines visual and textual data posted on social media networks. Many people are more likely to utilise this information to express themselves on these platforms. To serve as a resource for academics in this rapidly growing field, we introduce a comprehensive overview of textual and visual SA, including data pre-processing, feature extraction techniques, sentiment benchmark datasets, and the efficacy of multiple classification methodologies suited to each field. We also provide a brief introduction of the most frequently utilised data fusion strategies and a summary of existing research on visual-textual SA. Finally, we highlight the most significant challenges and investigate several important sentiment applications. 社交媒体网络已成为人们生活的一个重要方面，成为他们表达想法、观点和情感的平台。因此，自动情绪分析 (SA) 对于以其他信息源无法做到的方式识别人们的感受至关重要。对这些感受的分析揭示了各种应用，包括品牌评估、YouTube 电影评论和医疗保健应用。随着社交媒体的不断发展，人们以不同的形式发布海量的信息，包括文字、照片、音频和视频。因此，传统的 SA 算法已经变得有限，因为它们没有考虑其他模态的表达能力。通过包含来自各种材料来源的此类特征，这些多模式数据流为优化基于文本的 SA 之外的预期结果提供了新的机会。我们的研究重点是多模式 SA 的前沿领域，该领域检查社交媒体网络上发布的视觉和文本数据。许多人更有可能利用这些信息在这些平台上表达自己。为了作为这个快速发展领域的学者的资源，我们介绍了文本和视觉 SA 的全面概述，包括数据预处理、特征提取技术、情感基准数据集以及适合每个领域的多种分类方法的功效。我们还简要介绍了最常用的数据融合策略，并对视觉文本 SA 的现有研究进行了总结。最后，我们强调了最重大的挑战并研究了几个重要的情感应用。 本文对社交媒体中的视觉-文本情感分析进行综述，探讨多模态数据在情感分析中的应用与挑战。 Israa Khalaf Salman Al-Tameemi,Mohammad-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi,Saeed Pashazadeh,Mohammad Asadpour cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Madeline C. Schiappa,Shruti Vyas,Hamid Palangi,Yogesh S. Rawat,Vibhav Vineet
title: Robustness Analysis of Video-Language Models Against Visual and Language Perturbations
title_zh: 视频语言模型对抗视觉和语言扰动的鲁棒性分析
comment: NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track. This projects webpage is located at https://bit.ly/3CNOly4
comments: NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track. This projects webpage is located at https://bit.ly/3CNOly4
abstract: Joint visual and language modeling on large-scale datasets has recently shown good progress in multi-modal tasks when compared to single modal learning. However, robustness of these approaches against real-world perturbations has not been studied. In this work, we perform the first extensive robustness study of video-language models against various real-world perturbations. We focus on text-to-video retrieval and propose two large-scale benchmark datasets, MSRVTT-P and YouCook2-P, which utilize 90 different visual and 35 different text perturbations. The study reveals some interesting initial findings from the studied models: 1) models are generally more susceptible when only video is perturbed as opposed to when only text is perturbed, 2) models that are pre-trained are more robust than those trained from scratch, 3) models attend more to scene and objects rather than motion and action. We hope this study will serve as a benchmark and guide future research in robust video-language learning. The benchmark introduced in this study along with the code and datasets is available at https://bit.ly/3CNOly4.
summary: Joint visual and language modeling on large-scale datasets has recently shown good progress in multi-modal tasks when compared to single modal learning. However, robustness of these approaches against real-world perturbations has not been studied. In this work, we perform the first extensive robustness study of video-language models against various real-world perturbations. We focus on text-to-video retrieval and propose two large-scale benchmark datasets, MSRVTT-P and YouCook2-P, which utilize 90 different visual and 35 different text perturbations. The study reveals some interesting initial findings from the studied models: 1) models are generally more susceptible when only video is perturbed as opposed to when only text is perturbed, 2) models that are pre-trained are more robust than those trained from scratch, 3) models attend more to scene and objects rather than motion and action. We hope this study will serve as a benchmark and guide future research in robust video-language learning. The benchmark introduced in this study along with the code and datasets is available at https://bit.ly/3CNOly4.
abstract_zh: 与单模态学习相比，大规模数据集上的联合视觉和语言建模最近在多模态任务中显示出良好的进展。然而，这些方法对抗现实世界扰动的稳健性尚未得到研究。在这项工作中，我们对视频语言模型针对各种现实世界扰动的鲁棒性进行了首次广泛的研究。我们专注于文本到视频检索，并提出了两个大型基准数据集 MSRVTT-P 和 YouCook2-P，它们利用 90 种不同的视觉扰动和 35 种不同的文本扰动。该研究揭示了所研究模型的一些有趣的初步发现：1）当只有视频受到干扰时，模型通常比只有文本受到干扰时更容易受到影响；2）预先训练的模型比从头开始训练的模型更稳健；3）模型更多地关注场景和对象，而不是运动和动作。我们希望这项研究能够成为一个基准，并指导未来稳健视频语言学习的研究。本研究中引入的基准以及代码和数据集可在 https://bit.ly/3CNOly4 上获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了视频-语言模型在视觉和语言扰动下的鲁棒性，并构建了两个包含大量扰动的基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态任务取得进展，但现有研究未探讨模型在真实世界扰动下的鲁棒性，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 创建MSRVTT-P和YouCook2-P数据集，应用90种视觉和35种文本扰动，评估模型在文本到视频检索任务中的表现。
AI.result: 模型对视频扰动更敏感；预训练模型比从头训练模型更鲁棒；模型更关注场景/物体而非运动/动作。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为鲁棒视频-语言学习提供基准，发现预训练模型优势及注意力机制局限性，开源数据集与代码供后续研究使用。

authors_text: Hongzhi Huang,Yu Wang,Qinghua Hu,Ming-Ming Cheng
title: Class-Specific Semantic Reconstruction for Open Set Recognition
title_zh: 开放集识别的特定类语义重建
comment: 14 pages, 10 figures,
comments: 14 pages, 10 figures,
abstract: Open set recognition enables deep neural networks (DNNs) to identify samples of unknown classes, while maintaining high classification accuracy on samples of known classes. Existing methods basing on auto-encoder (AE) and prototype learning show great potential in handling this challenging task. In this study, we propose a novel method, called Class-Specific Semantic Reconstruction (CSSR), that integrates the power of AE and prototype learning. Specifically, CSSR replaces prototype points with manifolds represented by class-specific AEs. Unlike conventional prototype-based methods, CSSR models each known class on an individual AE manifold, and measures class belongingness through AE's reconstruction error. Class-specific AEs are plugged into the top of the DNN backbone and reconstruct the semantic representations learned by the DNN instead of the raw image. Through end-to-end learning, the DNN and the AEs boost each other to learn both discriminative and representative information. The results of experiments conducted on multiple datasets show that the proposed method achieves outstanding performance in both close and open set recognition and is sufficiently simple and flexible to incorporate into existing frameworks.
summary: Open set recognition enables deep neural networks (DNNs) to identify samples of unknown classes, while maintaining high classification accuracy on samples of known classes. Existing methods basing on auto-encoder (AE) and prototype learning show great potential in handling this challenging task. In this study, we propose a novel method, called Class-Specific Semantic Reconstruction (CSSR), that integrates the power of AE and prototype learning. Specifically, CSSR replaces prototype points with manifolds represented by class-specific AEs. Unlike conventional prototype-based methods, CSSR models each known class on an individual AE manifold, and measures class belongingness through AE's reconstruction error. Class-specific AEs are plugged into the top of the DNN backbone and reconstruct the semantic representations learned by the DNN instead of the raw image. Through end-to-end learning, the DNN and the AEs boost each other to learn both discriminative and representative information. The results of experiments conducted on multiple datasets show that the proposed method achieves outstanding performance in both close and open set recognition and is sufficiently simple and flexible to incorporate into existing frameworks.
abstract_zh: 开放集识别使深度神经网络 (DNN) 能够识别未知类别的样本，同时保持对已知类别的样本的高分类精度。基于自动编码器（AE）和原型学习的现有方法在处理这一具有挑战性的任务方面显示出巨大的潜力。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种称为特定类语义重建（CSSR）的新颖方法，它集成了 AE 和原型学习的力量。具体来说，CSSR 将原型点替换为由特定类 AE 表示的流形。与传统的基于原型的方法不同，CSSR 在单个 AE 流形上对每个已知类进行建模，并通过 AE 的重建误差来测量类归属性。特定于类的 AE 被插入 DNN 主干的顶部，并重建 DNN 学习的语义表示而不是原始图像。通过端到端学习，DNN 和 AE 相互促进，学习判别性信息和代表性信息。在多个数据集上进行的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在封闭集和开放集识别中均取得了出色的性能，并且足够简单和灵活，可以融入现有框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自编码器与原型学习的开放集识别方法CSSR，通过类别特定语义重建提升模型对已知和未知类别的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集识别方法在处理未知类别时存在局限性，传统原型学习难以捕捉复杂数据分布，而单纯依赖自编码器可能忽略类别间语义差异。
AI.method: CSSR将每个类别映射到独立的自编码器流形，通过重建DNN语义特征的误差衡量样本类别归属，利用端到端学习增强特征判别性与表征性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上取得优异的封闭集与开放集识别性能，方法简洁且易于集成到现有深度学习框架中。
AI.conclusion: CSSR通过融合自编码器与原型学习优势，有效解决了开放集识别中的类别区分与未知样本检测问题，具有良好的实用性与扩展性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自编码器与原型学习的开放集识别方法CSSR，通过类别特定语义重建提升模型对已知和未知类别的识别能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有开放集识别方法在处理未知类别时存在局限性，传统原型学习难以捕捉复杂数据分布，而单纯依赖自编码器可能忽略类别间语义差异。
ai_content.method: CSSR将每个类别映射到独立的自编码器流形，通过重建DNN语义特征的误差衡量样本类别归属，利用端到端学习增强特征判别性与表征性。
ai_content.result: 在多个数据集上取得优异的封闭集与开放集识别性能，方法简洁且易于集成到现有深度学习框架中。
ai_content.conclusion: CSSR通过融合自编码器与原型学习优势，有效解决了开放集识别中的类别区分与未知样本检测问题，具有良好的实用性与扩展性。

motivation: 现有开放集识别方法在处理未知类别时存在局限性，传统原型学习难以捕捉复杂数据分布，而单纯依赖自编码器可能忽略类别间语义差异。
method: CSSR将每个类别映射到独立的自编码器流形，通过重建DNN语义特征的误差衡量样本类别归属，利用端到端学习增强特征判别性与表征性。
result: 在多个数据集上取得优异的封闭集与开放集识别性能，方法简洁且易于集成到现有深度学习框架中。
conclusion: CSSR通过融合自编码器与原型学习优势，有效解决了开放集识别中的类别区分与未知样本检测问题，具有良好的实用性与扩展性。
search_text: Class-Specific Semantic Reconstruction for Open Set Recognition 开放集识别的特定类语义重建 Open set recognition enables deep neural networks (DNNs) to identify samples of unknown classes, while maintaining high classification accuracy on samples of known classes. Existing methods basing on auto-encoder (AE) and prototype learning show great potential in handling this challenging task. In this study, we propose a novel method, called Class-Specific Semantic Reconstruction (CSSR), that integrates the power of AE and prototype learning. Specifically, CSSR replaces prototype points with manifolds represented by class-specific AEs. Unlike conventional prototype-based methods, CSSR models each known class on an individual AE manifold, and measures class belongingness through AE's reconstruction error. Class-specific AEs are plugged into the top of the DNN backbone and reconstruct the semantic representations learned by the DNN instead of the raw image. Through end-to-end learning, the DNN and the AEs boost each other to learn both discriminative and representative information. The results of experiments conducted on multiple datasets show that the proposed method achieves outstanding performance in both close and open set recognition and is sufficiently simple and flexible to incorporate into existing frameworks. 开放集识别使深度神经网络 (DNN) 能够识别未知类别的样本，同时保持对已知类别的样本的高分类精度。基于自动编码器（AE）和原型学习的现有方法在处理这一具有挑战性的任务方面显示出巨大的潜力。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种称为特定类语义重建（CSSR）的新颖方法，它集成了 AE 和原型学习的力量。具体来说，CSSR 将原型点替换为由特定类 AE 表示的流形。与传统的基于原型的方法不同，CSSR 在单个 AE 流形上对每个已知类进行建模，并通过 AE 的重建误差来测量类归属性。特定于类的 AE 被插入 DNN 主干的顶部，并重建 DNN 学习的语义表示而不是原始图像。通过端到端学习，DNN 和 AE 相互促进，学习判别性信息和代表性信息。在多个数据集上进行的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在封闭集和开放集识别中均取得了出色的性能，并且足够简单和灵活，可以融入现有框架。 本文提出一种结合自编码器与原型学习的开放集识别方法CSSR，通过类别特定语义重建提升模型对已知和未知类别的识别能力。 Hongzhi Huang,Yu Wang,Qinghua Hu,Ming-Ming Cheng cs.CV

authors_text: Renye Zhang,Yimin Yin,Wanxia Deng,Chen Li,Jinghua Zhang
title: Deep Learning for Finger Vein Recognition: A Brief Survey of Recent Trend
title_zh: 指静脉识别的深度学习：近期趋势简述
abstract: Finger vein image recognition technology plays an important role in biometric recognition and has been successfully applied in many fields. Because veins are buried beneath the skin tissue, finger vein image recognition has an unparalleled advantage, which is not easily disturbed by external factors. This review summarizes 46 papers about deep learning for finger vein image recognition from 2017 to 2021. These papers are summarized according to the tasks of deep neural networks. Besides, we present the challenges and potential development directions of finger vein image recognition.
summary: Finger vein image recognition technology plays an important role in biometric recognition and has been successfully applied in many fields. Because veins are buried beneath the skin tissue, finger vein image recognition has an unparalleled advantage, which is not easily disturbed by external factors. This review summarizes 46 papers about deep learning for finger vein image recognition from 2017 to 2021. These papers are summarized according to the tasks of deep neural networks. Besides, we present the challenges and potential development directions of finger vein image recognition.
abstract_zh: 指静脉图像识别技术在生物特征识别中发挥着重要作用，并已在多个领域得到成功应用。由于静脉埋藏在皮肤组织之下，手指静脉图像识别具有无可比拟的优势，不易受外界因素干扰。本综述总结了 2017 年至 2021 年关于指静脉图像识别深度学习的 46 篇论文。这些论文是根据深度神经网络的任务进行总结的。此外，我们还介绍了指静脉图像识别面临的挑战和潜在的发展方向。

AI.tldr: 综述2017-2021年深度学习在指静脉识别中的应用，总结挑战与发展方向
AI.motivation: 指静脉识别因隐蔽性高、抗干扰性强，在生物识别中具有重要应用价值，但需系统梳理深度学习方法的发展
AI.method: 按深度神经网络任务分类，总结46篇相关文献，并分析技术挑战与未来方向
AI.result: 总结了46篇深度学习在指静脉识别的应用，指出数据多样性、模型泛化等挑战，并提出优化方向
AI.conclusion: 深度学习推动指静脉识别发展，但需解决数据与模型问题，未来需结合多模态与轻量化技术

authors_text: Manuel Cáceres,Massimo Cairo,Andreas Grigorjew,Shahbaz Khan,Brendan Mumey,Romeo Rizzi,Alexandru I. Tomescu,Lucia Williams
title: Width Helps and Hinders Splitting Flows
title_zh: 宽度有助于和阻碍分流
comment: A preliminary version was submitted to ESA 2022
comments: A preliminary version was submitted to ESA 2022
abstract: Minimum flow decomposition (MFD) is the NP-hard problem of finding a smallest decomposition of a network flow/circulation $X$ on a directed graph $G$ into weighted source-to-sink paths whose superposition equals $X$. We show that, for acyclic graphs, considering the \emph{width} of the graph (the minimum number of paths needed to cover all of its edges) yields advances in our understanding of its approximability. For the version of the problem that uses only non-negative weights, we identify and characterise a new class of \emph{width-stable} graphs, for which a popular heuristic is a \gwsimple-approximation ($|X|$ being the total flow of $X$), and strengthen its worst-case approximation ratio from $Ω(\sqrt{m})$ to $Ω(m / \log m)$ for sparse graphs, where $m$ is the number of edges in the graph. We also study a new problem on graphs with cycles, Minimum Cost Circulation Decomposition (MCCD), and show that it generalises MFD through a simple reduction. For the version allowing also negative weights, we give a $(\lceil \log \Vert X \Vert \rceil +1)$-approximation ($\Vert X \Vert$ being the maximum absolute value of $X$ on any edge) using a power-of-two approach, combined with parity fixing arguments and a decomposition of unitary circulations ($\Vert X \Vert \leq 1$), using a generalised notion of width for this problem. Finally, we disprove a conjecture about the linear independence of minimum (non-negative) flow decompositions posed by Kloster et al. [ALENEX 2018], but show that its useful implication (polynomial-time assignments of weights to a given set of paths to decompose a flow) holds for the negative version.
summary: Minimum flow decomposition (MFD) is the NP-hard problem of finding a smallest decomposition of a network flow/circulation $X$ on a directed graph $G$ into weighted source-to-sink paths whose superposition equals $X$. We show that, for acyclic graphs, considering the \emph{width} of the graph (the minimum number of paths needed to cover all of its edges) yields advances in our understanding of its approximability. For the version of the problem that uses only non-negative weights, we identify and characterise a new class of \emph{width-stable} graphs, for which a popular heuristic is a \gwsimple-approximation ($|X|$ being the total flow of $X$), and strengthen its worst-case approximation ratio from $Ω(\sqrt{m})$ to $Ω(m / \log m)$ for sparse graphs, where $m$ is the number of edges in the graph. We also study a new problem on graphs with cycles, Minimum Cost Circulation Decomposition (MCCD), and show that it generalises MFD through a simple reduction. For the version allowing also negative weights, we give a $(\lceil \log \Vert X \Vert \rceil +1)$-approximation ($\Vert X \Vert$ being the maximum absolute value of $X$ on any edge) using a power-of-two approach, combined with parity fixing arguments and a decomposition of unitary circulations ($\Vert X \Vert \leq 1$), using a generalised notion of width for this problem. Finally, we disprove a conjecture about the linear independence of minimum (non-negative) flow decompositions posed by Kloster et al. [ALENEX 2018], but show that its useful implication (polynomial-time assignments of weights to a given set of paths to decompose a flow) holds for the negative version.
abstract_zh: 最小流分解 (MFD) 是一个 NP 难题，即在有向图 $G$ 上找到网络流/循环 $X$ 的最小分解为叠加等于 $X$ 的加权源到汇路径。我们表明，对于非循环图，考虑图的 \emph{width} （覆盖其所有边所需的最小路径数）可以提高我们对其近似性的理解。对于仅使用非负权重的问题版本，我们识别并描述了一类新的 \emph{width-stable} 图，其中流行的启发式是 \gwsimple 近似（$|X|$ 是 $X$ 的总流量），并将稀疏图的最坏情况近似比从 $Ω(\sqrt{m})$ 加强到 $Ω(m / \log m)$，其中 $m$ 是图中的边数。我们还研究了带有循环的图上的一个新问题，即最小成本循环分解（MCCD），并表明它通过简单的简化概括了 MFD。对于还允许负权重的版本，我们使用二次幂方法给出 $(\lceil \log \Vert X \Vert \rceil +1)$ 近似（$\Vert X \Vert$ 是任何边上 $X$ 的最大绝对值），结合奇偶校验固定参数和酉循环分解 ($\Vert X \Vert \leq 1$)，使用该问题的广义宽度概念。最后，我们反驳了 Kloster 等人提出的关于最小（非负）流分解的线性独立性的猜想。 [ALENEX 2018]，但表明其有用的含义（将权重多项式时间分配给给定路径集以分解流）适用于负版本。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了网络流分解问题的近似算法，重点分析了图的宽度对分解效率的影响，并提出了针对有向无环图和含环图的新方法。
AI.motivation: 最小流分解问题（MFD）是NP难问题，现有算法在稀疏图中表现不佳，且对负权重的支持有限，需探索更高效的近似方法。
AI.method: 通过引入图的宽度概念，定义宽度稳定图类，结合贪心启发式算法、幂次二进制分解及单位循环流分解技术，改进近似比并推广至含环图。
AI.result: 将稀疏图的近似比下界从Ω(√m)提升至Ω(m/log m)，提出负权重场景的(log‖X‖+1)-近似算法，并推翻了关于线性无关性的猜想。
AI.conclusion: 宽度参数为流分解问题提供了新视角，改进的算法在理论界和实际应用中均具重要意义，但负权重场景的复杂性仍需进一步研究。

[ALENEX 2018], but show that its useful implication (polynomial-time assignments of weights to a given set of paths to decompose a flow) holds for the negative version. 最小流分解 (MFD) 是一个 NP 难题，即在有向图 $G$ 上找到网络流/循环 $X$ 的最小分解为叠加等于 $X$ 的加权源到汇路径。我们表明，对于非循环图，考虑图的 \emph{width} （覆盖其所有边所需的最小路径数）可以提高我们对其近似性的理解。对于仅使用非负权重的问题版本，我们识别并描述了一类新的 \emph{width-stable} 图，其中流行的启发式是 \gwsimple 近似（$|X|$ 是 $X$ 的总流量），并将稀疏图的最坏情况近似比从 $Ω(\sqrt{m})$ 加强到 $Ω(m / \log m)$，其中 $m$ 是图中的边数。我们还研究了带有循环的图上的一个新问题，即最小成本循环分解（MCCD），并表明它通过简单的简化概括了 MFD。对于还允许负权重的版本，我们使用二次幂方法给出 $(\lceil \log \Vert X \Vert \rceil +1)$ 近似（$\Vert X \Vert$ 是任何边上 $X$ 的最大绝对值），结合奇偶校验固定参数和酉循环分解 ($\Vert X \Vert \leq 1$)，使用该问题的广义宽度概念。最后，我们反驳了 Kloster 等人提出的关于最小（非负）流分解的线性独立性的猜想。 [ALENEX 2018]，但表明其有用的含义（将权重多项式时间分配给给定路径集以分解流）适用于负版本。 本文研究了网络流分解问题的近似算法，重点分析了图的宽度对分解效率的影响，并提出了针对有向无环图和含环图的新方法。 Manuel Cáceres,Massimo Cairo,Andreas Grigorjew,Shahbaz Khan,Brendan Mumey,Romeo Rizzi,Alexandru I. Tomescu,Lucia Williams cs.DS

authors_text: Charl Maree,Christian W. Omlin
title: Balancing Profit, Risk, and Sustainability for Portfolio Management
title_zh: 平衡投资组合管理的利润、风险和可持续性
comment: ef:IEEE CIFEr (2022)
comments: ef:IEEE CIFEr (2022)
abstract: Stock portfolio optimization is the process of continuous reallocation of funds to a selection of stocks. This is a particularly well-suited problem for reinforcement learning, as daily rewards are compounding and objective functions may include more than just profit, e.g., risk and sustainability. We developed a novel utility function with the Sharpe ratio representing risk and the environmental, social, and governance score (ESG) representing sustainability. We show that a state-of-the-art policy gradient method - multi-agent deep deterministic policy gradients (MADDPG) - fails to find the optimum policy due to flat policy gradients and we therefore replaced gradient descent with a genetic algorithm for parameter optimization. We show that our system outperforms MADDPG while improving on deep Q-learning approaches by allowing for continuous action spaces. Crucially, by incorporating risk and sustainability criteria in the utility function, we improve on the state-of-the-art in reinforcement learning for portfolio optimization; risk and sustainability are essential in any modern trading strategy and we propose a system that does not merely report these metrics, but that actively optimizes the portfolio to improve on them.
summary: Stock portfolio optimization is the process of continuous reallocation of funds to a selection of stocks. This is a particularly well-suited problem for reinforcement learning, as daily rewards are compounding and objective functions may include more than just profit, e.g., risk and sustainability. We developed a novel utility function with the Sharpe ratio representing risk and the environmental, social, and governance score (ESG) representing sustainability. We show that a state-of-the-art policy gradient method - multi-agent deep deterministic policy gradients (MADDPG) - fails to find the optimum policy due to flat policy gradients and we therefore replaced gradient descent with a genetic algorithm for parameter optimization. We show that our system outperforms MADDPG while improving on deep Q-learning approaches by allowing for continuous action spaces. Crucially, by incorporating risk and sustainability criteria in the utility function, we improve on the state-of-the-art in reinforcement learning for portfolio optimization; risk and sustainability are essential in any modern trading strategy and we propose a system that does not merely report these metrics, but that actively optimizes the portfolio to improve on them.
abstract_zh: 股票投资组合优化是不断将资金重新分配到精选股票的过程。这是一个特别适合强化学习的问题，因为每日奖励是复合的，目标函数可能不仅仅包括利润，例如风险和可持续性。我们开发了一种新颖的效用函数，其中夏普比率代表风险，环境、社会和治理评分 (ESG) 代表可持续性。我们表明，最先进的策略梯度方法——多智能体深度确定性策略梯度（MADDPG）——由于策略梯度平坦而无法找到最优策略，因此我们用遗传算法代替梯度下降来进行参数优化。我们表明，我们的系统优于 MADDPG，同时通过允许连续的动作空间来改进深度 Q 学习方法。至关重要的是，通过将风险和可持续性标准纳入效用函数中，我们改进了用于投资组合优化的强化学习的最新技术；风险和可持续性在任何现代交易策略中都是至关重要的，我们提出的系统不仅可以报告这些指标，而且可以积极优化投资组合以对其进行改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合风险与可持续性的股票组合优化方法，利用强化学习框架平衡收益、风险及环境社会治理（ESG）指标。
AI.motivation: 传统投资组合优化方法难以同时处理收益最大化、风险控制与可持续性目标，而现有强化学习算法在多目标优化中存在梯度平坦等局限性。
AI.method: 构建包含夏普比率（风险）和ESG评分（可持续性）的效用函数，采用遗传算法替代MADDPG中的梯度下降法，并通过连续动作空间改进深度Q学习方法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在收益、风险控制及ESG指标优化上均优于MADDPG和深度Q学习，实现了多目标的协同优化。
AI.conclusion: 将风险与可持续性纳入效用函数的强化学习框架，为现代投资组合管理提供了兼顾财务表现与社会责任的优化方案。

authors_text: Gary Leung,Jun Gao,Xiaohui Zeng,Sanja Fidler
title: Improving Semantic Segmentation in Transformers using Hierarchical Inter-Level Attention
title_zh: 使用分层层间注意力改进 Transformer 中的语义分割
abstract: Existing transformer-based image backbones typically propagate feature information in one direction from lower to higher-levels. This may not be ideal since the localization ability to delineate accurate object boundaries, is most prominent in the lower, high-resolution feature maps, while the semantics that can disambiguate image signals belonging to one object vs. another, typically emerges in a higher level of processing. We present Hierarchical Inter-Level Attention (HILA), an attention-based method that captures Bottom-Up and Top-Down Updates between features of different levels. HILA extends hierarchical vision transformer architectures by adding local connections between features of higher and lower levels to the backbone encoder. In each iteration, we construct a hierarchy by having higher-level features compete for assignments to update lower-level features belonging to them, iteratively resolving object-part relationships. These improved lower-level features are then used to re-update the higher-level features. HILA can be integrated into the majority of hierarchical architectures without requiring any changes to the base model. We add HILA into SegFormer and the Swin Transformer and show notable improvements in accuracy in semantic segmentation with fewer parameters and FLOPS. Project website and code: https://www.cs.toronto.edu/~garyleung/hila/
summary: Existing transformer-based image backbones typically propagate feature information in one direction from lower to higher-levels. This may not be ideal since the localization ability to delineate accurate object boundaries, is most prominent in the lower, high-resolution feature maps, while the semantics that can disambiguate image signals belonging to one object vs. another, typically emerges in a higher level of processing. We present Hierarchical Inter-Level Attention (HILA), an attention-based method that captures Bottom-Up and Top-Down Updates between features of different levels. HILA extends hierarchical vision transformer architectures by adding local connections between features of higher and lower levels to the backbone encoder. In each iteration, we construct a hierarchy by having higher-level features compete for assignments to update lower-level features belonging to them, iteratively resolving object-part relationships. These improved lower-level features are then used to re-update the higher-level features. HILA can be integrated into the majority of hierarchical architectures without requiring any changes to the base model. We add HILA into SegFormer and the Swin Transformer and show notable improvements in accuracy in semantic segmentation with fewer parameters and FLOPS. Project website and code: https://www.cs.toronto.edu/~garyleung/hila/
abstract_zh: 现有的基于转换器的图像主干通常在从较低级别到较高级别的一个方向上传播特征信息。这可能并不理想，因为描绘准确的对象边界的定位能力在较低的高分辨率特征图中最为突出，而可以消除属于一个对象与另一个对象的图像信号的语义通常出现在更高级别的处理中。我们提出了分层层间注意力（HILA），这是一种基于注意力的方法，可以捕获不同级别特征之间自下而上和自上而下的更新。 HILA 通过将较高级别和较低级别的特征之间的本地连接添加到主干编码器来扩展分层视觉变换器架构。在每次迭代中，我们通过让较高级别的特征竞争分配来更新属于它们的较低级别的特征来构建层次结构，从而迭代地解决对象部分关系。然后使用这些改进的较低级别的特征来重新更新较高级别的特征。 HILA 可以集成到大多数分层架构中，无需对基本模型进行任何更改。我们将 HILA 添加到 SegFormer 和 Swin Transformer 中，并以更少的参数和 FLOPS 显着提高了语义分割的准确性。项目网址及代码：https://www.cs.toronto.edu/~garyleung/hila/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层跨层注意力机制（HILA）的方法，用于改进Transformer在语义分割中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer架构的特征传播方向单一，导致低层特征擅长定位但语义弱，高层特征语义强但定位差，无法有效结合两者优势。
AI.method: 通过添加跨层局部连接，实现高层与低层特征的双向更新：高层特征竞争更新低层特征，再利用优化后的低层特征反向更新高层特征。
AI.result: 在SegFormer和Swin Transformer中集成HILA后，语义分割精度显著提升，且参数量和计算量（FLOPS）更少。
AI.conclusion: HILA通过双向跨层交互有效融合定位与语义信息，无需修改原有模型结构即可提升分割性能。

authors_text: Yue Song,Nicu Sebe,Wei Wang
title: Improving Covariance Conditioning of the SVD Meta-layer by Orthogonality
title_zh: 通过正交性改进 SVD 元层的协方差条件
comment: Accepted by ECCV22
comments: Accepted by ECCV22
abstract: Inserting an SVD meta-layer into neural networks is prone to make the covariance ill-conditioned, which could harm the model in the training stability and generalization abilities. In this paper, we systematically study how to improve the covariance conditioning by enforcing orthogonality to the Pre-SVD layer. Existing orthogonal treatments on the weights are first investigated. However, these techniques can improve the conditioning but would hurt the performance. To avoid such a side effect, we propose the Nearest Orthogonal Gradient (NOG) and Optimal Learning Rate (OLR). The effectiveness of our methods is validated in two applications: decorrelated Batch Normalization (BN) and Global Covariance Pooling (GCP). Extensive experiments on visual recognition demonstrate that our methods can simultaneously improve the covariance conditioning and generalization. Moreover, the combinations with orthogonal weight can further boost the performances.
summary: Inserting an SVD meta-layer into neural networks is prone to make the covariance ill-conditioned, which could harm the model in the training stability and generalization abilities. In this paper, we systematically study how to improve the covariance conditioning by enforcing orthogonality to the Pre-SVD layer. Existing orthogonal treatments on the weights are first investigated. However, these techniques can improve the conditioning but would hurt the performance. To avoid such a side effect, we propose the Nearest Orthogonal Gradient (NOG) and Optimal Learning Rate (OLR). The effectiveness of our methods is validated in two applications: decorrelated Batch Normalization (BN) and Global Covariance Pooling (GCP). Extensive experiments on visual recognition demonstrate that our methods can simultaneously improve the covariance conditioning and generalization. Moreover, the combinations with orthogonal weight can further boost the performances.
abstract_zh: 在神经网络中插入 SVD 元层很容易导致协方差病态，从而损害模型的训练稳定性和泛化能力。在本文中，我们系统地研究了如何通过增强 Pre-SVD 层的正交性来改善协方差条件。首先研究现有的权重正交处理。然而，这些技术可以改善体能，但会损害表现。为了避免这种副作用，我们提出了最近正交梯度（NOG）和最佳学习率（OLR）。我们的方法的有效性在两个应用中得到了验证：去相关批量归一化（BN）和全局协方差池（GCP）。关于视觉识别的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以同时改进协方差调节和泛化。此外，与正交权重的组合可以进一步提高性能。

AI.tldr: 通过强制预SVD层的正交性来改善神经网络中SVD元层的协方差条件化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有正交化方法虽能改善协方差条件但会损害模型性能，需寻找兼顾条件化与性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出最近正交梯度（NOG）和最优学习率（OLR）方法，结合正交权重优化预SVD层。
AI.result: 在去相关BN和全局协方差池化任务中，实验验证方法能同时提升协方差条件化和模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: NOG与OLR有效改善协方差条件化，且与正交权重结合可进一步提升性能。

authors_text: Benjamin Marais,Tony Quertier,Stéphane Morucci
title: AI-based Malware and Ransomware Detection Models
title_zh: 基于人工智能的恶意软件和勒索软件检测模型
abstract: Cybercrime is one of the major digital threats of this century. In particular, ransomware attacks have significantly increased, resulting in global damage costs of tens of billion dollars. In this paper, we train and test different Machine Learning and Deep Learning models for malware detection, malware classification and ransomware detection. We introduce a novel and flexible solution that combines two optimized models for malware and ransomware detection. Our results demonstrate some improvements both in terms of detection performances and flexibility. In particular, our combined models pave the way for easier future enhancements using specialized and thus interchangeable detection modules.
summary: Cybercrime is one of the major digital threats of this century. In particular, ransomware attacks have significantly increased, resulting in global damage costs of tens of billion dollars. In this paper, we train and test different Machine Learning and Deep Learning models for malware detection, malware classification and ransomware detection. We introduce a novel and flexible solution that combines two optimized models for malware and ransomware detection. Our results demonstrate some improvements both in terms of detection performances and flexibility. In particular, our combined models pave the way for easier future enhancements using specialized and thus interchangeable detection modules.
abstract_zh: 网络犯罪是本世纪的主要数字威胁之一。尤其是勒索软件攻击大幅增加，造成全球损失数百亿美元。在本文中，我们训练和测试了用于恶意软件检测、恶意软件分类和勒索软件检测的不同机器学习和深度学习模型。我们推出了一种新颖且灵活的解决方案，该解决方案结合了两种用于恶意软件和勒索软件检测的优化模型。我们的结果表明在检测性能和灵活性方面都有一些改进。特别是，我们的组合模型为使用专用且可互换的检测模块更轻松地进行未来增强铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文训练并测试了多种机器学习和深度学习模型，用于恶意软件检测、分类及勒索软件识别，并提出结合两个优化模型的新型解决方案。
AI.motivation: 网络犯罪（尤其是勒索软件攻击）导致全球数十亿美元损失，亟需更高效、灵活的检测技术以应对威胁。
AI.method: 采用机器学习与深度学习模型，设计可组合的优化模型架构，实现恶意软件与勒索软件的检测与分类。
AI.result: 检测性能与灵活性显著提升，组合模型支持未来通过替换模块实现专项检测能力的扩展。
AI.conclusion: 组合模型验证了模块化设计在检测效果与可扩展性上的优势，为后续研究提供可行框架。

authors_text: Rosanna Milner,Md Asif Jalal,Raymond W. M. Ng,Thomas Hain
title: A cross-corpus study on speech emotion recognition
title_zh: 语音情感识别的跨语料库研究
comment: ASRU 2019
comments: ASRU 2019
abstract: For speech emotion datasets, it has been difficult to acquire large quantities of reliable data and acted emotions may be over the top compared to less expressive emotions displayed in everyday life. Lately, larger datasets with natural emotions have been created. Instead of ignoring smaller, acted datasets, this study investigates whether information learnt from acted emotions is useful for detecting natural emotions. Cross-corpus research has mostly considered cross-lingual and even cross-age datasets, and difficulties arise from different methods of annotating emotions causing a drop in performance. To be consistent, four adult English datasets covering acted, elicited and natural emotions are considered. A state-of-the-art model is proposed to accurately investigate the degradation of performance. The system involves a bi-directional LSTM with an attention mechanism to classify emotions across datasets. Experiments study the effects of training models in a cross-corpus and multi-domain fashion and results show the transfer of information is not successful. Out-of-domain models, followed by adapting to the missing dataset, and domain adversarial training (DAT) are shown to be more suitable to generalising to emotions across datasets. This shows positive information transfer from acted datasets to those with more natural emotions and the benefits from training on different corpora.
summary: For speech emotion datasets, it has been difficult to acquire large quantities of reliable data and acted emotions may be over the top compared to less expressive emotions displayed in everyday life. Lately, larger datasets with natural emotions have been created. Instead of ignoring smaller, acted datasets, this study investigates whether information learnt from acted emotions is useful for detecting natural emotions. Cross-corpus research has mostly considered cross-lingual and even cross-age datasets, and difficulties arise from different methods of annotating emotions causing a drop in performance. To be consistent, four adult English datasets covering acted, elicited and natural emotions are considered. A state-of-the-art model is proposed to accurately investigate the degradation of performance. The system involves a bi-directional LSTM with an attention mechanism to classify emotions across datasets. Experiments study the effects of training models in a cross-corpus and multi-domain fashion and results show the transfer of information is not successful. Out-of-domain models, followed by adapting to the missing dataset, and domain adversarial training (DAT) are shown to be more suitable to generalising to emotions across datasets. This shows positive information transfer from acted datasets to those with more natural emotions and the benefits from training on different corpora.
abstract_zh: 对于语音情感数据集来说，获取大量可靠的数据是很困难的，而且与日常生活中表现出的表达性较低的情感相比，表现出的情感可能过于夸张。最近，创建了具有自然情感的更大数据集。这项研究不是忽略较小的行为数据集，而是调查从行为情绪中学到的信息是否有助于检测自然情绪。跨语料库研究大多考虑跨语言甚至跨年龄的数据集，并且由于注释情感的方法不同而导致性能下降而产生困难。为了保持一致，考虑了四个成人英语数据集，涵盖表演情绪、诱发情绪和自然情绪。提出了一种最先进的模型来准确研究性能的下降。该系统涉及一个带有注意力机制的双向 LSTM，用于对数据集中的情绪进行分类。实验研究了跨语料库和多领域训练模型的效果，结果表明信息传递并不成功。域外模型，随后适应缺失的数据集，以及域对抗训练（DAT）被证明更适合泛化跨数据集的情绪。这显示了从表演数据集到具有更自然情感的数据集的积极信息传递以及不同语料库训练的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文研究跨数据集的语音情感识别，探讨从表演性情感数据中学习的信息是否能有效迁移至自然情感识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有情感数据集存在数据量不足、表演性情感与自然情感差异大等问题，需验证跨数据集迁移学习的可行性。
AI.method: 采用双向LSTM结合注意力机制构建分类模型，通过跨数据集/多领域训练及领域对抗训练（DAT）进行实验对比。
AI.result: 直接跨数据集迁移效果不佳，但通过领域对抗训练等方法可提升模型泛化能力，验证了表演数据向自然情感的正向信息迁移。
AI.conclusion: 跨数据集训练面临标注差异挑战，但通过适配训练可实现有效迁移，多语料库训练有助于提升情感识别鲁棒性。

This shows positive information transfer from acted datasets to those with more natural emotions and the benefits from training on different corpora. 对于语音情感数据集来说，获取大量可靠的数据是很困难的，而且与日常生活中表现出的表达性较低的情感相比，表现出的情感可能过于夸张。最近，创建了具有自然情感的更大数据集。这项研究不是忽略较小的行为数据集，而是调查从行为情绪中学到的信息是否有助于检测自然情绪。跨语料库研究大多考虑跨语言甚至跨年龄的数据集，并且由于注释情感的方法不同而导致性能下降而产生困难。为了保持一致，考虑了四个成人英语数据集，涵盖表演情绪、诱发情绪和自然情绪。提出了一种最先进的模型来准确研究性能的下降。该系统涉及一个带有注意力机制的双向 LSTM，用于对数据集中的情绪进行分类。实验研究了跨语料库和多领域训练模型的效果，结果表明信息传递并不成功。域外模型，随后适应缺失的数据集，以及域对抗训练（DAT）被证明更适合泛化跨数据集的情绪。这显示了从表演数据集到具有更自然情感的数据集的积极信息传递以及不同语料库训练的好处。 本文研究跨数据集的语音情感识别，探讨从表演性情感数据中学习的信息是否能有效迁移至自然情感识别任务。 Rosanna Milner,Md Asif Jalal,Raymond W. M. Ng,Thomas Hain cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Keyuan Zhang,Jiayu Bai,Jialin Liu
title: Generating Game Levels of Diverse Behaviour Engagement
title_zh: 生成不同行为参与的游戏级别
abstract: Recent years, there has been growing interests in experience-driven procedural level generation. Various metrics have been formulated to model player experience and help generate personalised levels. In this work, we question whether experience metrics can adapt to agents with different personas. We start by reviewing existing metrics for evaluating game levels. Then, focusing on platformer games, we design a framework integrating various agents and evaluation metrics. Experimental studies on \emph{Super Mario Bros.} indicate that using the same evaluation metrics but agents with different personas can generate levels for particular persona. It implies that, for simple games, using a game-playing agent of specific player archetype as a level tester is probably all we need to generate levels of diverse behaviour engagement.
summary: Recent years, there has been growing interests in experience-driven procedural level generation. Various metrics have been formulated to model player experience and help generate personalised levels. In this work, we question whether experience metrics can adapt to agents with different personas. We start by reviewing existing metrics for evaluating game levels. Then, focusing on platformer games, we design a framework integrating various agents and evaluation metrics. Experimental studies on \emph{Super Mario Bros.} indicate that using the same evaluation metrics but agents with different personas can generate levels for particular persona. It implies that, for simple games, using a game-playing agent of specific player archetype as a level tester is probably all we need to generate levels of diverse behaviour engagement.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对经验驱动的程序关卡生成越来越感兴趣。我们制定了各种指标来模拟玩家体验并帮助生成个性化级别。在这项工作中，我们质疑体验指标是否可以适应具有不同角色的代理。我们首先回顾评估游戏水平的现有指标。然后，针对平台游戏，我们设计了一个集成各种代理和评估指标的框架。 \emph{超级马里奥兄弟} 的实验研究表明，使用相同的评估指标但具有不同角色的代理可以为特定角色生成级别。这意味着，对于简单的游戏，使用特定玩家原型的游戏代理作为级别测试者可能就是我们生成不同行为参与级别所需的全部内容。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何通过不同玩家人设的代理生成具有多样化行为参与度的游戏关卡。
AI.motivation: 现有游戏关卡评估指标可能无法适配不同玩家类型，需验证其在多样化需求下的有效性。
AI.method: 设计整合多代理与评估指标的框架，以《超级马里奥兄弟》为实验对象进行测试。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用相同评估指标但不同人设代理可生成符合特定玩家类型的关卡。
AI.conclusion: 对简单游戏而言，采用特定玩家原型的代理即可生成多样化行为参与的关卡。

authors_text: Grégoire Delétang,Anian Ruoss,Jordi Grau-Moya,Tim Genewein,Li Kevin Wenliang,Elliot Catt,Chris Cundy,Marcus Hutter,Shane Legg,Joel Veness,Pedro A. Ortega
title: Neural Networks and the Chomsky Hierarchy
title_zh: 神经网络和乔姆斯基层次结构
abstract: Reliable generalization lies at the heart of safe ML and AI. However, understanding when and how neural networks generalize remains one of the most important unsolved problems in the field. In this work, we conduct an extensive empirical study (20'910 models, 15 tasks) to investigate whether insights from the theory of computation can predict the limits of neural network generalization in practice. We demonstrate that grouping tasks according to the Chomsky hierarchy allows us to forecast whether certain architectures will be able to generalize to out-of-distribution inputs. This includes negative results where even extensive amounts of data and training time never lead to any non-trivial generalization, despite models having sufficient capacity to fit the training data perfectly. Our results show that, for our subset of tasks, RNNs and Transformers fail to generalize on non-regular tasks, LSTMs can solve regular and counter-language tasks, and only networks augmented with structured memory (such as a stack or memory tape) can successfully generalize on context-free and context-sensitive tasks.
summary: Reliable generalization lies at the heart of safe ML and AI. However, understanding when and how neural networks generalize remains one of the most important unsolved problems in the field. In this work, we conduct an extensive empirical study (20'910 models, 15 tasks) to investigate whether insights from the theory of computation can predict the limits of neural network generalization in practice. We demonstrate that grouping tasks according to the Chomsky hierarchy allows us to forecast whether certain architectures will be able to generalize to out-of-distribution inputs. This includes negative results where even extensive amounts of data and training time never lead to any non-trivial generalization, despite models having sufficient capacity to fit the training data perfectly. Our results show that, for our subset of tasks, RNNs and Transformers fail to generalize on non-regular tasks, LSTMs can solve regular and counter-language tasks, and only networks augmented with structured memory (such as a stack or memory tape) can successfully generalize on context-free and context-sensitive tasks.
abstract_zh: 可靠的泛化是安全机器学习和人工智能的核心。然而，了解神经网络何时以及如何泛化仍然是该领域最重要的未解决问题之一。在这项工作中，我们进行了广泛的实证研究（20'910 个模型，15 个任务），以调查计算理论的见解是否可以预测神经网络泛化在实践中的局限性。我们证明，根据乔姆斯基层次结构对任务进行分组使我们能够预测某些架构是否能够泛化到分布外的输入。这包括负面结果，尽管模型有足够的能力完美地拟合训练数据，但即使是大量的数据和训练时间也永远不会导致任何不平凡的概括。我们的结果表明，对于我们的任务子集，RNN 和 Transformer 无法泛化非常规任务，LSTM 可以解决常规和反语言任务，并且只有使用结构化内存（例如堆栈或内存磁带）增强的网络才能成功泛化上下文无关和上下文敏感的任务。

AI.tldr: 研究神经网络泛化能力是否可通过乔姆斯基层级理论预测
AI.motivation: 可靠泛化是安全AI的基础，但神经网络泛化机制尚不明确，需探索计算理论能否提供预测方法
AI.method: 基于乔姆斯基层级对任务分类，通过大规模实验（20910模型、15任务）测试不同网络结构的泛化表现
AI.result: RNN/Transformer无法泛化非正则任务，LSTM可处理正则任务，仅带结构化记忆的网络能解决上下文相关任务，部分任务即使充足数据也无法泛化
AI.conclusion: 神经网络泛化能力受限于结构复杂度，解决复杂任务需结构化记忆机制

authors_text: Marla Narazani,Ignacio Sarasua,Sebastian Pölsterl,Aldana Lizarraga,Igor Yakushev,Christian Wachinger
title: Is a PET all you need? A multi-modal study for Alzheimer's disease using 3D CNNs
title_zh: 您只需要 PET 吗？使用 3D CNN 进行阿尔茨海默病的多模式研究
abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is the most common form of dementia and often difficult to diagnose due to the multifactorial etiology of dementia. Recent works on neuroimaging-based computer-aided diagnosis with deep neural networks (DNNs) showed that fusing structural magnetic resonance images (sMRI) and fluorodeoxyglucose positron emission tomography (FDG-PET) leads to improved accuracy in a study population of healthy controls and subjects with AD. However, this result conflicts with the established clinical knowledge that FDG-PET better captures AD-specific pathologies than sMRI. Therefore, we propose a framework for the systematic evaluation of multi-modal DNNs and critically re-evaluate single- and multi-modal DNNs based on FDG-PET and sMRI for binary healthy vs. AD, and three-way healthy/mild cognitive impairment/AD classification. Our experiments demonstrate that a single-modality network using FDG-PET performs better than MRI (accuracy 0.91 vs 0.87) and does not show improvement when combined. This conforms with the established clinical knowledge on AD biomarkers, but raises questions about the true benefit of multi-modal DNNs. We argue that future work on multi-modal fusion should systematically assess the contribution of individual modalities following our proposed evaluation framework. Finally, we encourage the community to go beyond healthy vs. AD classification and focus on differential diagnosis of dementia, where fusing multi-modal image information conforms with a clinical need.
summary: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is the most common form of dementia and often difficult to diagnose due to the multifactorial etiology of dementia. Recent works on neuroimaging-based computer-aided diagnosis with deep neural networks (DNNs) showed that fusing structural magnetic resonance images (sMRI) and fluorodeoxyglucose positron emission tomography (FDG-PET) leads to improved accuracy in a study population of healthy controls and subjects with AD. However, this result conflicts with the established clinical knowledge that FDG-PET better captures AD-specific pathologies than sMRI. Therefore, we propose a framework for the systematic evaluation of multi-modal DNNs and critically re-evaluate single- and multi-modal DNNs based on FDG-PET and sMRI for binary healthy vs. AD, and three-way healthy/mild cognitive impairment/AD classification. Our experiments demonstrate that a single-modality network using FDG-PET performs better than MRI (accuracy 0.91 vs 0.87) and does not show improvement when combined. This conforms with the established clinical knowledge on AD biomarkers, but raises questions about the true benefit of multi-modal DNNs. We argue that future work on multi-modal fusion should systematically assess the contribution of individual modalities following our proposed evaluation framework. Finally, we encourage the community to go beyond healthy vs. AD classification and focus on differential diagnosis of dementia, where fusing multi-modal image information conforms with a clinical need.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默氏病 (AD) 是最常见的痴呆症，由于痴呆症的病因有多因素，因此通常难以诊断。最近基于神经影像的计算机辅助诊断与深度神经网络 (DNN) 的研究表明，融合结构磁共振图像 (sMRI) 和氟脱氧葡萄糖正电子发射断层扫描 (FDG-PET) 可以提高健康对照组和 AD 受试者研究人群的准确性。然而，这一结果与既定的临床知识相冲突，即 FDG-PET 比 sMRI 更好地捕获 AD 特异性病理。因此，我们提出了一个系统评估多模态 DNN 的框架，并批判性地重新评估基于 FDG-PET 和 sMRI 的单模态和多模态 DNN，以进行健康与 AD 的二元分类，以及健康/轻度认知障碍/AD 的三向分类。我们的实验表明，使用 FDG-PET 的单模态网络比 MRI 表现更好（准确度 0.91 vs 0.87），并且在组合时并没有显示出改进。这符合 AD 生物标志物的既定临床知识，但引发了关于多模式 DNN 的真正益处的问题。我们认为，未来多模态融合的工作应该按照我们提出的评估框架系统地评估各个模态的贡献。最后，我们鼓励社区超越健康与 AD 分类，重点关注痴呆症的鉴别诊断，其中融合多模态图像信息符合临床需求。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用3D卷积神经网络（CNN）进行阿尔茨海默病（AD）的多模态诊断，比较了FDG-PET和sMRI单模态及融合模态的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管先前研究显示融合sMRI和FDG-PET可提高AD诊断准确性，但临床证据表明FDG-PET更能捕捉AD特异性病理，因此需重新评估多模态方法的有效性。
AI.method: 提出系统评估框架，基于3D CNN分别训练和融合FDG-PET与sMRI模型，进行二分类（健康/AD）和三分类（健康/轻度认知障碍/AD）任务。
AI.result: FDG-PET单模态准确率（0.91）优于sMRI（0.87），且融合后未显著提升性能，支持临床关于FDG-PET作为AD生物标志物的结论。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合需系统评估各模态贡献，未来应超越二分类任务，聚焦符合临床需求的痴呆鉴别诊断。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了使用3D卷积神经网络（CNN）进行阿尔茨海默病（AD）的多模态诊断，比较了FDG-PET和sMRI单模态及融合模态的性能。

search_text: Is a PET all you need? A multi-modal study for Alzheimer's disease using 3D CNNs 您只需要 PET 吗？使用 3D CNN 进行阿尔茨海默病的多模式研究 Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is the most common form of dementia and often difficult to diagnose due to the multifactorial etiology of dementia. Recent works on neuroimaging-based computer-aided diagnosis with deep neural networks (DNNs) showed that fusing structural magnetic resonance images (sMRI) and fluorodeoxyglucose positron emission tomography (FDG-PET) leads to improved accuracy in a study population of healthy controls and subjects with AD. However, this result conflicts with the established clinical knowledge that FDG-PET better captures AD-specific pathologies than sMRI. Therefore, we propose a framework for the systematic evaluation of multi-modal DNNs and critically re-evaluate single- and multi-modal DNNs based on FDG-PET and sMRI for binary healthy vs. AD, and three-way healthy/mild cognitive impairment/AD classification. Our experiments demonstrate that a single-modality network using FDG-PET performs better than MRI (accuracy 0.91 vs 0.87) and does not show improvement when combined. This conforms with the established clinical knowledge on AD biomarkers, but raises questions about the true benefit of multi-modal DNNs. We argue that future work on multi-modal fusion should systematically assess the contribution of individual modalities following our proposed evaluation framework. Finally, we encourage the community to go beyond healthy vs. AD classification and focus on differential diagnosis of dementia, where fusing multi-modal image information conforms with a clinical need. 阿尔茨海默氏病 (AD) 是最常见的痴呆症，由于痴呆症的病因有多因素，因此通常难以诊断。最近基于神经影像的计算机辅助诊断与深度神经网络 (DNN) 的研究表明，融合结构磁共振图像 (sMRI) 和氟脱氧葡萄糖正电子发射断层扫描 (FDG-PET) 可以提高健康对照组和 AD 受试者研究人群的准确性。然而，这一结果与既定的临床知识相冲突，即 FDG-PET 比 sMRI 更好地捕获 AD 特异性病理。因此，我们提出了一个系统评估多模态 DNN 的框架，并批判性地重新评估基于 FDG-PET 和 sMRI 的单模态和多模态 DNN，以进行健康与 AD 的二元分类，以及健康/轻度认知障碍/AD 的三向分类。我们的实验表明，使用 FDG-PET 的单模态网络比 MRI 表现更好（准确度 0.91 vs 0.87），并且在组合时并没有显示出改进。这符合 AD 生物标志物的既定临床知识，但引发了关于多模式 DNN 的真正益处的问题。我们认为，未来多模态融合的工作应该按照我们提出的评估框架系统地评估各个模态的贡献。最后，我们鼓励社区超越健康与 AD 分类，重点关注痴呆症的鉴别诊断，其中融合多模态图像信息符合临床需求。 本文研究了使用3D卷积神经网络（CNN）进行阿尔茨海默病（AD）的多模态诊断，比较了FDG-PET和sMRI单模态及融合模态的性能。 Marla Narazani,Ignacio Sarasua,Sebastian Pölsterl,Aldana Lizarraga,Igor Yakushev,Christian Wachinger eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Ignacio Sarasua,Sebastian Pölsterl,Christian Wachinger
title: CASHformer: Cognition Aware SHape Transformer for Longitudinal Analysis
title_zh: CASHformer：用于纵向分析的认知感知形状转换器
abstract: Modeling temporal changes in subcortical structures is crucial for a better understanding of the progression of Alzheimer's disease (AD). Given their flexibility to adapt to heterogeneous sequence lengths, mesh-based transformer architectures have been proposed in the past for predicting hippocampus deformations across time. However, one of the main limitations of transformers is the large amount of trainable parameters, which makes the application on small datasets very challenging. In addition, current methods do not include relevant non-image information that can help to identify AD-related patterns in the progression. To this end, we introduce CASHformer, a transformer-based framework to model longitudinal shape trajectories in AD. CASHformer incorporates the idea of pre-trained transformers as universal compute engines that generalize across a wide range of tasks by freezing most layers during fine-tuning. This reduces the number of parameters by over 90% with respect to the original model and therefore enables the application of large models on small datasets without overfitting. In addition, CASHformer models cognitive decline to reveal AD atrophy patterns in the temporal sequence. Our results show that CASHformer reduces the reconstruction error by 73% compared to previously proposed methods. Moreover, the accuracy of detecting patients progressing to AD increases by 3% with imputing missing longitudinal shape data.
summary: Modeling temporal changes in subcortical structures is crucial for a better understanding of the progression of Alzheimer's disease (AD). Given their flexibility to adapt to heterogeneous sequence lengths, mesh-based transformer architectures have been proposed in the past for predicting hippocampus deformations across time. However, one of the main limitations of transformers is the large amount of trainable parameters, which makes the application on small datasets very challenging. In addition, current methods do not include relevant non-image information that can help to identify AD-related patterns in the progression. To this end, we introduce CASHformer, a transformer-based framework to model longitudinal shape trajectories in AD. CASHformer incorporates the idea of pre-trained transformers as universal compute engines that generalize across a wide range of tasks by freezing most layers during fine-tuning. This reduces the number of parameters by over 90% with respect to the original model and therefore enables the application of large models on small datasets without overfitting. In addition, CASHformer models cognitive decline to reveal AD atrophy patterns in the temporal sequence. Our results show that CASHformer reduces the reconstruction error by 73% compared to previously proposed methods. Moreover, the accuracy of detecting patients progressing to AD increases by 3% with imputing missing longitudinal shape data.
abstract_zh: 模拟皮层下结构的时间变化对于更好地了解阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的进展至关重要。鉴于其适应异构序列长度的灵活性，过去已经提出基于网格的变压器架构来预测海马体随时间的变形。然而，变压器的主要限制之一是大量可训练参数，这使得在小数据集上的应用非常具有挑战性。此外，当前的方法不包括有助于识别进展中与 AD 相关的模式的相关非图像信息。为此，我们引入了 CASHformer，这是一个基于 Transformer 的框架，用于对 AD 中的纵向形状轨迹进行建模。 CASHformer 融合了预训练 Transformer 作为通用计算引擎的理念，通过在微调期间冻结大多数层来泛化各种任务。相对于原始模型，这减少了 90% 以上的参数数量，因此可以在小型数据集上应用大型模型，而不会出现过度拟合。此外，CASHformer 模拟认知能力下降，以揭示 AD 萎缩的时间序列模式。我们的结果表明，与之前提出的方法相比，CASHformer 将重建误差降低了 73%。此外，通过估算缺失的纵向形状数据，检测进展为 AD 的患者的准确性提高了 3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CASHformer模型，用于通过纵向形状轨迹分析阿尔茨海默病（AD）的进展。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理小数据集时参数过多且未利用非图像信息（如认知衰退数据），导致AD相关模式识别效果受限。
AI.method: 基于预训练Transformer框架，冻结大部分层以减少参数量（降低90%），并整合认知衰退信息建模时间序列萎缩模式。
AI.result: 相比先前方法，CASHformer将重建误差降低73%，并通过填补缺失数据使AD进展检测准确率提升3%。
AI.conclusion: CASHformer通过参数高效设计与认知数据融合，在AD纵向分析中实现了更优的重建与预测性能。

authors_text: Weiming Hu,Qiang Wang,Li Zhang,Luca Bertinetto,Philip H. S. Torr
title: SiamMask: A Framework for Fast Online Object Tracking and Segmentation
title_zh: SiamMask：快速在线对象跟踪和分割的框架
comment: 17 pages, Accepted by TPAMI 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1812.05050
comments: 17 pages, Accepted by TPAMI 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1812.05050
abstract: In this paper we introduce SiamMask, a framework to perform both visual object tracking and video object segmentation, in real-time, with the same simple method. We improve the offline training procedure of popular fully-convolutional Siamese approaches by augmenting their losses with a binary segmentation task. Once the offline training is completed, SiamMask only requires a single bounding box for initialization and can simultaneously carry out visual object tracking and segmentation at high frame-rates. Moreover, we show that it is possible to extend the framework to handle multiple object tracking and segmentation by simply re-using the multi-task model in a cascaded fashion. Experimental results show that our approach has high processing efficiency, at around 55 frames per second. It yields real-time state-of-the-art results on visual-object tracking benchmarks, while at the same time demonstrating competitive performance at a high speed for video object segmentation benchmarks.
summary: In this paper we introduce SiamMask, a framework to perform both visual object tracking and video object segmentation, in real-time, with the same simple method. We improve the offline training procedure of popular fully-convolutional Siamese approaches by augmenting their losses with a binary segmentation task. Once the offline training is completed, SiamMask only requires a single bounding box for initialization and can simultaneously carry out visual object tracking and segmentation at high frame-rates. Moreover, we show that it is possible to extend the framework to handle multiple object tracking and segmentation by simply re-using the multi-task model in a cascaded fashion. Experimental results show that our approach has high processing efficiency, at around 55 frames per second. It yields real-time state-of-the-art results on visual-object tracking benchmarks, while at the same time demonstrating competitive performance at a high speed for video object segmentation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 SiamMask，这是一个使用相同简单方法实时执行视觉对象跟踪和视频对象分割的框架。我们通过使用二进制分割任务增加损失来改进流行的全卷积连体方法的离线训练过程。一旦离线训练完成，SiamMask只需要单个边界框进行初始化，就可以同时进行高帧率的视觉对象跟踪和分割。此外，我们表明，通过简单地以级联方式重用多任务模型，可以扩展框架来处理多个对象跟踪和分割。实验结果表明，我们的方法具有很高的处理效率，约为每秒 55 帧。它在视觉对象跟踪基准测试中产生实时的最先进的结果，同时在视频对象分割基准测试中展示高速的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 提出SiamMask框架，实现实时在线目标跟踪与分割
AI.motivation: 传统方法分别处理跟踪与分割效率低，需统一高效方法
AI.method: 改进Siamese网络训练，加入分割损失，单框初始化，级联处理多目标
AI.result: 处理速度达55fps，在跟踪和分割基准上均表现优异
AI.conclusion: SiamMask框架有效实现高效实时跟踪与分割，方法具有扩展性

authors_text: Juan Pinto-Ríos,Felipe Calderón,Ariel Leiva,Gabriel Hermosilla,Alejandra Beghelli,Danilo Bórquez-Paredes,Astrid Lozada,Nicolás Jara,Ricardo Olivares,Gabriel Saavedra
title: Resource Allocation in Multicore Elastic Optical Networks: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach
title_zh: 多核弹性光网络中的资源分配：深度强化学习方法
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures
comments: 11 pages, 10 figures
abstract: A deep reinforcement learning approach is applied, for the first time, to solve the routing, modulation, spectrum and core allocation (RMSCA) problem in dynamic multicore fiber elastic optical networks (MCF-EONs). To do so, a new environment - compatible with OpenAI's Gym - was designed and implemented to emulate the operation of MCF-EONs. The new environment processes the agent actions (selection of route, core and spectrum slot) by considering the network state and physical-layer-related aspects. The latter includes the available modulation formats and their reach and the inter-core crosstalk (XT), an MCF-related impairment. If the resulting quality of the signal is acceptable, the environment allocates the resources selected by the agent. After processing the agent's action, the environment is configured to give the agent a numerical reward and information about the new network state. The blocking performance of four different agents was compared through simulation to 3 baseline heuristics used in MCF-EONs. Results obtained for the NSFNet and COST239 network topologies show that the best-performing agent achieves, on average, up to a four-times decrease in blocking probability concerning the best-performing baseline heuristic methods.
summary: A deep reinforcement learning approach is applied, for the first time, to solve the routing, modulation, spectrum and core allocation (RMSCA) problem in dynamic multicore fiber elastic optical networks (MCF-EONs). To do so, a new environment - compatible with OpenAI's Gym - was designed and implemented to emulate the operation of MCF-EONs. The new environment processes the agent actions (selection of route, core and spectrum slot) by considering the network state and physical-layer-related aspects. The latter includes the available modulation formats and their reach and the inter-core crosstalk (XT), an MCF-related impairment. If the resulting quality of the signal is acceptable, the environment allocates the resources selected by the agent. After processing the agent's action, the environment is configured to give the agent a numerical reward and information about the new network state. The blocking performance of four different agents was compared through simulation to 3 baseline heuristics used in MCF-EONs. Results obtained for the NSFNet and COST239 network topologies show that the best-performing agent achieves, on average, up to a four-times decrease in blocking probability concerning the best-performing baseline heuristic methods.
abstract_zh: 首次应用深度强化学习方法来解决动态多核光纤弹性光网络（MCF-EON）中的路由、调制、频谱和核心分配（RMSCA）问题。为此，设计并实现了一个与 OpenAI 的 Gym 兼容的新环境来模拟 MCF-EON 的操作。新环境通过考虑网络状态和物理层相关方面来处理代理操作（路由、核心和频谱槽的选择）。后者包括可用的调制格式及其范围以及核心间串扰 (XT)（一种与 MCF 相关的损伤）。如果最终的信号质量可以接受，环境就会分配代理选择的资源。处理完代理的操作后，环境被配置为向代理提供数字奖励和有关新网络状态的信息。通过模拟与 MCF-EON 中使用的 3 种基线启发法对四种不同代理的阻塞性能进行了比较。 NSFNet 和 COST239 网络拓扑的结果表明，与性能最佳的基线启发式方法相比，性能最佳的代理平均将阻塞概率降低了四倍。

AI.tldr: 本文首次将深度强化学习应用于多核弹性光网络中的路由、调制、频谱和核心分配问题，通过自定义仿真环境优化资源分配策略。
AI.motivation: 传统启发式方法难以应对动态多核光纤弹性光网络（MCF-EONs）中复杂的资源分配需求，亟需更智能的动态优化方案。
AI.method: 设计兼容OpenAI Gym的仿真环境，集成物理层参数（如调制格式、跨核串扰）并构建深度强化学习框架，通过奖励机制训练智能体决策。
AI.result: 在NSFNet和COST239网络拓扑中，最佳智能体的阻塞概率较传统启发式方法平均降低4倍。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习能有效解决MCF-EONs动态资源分配问题，显著优于现有启发式算法，为未来网络优化提供新思路。

search_text: Resource Allocation in Multicore Elastic Optical Networks: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach 多核弹性光网络中的资源分配：深度强化学习方法 A deep reinforcement learning approach is applied, for the first time, to solve the routing, modulation, spectrum and core allocation (RMSCA) problem in dynamic multicore fiber elastic optical networks (MCF-EONs). To do so, a new environment - compatible with OpenAI's Gym - was designed and implemented to emulate the operation of MCF-EONs. The new environment processes the agent actions (selection of route, core and spectrum slot) by considering the network state and physical-layer-related aspects. The latter includes the available modulation formats and their reach and the inter-core crosstalk (XT), an MCF-related impairment. If the resulting quality of the signal is acceptable, the environment allocates the resources selected by the agent. After processing the agent's action, the environment is configured to give the agent a numerical reward and information about the new network state. The blocking performance of four different agents was compared through simulation to 3 baseline heuristics used in MCF-EONs. Results obtained for the NSFNet and COST239 network topologies show that the best-performing agent achieves, on average, up to a four-times decrease in blocking probability concerning the best-performing baseline heuristic methods. 首次应用深度强化学习方法来解决动态多核光纤弹性光网络（MCF-EON）中的路由、调制、频谱和核心分配（RMSCA）问题。为此，设计并实现了一个与 OpenAI 的 Gym 兼容的新环境来模拟 MCF-EON 的操作。新环境通过考虑网络状态和物理层相关方面来处理代理操作（路由、核心和频谱槽的选择）。后者包括可用的调制格式及其范围以及核心间串扰 (XT)（一种与 MCF 相关的损伤）。如果最终的信号质量可以接受，环境就会分配代理选择的资源。处理完代理的操作后，环境被配置为向代理提供数字奖励和有关新网络状态的信息。通过模拟与 MCF-EON 中使用的 3 种基线启发法对四种不同代理的阻塞性能进行了比较。 NSFNet 和 COST239 网络拓扑的结果表明，与性能最佳的基线启发式方法相比，性能最佳的代理平均将阻塞概率降低了四倍。 本文首次将深度强化学习应用于多核弹性光网络中的路由、调制、频谱和核心分配问题，通过自定义仿真环境优化资源分配策略。 Juan Pinto-Ríos,Felipe Calderón,Ariel Leiva,Gabriel Hermosilla,Alejandra Beghelli,Danilo Bórquez-Paredes,Astrid Lozada,Nicolás Jara,Ricardo Olivares,Gabriel Saavedra cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NI

authors_text: Jon Andre Ottesen,Matthan W. A. Caan,Inge Rasmus Groote,Atle Bjørnerud
title: A Densely Interconnected Network for Deep Learning Accelerated MRI
title_zh: 用于深度学习加速 MRI 的密集互连网络
abstract: Objective: To improve accelerated MRI reconstruction through a densely connected cascading deep learning reconstruction framework. Materials and Methods: A cascading deep learning reconstruction framework (baseline model) was modified by applying three architectural modifications: Input-level dense connections between cascade inputs and outputs, an improved deep learning sub-network, and long-range skip-connections between subsequent deep learning networks. An ablation study was performed, where five model configurations were trained on the NYU fastMRI neuro dataset with an end-to-end scheme conjunct on four- and eight-fold acceleration. The trained models were evaluated by comparing their respective structural similarity index measure (SSIM), normalized mean square error (NMSE) and peak signal to noise ratio (PSNR). Results: The proposed densely interconnected residual cascading network (DIRCN), utilizing all three suggested modifications, achieved a SSIM improvement of 8% and 11% for four- and eight-fold acceleration, respectively. For eight-fold acceleration, the model achieved a 23% decrease in the NMSE when compared to the baseline model. In an ablation study, the individual architectural modifications all contributed to this improvement, by reducing the SSIM and NMSE with approximately 3% and 5% for four-fold acceleration, respectively. Conclusion: The proposed architectural modifications allow for simple adjustments on an already existing cascading framework to further improve the resulting reconstructions.
summary: Objective: To improve accelerated MRI reconstruction through a densely connected cascading deep learning reconstruction framework. Materials and Methods: A cascading deep learning reconstruction framework (baseline model) was modified by applying three architectural modifications: Input-level dense connections between cascade inputs and outputs, an improved deep learning sub-network, and long-range skip-connections between subsequent deep learning networks. An ablation study was performed, where five model configurations were trained on the NYU fastMRI neuro dataset with an end-to-end scheme conjunct on four- and eight-fold acceleration. The trained models were evaluated by comparing their respective structural similarity index measure (SSIM), normalized mean square error (NMSE) and peak signal to noise ratio (PSNR). Results: The proposed densely interconnected residual cascading network (DIRCN), utilizing all three suggested modifications, achieved a SSIM improvement of 8% and 11% for four- and eight-fold acceleration, respectively. For eight-fold acceleration, the model achieved a 23% decrease in the NMSE when compared to the baseline model. In an ablation study, the individual architectural modifications all contributed to this improvement, by reducing the SSIM and NMSE with approximately 3% and 5% for four-fold acceleration, respectively. Conclusion: The proposed architectural modifications allow for simple adjustments on an already existing cascading framework to further improve the resulting reconstructions.
abstract_zh: 目的：通过密集连接的级联深度学习重建框架来改进加速 MRI 重建。材料和方法：通过应用三种架构修改来修改级联深度学习重建框架（基线模型）：级联输入和输出之间的输入级密集连接、改进的深度学习子网络以及后续深度学习网络之间的远程跳跃连接。进行了一项消融研究，其中在纽约大学 fastMRI 神经数据集上训练了五种模型配置，并采用端到端方案结合四倍和八倍加速。通过比较各自的结构相似性指数测量（SSIM）、归一化均方误差（NMSE）和峰值信噪比（PSNR）来评估训练模型。结果：所提出的密集互连残差级联网络 (DIRCN) 利用所有三个建议的修改，分别实现了 8% 和 11% 的 SSIM 改进，加速四倍和八倍。对于八倍加速，与基线模型相比，该模型的 NMSE 降低了 23%。在一项消融研究中，各个架构修改都对这一改进做出了贡献，通过将 SSIM 和 NMSE 分别降低约 3% 和 5%，实现四倍加速。结论：所提出的架构修改允许对现有的级联框架进行简单的调整，以进一步改进最终的重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种密集互连的残差级联网络(DIRCN)，通过改进深度学习架构提升加速MRI重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有加速MRI重建方法在图像质量和速度间存在权衡，需通过网络结构优化进一步提升重建效果。
AI.method: 在级联深度学习框架中引入输入级密集连接、改进子网络和长距离跳跃连接，并通过消融实验验证各模块效果。
AI.result: DIRCN在4倍/8倍加速下分别提升SSIM 8%/11%，8倍加速时NMSE降低23%，各模块改进均贡献约3%-5%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 密集互连架构可通过简单模块扩展显著优化现有级联框架的MRI重建效果。
