authors_text: Agus Gunawan,Muhammad Adi Nugroho,Se Jin Park
title: Test-time Adaptation for Real Image Denoising via Meta-transfer Learning
title_zh: 通过元迁移学习进行真实图像去噪的测试时适应
abstract: In recent years, a ton of research has been conducted on real image denoising tasks. However, the efforts are more focused on improving real image denoising through creating a better network architecture. We explore a different direction where we propose to improve real image denoising performance through a better learning strategy that can enable test-time adaptation on the multi-task network. The learning strategy is two stages where the first stage pre-train the network using meta-auxiliary learning to get better meta-initialization. Meanwhile, we use meta-learning for fine-tuning (meta-transfer learning) the network as the second stage of our training to enable test-time adaptation on real noisy images. To exploit a better learning strategy, we also propose a network architecture with self-supervised masked reconstruction loss. Experiments on a real noisy dataset show the contribution of the proposed method and show that the proposed method can outperform other SOTA methods.
summary: In recent years, a ton of research has been conducted on real image denoising tasks. However, the efforts are more focused on improving real image denoising through creating a better network architecture. We explore a different direction where we propose to improve real image denoising performance through a better learning strategy that can enable test-time adaptation on the multi-task network. The learning strategy is two stages where the first stage pre-train the network using meta-auxiliary learning to get better meta-initialization. Meanwhile, we use meta-learning for fine-tuning (meta-transfer learning) the network as the second stage of our training to enable test-time adaptation on real noisy images. To exploit a better learning strategy, we also propose a network architecture with self-supervised masked reconstruction loss. Experiments on a real noisy dataset show the contribution of the proposed method and show that the proposed method can outperform other SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对真实图像去噪任务进行了大量的研究。然而，这些努力更侧重于通过创建更好的网络架构来改善真实图像去噪。我们探索了一个不同的方向，我们建议通过更好的学习策略来提高真实图像去噪性能，该策略可以在多任务网络上实现测试时适应。学习策略分为两个阶段，第一阶段使用元辅助学习对网络进行预训练，以获得更好的元初始化。同时，我们使用元学习对网络进行微调（元迁移学习）作为训练的第二阶段，以实现对真实噪声图像的测试时间适应。为了利用更好的学习策略，我们还提出了一种具有自监督掩蔽重建损失的网络架构。在真实噪声数据集上的实验显示了所提出方法的贡献，并表明所提出的方法可以优于其他 SOTA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过元迁移学习策略实现真实图像去噪的测试时自适应方法，改进现有研究中过度依赖网络架构优化的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有真实图像去噪研究主要聚焦于设计更优网络结构，而忽视了测试时自适应学习策略的重要性，导致模型在实际噪声场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段通过元辅助学习预训练网络获得良好初始化参数；第二阶段利用元迁移学习进行微调以实现测试时自适应。同时提出带自监督掩码重建损失的网络架构。
AI.result: 在真实噪声数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多个指标上优于当前最先进的去噪方法，验证了元迁移学习策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合元迁移学习与自监督重建损失，本文提出的两阶段训练框架显著提升了真实场景下图像去噪的性能，为测试时自适应研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Test-time Adaptation for Real Image Denoising via Meta-transfer Learning 通过元迁移学习进行真实图像去噪的测试时适应 In recent years, a ton of research has been conducted on real image denoising tasks. However, the efforts are more focused on improving real image denoising through creating a better network architecture. We explore a different direction where we propose to improve real image denoising performance through a better learning strategy that can enable test-time adaptation on the multi-task network. The learning strategy is two stages where the first stage pre-train the network using meta-auxiliary learning to get better meta-initialization. Meanwhile, we use meta-learning for fine-tuning (meta-transfer learning) the network as the second stage of our training to enable test-time adaptation on real noisy images. To exploit a better learning strategy, we also propose a network architecture with self-supervised masked reconstruction loss. Experiments on a real noisy dataset show the contribution of the proposed method and show that the proposed method can outperform other SOTA methods. 近年来，人们对真实图像去噪任务进行了大量的研究。然而，这些努力更侧重于通过创建更好的网络架构来改善真实图像去噪。我们探索了一个不同的方向，我们建议通过更好的学习策略来提高真实图像去噪性能，该策略可以在多任务网络上实现测试时适应。学习策略分为两个阶段，第一阶段使用元辅助学习对网络进行预训练，以获得更好的元初始化。同时，我们使用元学习对网络进行微调（元迁移学习）作为训练的第二阶段，以实现对真实噪声图像的测试时间适应。为了利用更好的学习策略，我们还提出了一种具有自监督掩蔽重建损失的网络架构。在真实噪声数据集上的实验显示了所提出方法的贡献，并表明所提出的方法可以优于其他 SOTA 方法。 本文提出通过元迁移学习策略实现真实图像去噪的测试时自适应方法，改进现有研究中过度依赖网络架构优化的不足。 Agus Gunawan,Muhammad Adi Nugroho,Se Jin Park cs.CV

authors_text: Tu Bui,Ning Yu,John Collomosse
title: RepMix: Representation Mixing for Robust Attribution of Synthesized Images
title_zh: RepMix：用于合成图像的稳健归因的表示混合
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022; fix typo, add supmat
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022; fix typo, add supmat
abstract: Rapid advances in Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) raise new challenges for image attribution; detecting whether an image is synthetic and, if so, determining which GAN architecture created it. Uniquely, we present a solution to this task capable of 1) matching images invariant to their semantic content; 2) robust to benign transformations (changes in quality, resolution, shape, etc.) commonly encountered as images are re-shared online. In order to formalize our research, a challenging benchmark, Attribution88, is collected for robust and practical image attribution. We then propose RepMix, our GAN fingerprinting technique based on representation mixing and a novel loss. We validate its capability of tracing the provenance of GAN-generated images invariant to the semantic content of the image and also robust to perturbations. We show our approach improves significantly from existing GAN fingerprinting works on both semantic generalization and robustness. Data and code are available at https://github.com/TuBui/image_attribution.
summary: Rapid advances in Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) raise new challenges for image attribution; detecting whether an image is synthetic and, if so, determining which GAN architecture created it. Uniquely, we present a solution to this task capable of 1) matching images invariant to their semantic content; 2) robust to benign transformations (changes in quality, resolution, shape, etc.) commonly encountered as images are re-shared online. In order to formalize our research, a challenging benchmark, Attribution88, is collected for robust and practical image attribution. We then propose RepMix, our GAN fingerprinting technique based on representation mixing and a novel loss. We validate its capability of tracing the provenance of GAN-generated images invariant to the semantic content of the image and also robust to perturbations. We show our approach improves significantly from existing GAN fingerprinting works on both semantic generalization and robustness. Data and code are available at https://github.com/TuBui/image_attribution.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）的快速发展给图像归因带来了新的挑战；检测图像是否是合成的，如果是，则确定哪个 GAN 架构创建了它。独特的是，我们针对此任务提出了一种解决方案，能够 1）匹配与其语义内容无关的图像； 2) 对在线重新共享图像时常见的良性转换（质量、分辨率、形状等的变化）具有鲁棒性。为了使我们的研究正式化，我们收集了一个具有挑战性的基准 Attribution88，以实现稳健且实用的图像归因。然后，我们提出了 RepMix，这是我们基于表示混合和新颖损失的 GAN 指纹技术。我们验证了它追踪 GAN 生成的图像来源的能力，该图像对于图像的语义内容是不变的，并且对扰动也具有鲁棒性。我们展示了我们的方法在语义泛化和鲁棒性方面比现有的 GAN 指纹识别有了显着改进。数据和代码可在 https://github.com/TuBui/image_attribution 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RepMix方法，用于在语义内容不变和常见图像变换下，对合成图像进行鲁棒的生成模型溯源。
AI.motivation: 生成对抗网络（GAN）的快速发展导致图像溯源面临挑战，现有方法难以应对语义内容变化和图像重分享时的良性变换。
AI.method: 基于表示混合（Representation Mixing）和新型损失函数的GAN指纹技术RepMix，并构建了用于鲁棒图像溯源的挑战性基准数据集Attribution88。
AI.result: RepMix在语义泛化性和鲁棒性上显著优于现有方法，能有效追踪GAN生成图像的来源，且对图像变换具有强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RepMix通过表示混合机制实现了与语义无关的图像溯源，为合成图像检测和生成模型指纹研究提供了新思路和基准数据集。

authors_text: Jiayang Ao,Qiuhong Ke,Krista A. Ehinger
title: Image Amodal Completion: A Survey
title_zh: 图像非模态补全：一项调查
comment: Accepted at Computer Vision and Image Understanding. See https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cviu.2023.103661 for the final version
comments: Accepted at Computer Vision and Image Understanding. See https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cviu.2023.103661 for the final version
abstract: Existing computer vision systems can compete with humans in understanding the visible parts of objects, but still fall far short of humans when it comes to depicting the invisible parts of partially occluded objects. Image amodal completion aims to equip computers with human-like amodal completion functions to understand an intact object despite it being partially occluded. The main purpose of this survey is to provide an intuitive understanding of the research hotspots, key technologies and future trends in the field of image amodal completion. Firstly, we present a comprehensive review of the latest literature in this emerging field, exploring three key tasks in image amodal completion, including amodal shape completion, amodal appearance completion, and order perception. Then we examine popular datasets related to image amodal completion along with their common data collection methods and evaluation metrics. Finally, we discuss real-world applications and future research directions for image amodal completion, facilitating the reader's understanding of the challenges of existing technologies and upcoming research trends.
summary: Existing computer vision systems can compete with humans in understanding the visible parts of objects, but still fall far short of humans when it comes to depicting the invisible parts of partially occluded objects. Image amodal completion aims to equip computers with human-like amodal completion functions to understand an intact object despite it being partially occluded. The main purpose of this survey is to provide an intuitive understanding of the research hotspots, key technologies and future trends in the field of image amodal completion. Firstly, we present a comprehensive review of the latest literature in this emerging field, exploring three key tasks in image amodal completion, including amodal shape completion, amodal appearance completion, and order perception. Then we examine popular datasets related to image amodal completion along with their common data collection methods and evaluation metrics. Finally, we discuss real-world applications and future research directions for image amodal completion, facilitating the reader's understanding of the challenges of existing technologies and upcoming research trends.
abstract_zh: 现有的计算机视觉系统在理解物体的可见部分方面可以与人类竞争，但在描绘部分遮挡物体的不可见部分方面仍然远远落后于人类。图像非模态补全旨在为计算机配备类似人类的非模态补全功能，以理解完整的物体，尽管它被部分遮挡。本次调查的主要目的是直观地了解图像无模态补全领域的研究热点、关键技术和未来趋势。首先，我们对这一新兴领域的最新文献进行了全面回顾，探讨了图像非模态补全中的三个关键任务，包括非模态形状补全、非模态外观补全和秩序感知。然后，我们检查与图像非模态补全相关的流行数据集及其常见的数据收集方法和评估指标。最后，我们讨论图像非模态补全的现实应用和未来研究方向，促进读者理解现有技术的挑战和即将到来的研究趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了图像模态完成领域的研究热点、关键技术及未来趋势，重点探讨了三类任务：模态形状补全、模态外观补全和顺序感知。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉系统在理解物体可见部分表现优异，但对部分遮挡物体的不可见部分仍存在显著不足，需通过模态补全技术实现类似人类的完整物体理解。
AI.method: 通过全面回顾最新文献，分析三大核心任务，梳理相关数据集及其采集方法与评估指标，并探讨实际应用与未来研究方向。
AI.result: 系统总结了当前技术挑战，明确了数据集构建、跨模态融合与真实场景应用等关键研究方向，为后续研究提供参考框架。
AI.conclusion: 图像模态补全需进一步解决遮挡推理与多模态信息融合难题，未来研究应聚焦真实场景应用与更高效的评估体系构建。

motivation: 现有计算机视觉系统在理解物体可见部分表现优异，但对部分遮挡物体的不可见部分仍存在显著不足，需通过模态补全技术实现类似人类的完整物体理解。
method: 通过全面回顾最新文献，分析三大核心任务，梳理相关数据集及其采集方法与评估指标，并探讨实际应用与未来研究方向。
result: 系统总结了当前技术挑战，明确了数据集构建、跨模态融合与真实场景应用等关键研究方向，为后续研究提供参考框架。
conclusion: 图像模态补全需进一步解决遮挡推理与多模态信息融合难题，未来研究应聚焦真实场景应用与更高效的评估体系构建。
search_text: Image Amodal Completion: A Survey 图像非模态补全：一项调查 Existing computer vision systems can compete with humans in understanding the visible parts of objects, but still fall far short of humans when it comes to depicting the invisible parts of partially occluded objects. Image amodal completion aims to equip computers with human-like amodal completion functions to understand an intact object despite it being partially occluded. The main purpose of this survey is to provide an intuitive understanding of the research hotspots, key technologies and future trends in the field of image amodal completion. Firstly, we present a comprehensive review of the latest literature in this emerging field, exploring three key tasks in image amodal completion, including amodal shape completion, amodal appearance completion, and order perception. Then we examine popular datasets related to image amodal completion along with their common data collection methods and evaluation metrics. Finally, we discuss real-world applications and future research directions for image amodal completion, facilitating the reader's understanding of the challenges of existing technologies and upcoming research trends. 现有的计算机视觉系统在理解物体的可见部分方面可以与人类竞争，但在描绘部分遮挡物体的不可见部分方面仍然远远落后于人类。图像非模态补全旨在为计算机配备类似人类的非模态补全功能，以理解完整的物体，尽管它被部分遮挡。本次调查的主要目的是直观地了解图像无模态补全领域的研究热点、关键技术和未来趋势。首先，我们对这一新兴领域的最新文献进行了全面回顾，探讨了图像非模态补全中的三个关键任务，包括非模态形状补全、非模态外观补全和秩序感知。然后，我们检查与图像非模态补全相关的流行数据集及其常见的数据收集方法和评估指标。最后，我们讨论图像非模态补全的现实应用和未来研究方向，促进读者理解现有技术的挑战和即将到来的研究趋势。 本文综述了图像模态完成领域的研究热点、关键技术及未来趋势，重点探讨了三类任务：模态形状补全、模态外观补全和顺序感知。 Jiayang Ao,Qiuhong Ke,Krista A. Ehinger cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ahmed Ghorbel,Ahmed Aldahdooh,Shadi Albarqouni,Wassim Hamidouche
title: Transformer based Models for Unsupervised Anomaly Segmentation in Brain MR Images
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的大脑 MR 图像无监督异常分割模型
abstract: The quality of patient care associated with diagnostic radiology is proportionate to a physician workload. Segmentation is a fundamental limiting precursor to both diagnostic and therapeutic procedures. Advances in machine learning (ML) aim to increase diagnostic efficiency by replacing a single application with generalized algorithms. The goal of unsupervised anomaly detection (UAD) is to identify potential anomalous regions unseen during training, where convolutional neural network (CNN) based autoencoders (AEs) and variational autoencoders (VAEs) are considered a de facto approach for reconstruction based-anomaly segmentation. The restricted receptive field in CNNs limits the CNN to model the global context. Hence, if the anomalous regions cover large parts of the image, the CNN-based AEs are not capable of bringing a semantic understanding of the image. Meanwhile, vision transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a competitive alternative to CNNs. It relies on the self-attention mechanism that can relate image patches to each other. We investigate in this paper Transformer capabilities in building AEs for the reconstruction-based UAD task to reconstruct a coherent and more realistic image. We focus on anomaly segmentation for brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) and present five Transformer-based models while enabling segmentation performance comparable to or superior to state-of-the-art (SOTA) models. The source code is made publicly available on GitHub: https://github.com/ahmedgh970/Transformers_Unsupervised_Anomaly_Segmentation.git.
summary: The quality of patient care associated with diagnostic radiology is proportionate to a physician workload. Segmentation is a fundamental limiting precursor to both diagnostic and therapeutic procedures. Advances in machine learning (ML) aim to increase diagnostic efficiency by replacing a single application with generalized algorithms. The goal of unsupervised anomaly detection (UAD) is to identify potential anomalous regions unseen during training, where convolutional neural network (CNN) based autoencoders (AEs) and variational autoencoders (VAEs) are considered a de facto approach for reconstruction based-anomaly segmentation. The restricted receptive field in CNNs limits the CNN to model the global context. Hence, if the anomalous regions cover large parts of the image, the CNN-based AEs are not capable of bringing a semantic understanding of the image. Meanwhile, vision transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a competitive alternative to CNNs. It relies on the self-attention mechanism that can relate image patches to each other. We investigate in this paper Transformer capabilities in building AEs for the reconstruction-based UAD task to reconstruct a coherent and more realistic image. We focus on anomaly segmentation for brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) and present five Transformer-based models while enabling segmentation performance comparable to or superior to state-of-the-art (SOTA) models. The source code is made publicly available on GitHub: https://github.com/ahmedgh970/Transformers_Unsupervised_Anomaly_Segmentation.git.
abstract_zh: 与诊断放射学相关的患者护理质量与医生的工作量成正比。分割是诊断和治疗过程的基本限制前提。机器学习 (ML) 的进步旨在通过用通用算法取代单一应用程序来提高诊断效率。无监督异常检测（UAD）的目标是识别训练期间未见的潜在异常区域，其中基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的自动编码器（AE）和变分自动编码器（VAE）被认为是基于重建的异常分割的事实上的方法。 CNN 中受限的感受野限制了 CNN 对全局环境进行建模。因此，如果异常区域覆盖图像的大部分，基于 CNN 的 AE 就无法对图像进行语义理解。与此同时，视觉转换器 (ViT) 已成为 CNN 的竞争替代品。它依赖于可以将图像块相互关联的自注意力机制。我们在本文中研究了 Transformer 为基于重建的 UAD 任务构建 AE 的能力，以重建连贯且更真实的图像。我们专注于脑磁共振成像 (MRI) 的异常分割，并提出了五种基于 Transformer 的模型，同时使分割性能与最先进的 (SOTA) 模型相当或更好。源代码在 GitHub 上公开：https://github.com/ahmedgh970/Transformers_Unsupervised_Anomaly_Segmentation.git。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于Transformer的自编码器模型在脑部MRI图像无监督异常分割任务中的应用，提出五种模型以提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN因感受野限制难以建模全局上下文，导致大范围异常区域分割效果不佳。Transformer的自注意力机制可捕捉图像块间关系，适合处理复杂医学图像。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构构建自编码器，通过重建损失检测异常。提出五种不同Transformer模型结构，专注于脑MRI的无监督异常分割任务。
AI.result: 实验表明所提模型在分割性能上达到或超越现有最先进方法，且源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Transformer在医学图像无监督异常分割中展现优势，其全局建模能力有效解决了CNN的局限性，为临床诊断提供新思路。

authors_text: Evripidis Bampis,Bruno Escoffier,Paul Youssef
title: Online 2-stage Stable Matching
title_zh: 在线两阶段稳定匹配
abstract: We focus on an online 2-stage problem, motivated by the following situation: consider a system where students shall be assigned to universities. There is a first round where some students apply, and a first (stable) matching $M_1$ has to be computed. However, some students may decide to leave the system (change their plan, go to a foreign university, or to some institution not in the system). Then, in a second round (after these deletions), we shall compute a second (final) stable matching $M_2$. As it is undesirable to change assignments, the goal is to minimize the number of divorces/modifications between the two stable matchings $M_1$ and $M_2$. Then, how should we choose $M_1$ and $M_2$? We show that there is an {\it optimal online} algorithm to solve this problem. In particular, thanks to a dominance property, we show that we can optimally compute $M_1$ without knowing the students that will leave the system. We generalize the result to some other possible modifications in the input (students, open positions). We also tackle the case of more stages, showing that no competitive (online) algorithm can be achieved for the considered problem as soon as there are 3 stages.
summary: We focus on an online 2-stage problem, motivated by the following situation: consider a system where students shall be assigned to universities. There is a first round where some students apply, and a first (stable) matching $M_1$ has to be computed. However, some students may decide to leave the system (change their plan, go to a foreign university, or to some institution not in the system). Then, in a second round (after these deletions), we shall compute a second (final) stable matching $M_2$. As it is undesirable to change assignments, the goal is to minimize the number of divorces/modifications between the two stable matchings $M_1$ and $M_2$. Then, how should we choose $M_1$ and $M_2$? We show that there is an {\it optimal online} algorithm to solve this problem. In particular, thanks to a dominance property, we show that we can optimally compute $M_1$ without knowing the students that will leave the system. We generalize the result to some other possible modifications in the input (students, open positions). We also tackle the case of more stages, showing that no competitive (online) algorithm can be achieved for the considered problem as soon as there are 3 stages.
abstract_zh: 我们关注在线两阶段问题，其动机是以下情况：考虑将学生分配到大学的系统。有一些学生申请的第一轮，并且必须计算第一个（稳定）匹配的 $M_1$。然而，有些学生可能决定离开系统（改变计划，去国外大学，或者去一些不在系统内的机构）。然后，在第二轮中（在这些删除之后），我们将计算第二个（最终）稳定匹配 $M_2$。由于不希望更改分配，因此目标是最小化两个稳定匹配 $M_1$ 和 $M_2$ 之间的分离/修改数量。那么，$M_1$和$M_2$应该如何选择呢？我们证明有一个{\it最优在线}算法来解决这个问题。特别是，由于优势属性，我们表明我们可以在不知道将离开系统的学生的情况下最优地计算 $M_1$。我们将结果推广到输入中的一些其他可能的修改（学生、空缺职位）。我们还解决了更多阶段的情况，表明只要有 3 个阶段，就无法为所考虑的问题实现竞争性（在线）算法。

AI.tldr: 研究在线两阶段稳定匹配问题，旨在通过优化初始匹配策略，减少后续因学生退出导致的匹配修改次数。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中学生可能在首轮匹配后退出系统，需在第二轮重新匹配时最小化修改次数，以保持系统稳定性。
AI.method: 利用支配性性质设计在线算法，无需预知退出学生即可计算初始匹配，并推广至其他输入修改场景及多阶段情况。
AI.result: 证明存在最优在线算法解决两阶段问题，但三阶段及以上无法实现竞争性在线算法。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段稳定匹配可通过在线算法有效处理，但多阶段场景存在理论局限性，需谨慎设计算法策略。

In particular, thanks to a dominance property, we show that we can optimally compute $M_1$ without knowing the students that will leave the system. We generalize the result to some other possible modifications in the input (students, open positions). We also tackle the case of more stages, showing that no competitive (online) algorithm can be achieved for the considered problem as soon as there are 3 stages. 我们关注在线两阶段问题，其动机是以下情况：考虑将学生分配到大学的系统。有一些学生申请的第一轮，并且必须计算第一个（稳定）匹配的 $M_1$。然而，有些学生可能决定离开系统（改变计划，去国外大学，或者去一些不在系统内的机构）。然后，在第二轮中（在这些删除之后），我们将计算第二个（最终）稳定匹配 $M_2$。由于不希望更改分配，因此目标是最小化两个稳定匹配 $M_1$ 和 $M_2$ 之间的分离/修改数量。那么，$M_1$和$M_2$应该如何选择呢？我们证明有一个{\it最优在线}算法来解决这个问题。特别是，由于优势属性，我们表明我们可以在不知道将离开系统的学生的情况下最优地计算 $M_1$。我们将结果推广到输入中的一些其他可能的修改（学生、空缺职位）。我们还解决了更多阶段的情况，表明只要有 3 个阶段，就无法为所考虑的问题实现竞争性（在线）算法。 研究在线两阶段稳定匹配问题，旨在通过优化初始匹配策略，减少后续因学生退出导致的匹配修改次数。 Evripidis Bampis,Bruno Escoffier,Paul Youssef cs.DS,cs.AI

authors_text: Jingjie Shang,Kunchang Li,Kaibin Tian,Haisheng Su,Yangguang Li
title: MVP: Robust Multi-View Practice for Driving Action Localization
title_zh: MVP：用于驾驶动作本地化的稳健多视图实践
abstract: Distracted driving causes thousands of deaths per year, and how to apply deep-learning methods to prevent these tragedies has become a crucial problem. In Track3 of the 6th AI City Challenge, researchers provide a high-quality video dataset with densely action annotations. Due to the small data scale and unclear action boundary, the dataset presents a unique challenge to precisely localize all the different actions and classify their categories. In this paper, we make good use of the multi-view synchronization among videos, and conduct robust Multi-View Practice (MVP) for driving action localization. To avoid overfitting, we fine-tune SlowFast with Kinetics-700 pre-training as the feature extractor. Then the features of different views are passed to ActionFormer to generate candidate action proposals. For precisely localizing all the actions, we design elaborate post-processing, including model voting, threshold filtering and duplication removal. The results show that our MVP is robust for driving action localization, which achieves 28.49% F1-score in the Track3 test set.
summary: Distracted driving causes thousands of deaths per year, and how to apply deep-learning methods to prevent these tragedies has become a crucial problem. In Track3 of the 6th AI City Challenge, researchers provide a high-quality video dataset with densely action annotations. Due to the small data scale and unclear action boundary, the dataset presents a unique challenge to precisely localize all the different actions and classify their categories. In this paper, we make good use of the multi-view synchronization among videos, and conduct robust Multi-View Practice (MVP) for driving action localization. To avoid overfitting, we fine-tune SlowFast with Kinetics-700 pre-training as the feature extractor. Then the features of different views are passed to ActionFormer to generate candidate action proposals. For precisely localizing all the actions, we design elaborate post-processing, including model voting, threshold filtering and duplication removal. The results show that our MVP is robust for driving action localization, which achieves 28.49% F1-score in the Track3 test set.
abstract_zh: 分心驾驶每年导致数千人死亡，如何应用深度学习方法来预防这些悲剧已成为一个至关重要的问题。在第六届人工智能城市挑战赛的Track3中，研究人员提供了带有密集动作注释的高质量视频数据集。由于数据规模小且动作边界不明确，该数据集提出了精确定位所有不同动作并对其类别进行分类的独特挑战。在本文中，我们充分利用视频之间的多视图同步，并进行鲁棒的多视图实践（MVP）来驱动动作定位。为了避免过度拟合，我们使用 Kinetics-700 预训练作为特征提取器对 SlowFast 进行微调。然后不同视图的特征被传递给ActionFormer以生成候选动作提案。为了精确定位所有动作，我们设计了精细的后处理，包括模型投票、阈值过滤和重复去除。结果表明，我们的 MVP 对于驾驶动作定位具有鲁棒性，在 Track3 测试集中达到了 28.49% 的 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角视频的鲁棒驾驶动作定位方法MVP，通过多视角同步数据和精细后处理实现精确的动作分类与定位。
AI.motivation: 分心驾驶导致大量死亡事故，现有数据集因数据量小和动作边界模糊，难以精准定位和分类驾驶动作，需探索更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 微调Kinetics-700预训练的SlowFast网络提取特征，通过ActionFormer生成候选动作提案，结合模型投票、阈值过滤和去重的后处理策略优化结果。
AI.result: 在AI City Challenge Track3测试集上达到28.49%的F1分数，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MVP方法通过多视角协同与精细后处理，在小规模数据和模糊边界场景下实现了鲁棒的驾驶动作定位。

authors_text: Weihan Cao,Yifan Zhang,Jianfei Gao,Anda Cheng,Ke Cheng,Jian Cheng
title: PKD: General Distillation Framework for Object Detectors via Pearson Correlation Coefficient
title_zh: PKD：通过皮尔逊相关系数的物体检测器通用蒸馏框架
comment: Accepted in NeurIPS 2022
comments: Accepted in NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Knowledge distillation(KD) is a widely-used technique to train compact models in object detection. However, there is still a lack of study on how to distill between heterogeneous detectors. In this paper, we empirically find that better FPN features from a heterogeneous teacher detector can help the student although their detection heads and label assignments are different. However, directly aligning the feature maps to distill detectors suffers from two problems. First, the difference in feature magnitude between the teacher and the student could enforce overly strict constraints on the student. Second, the FPN stages and channels with large feature magnitude from the teacher model could dominate the gradient of distillation loss, which will overwhelm the effects of other features in KD and introduce much noise. To address the above issues, we propose to imitate features with Pearson Correlation Coefficient to focus on the relational information from the teacher and relax constraints on the magnitude of the features. Our method consistently outperforms the existing detection KD methods and works for both homogeneous and heterogeneous student-teacher pairs. Furthermore, it converges faster. With a powerful MaskRCNN-Swin detector as the teacher, ResNet-50 based RetinaNet and FCOS achieve 41.5% and 43.9% mAP on COCO2017, which are 4.1\% and 4.8\% higher than the baseline, respectively.
summary: Knowledge distillation(KD) is a widely-used technique to train compact models in object detection. However, there is still a lack of study on how to distill between heterogeneous detectors. In this paper, we empirically find that better FPN features from a heterogeneous teacher detector can help the student although their detection heads and label assignments are different. However, directly aligning the feature maps to distill detectors suffers from two problems. First, the difference in feature magnitude between the teacher and the student could enforce overly strict constraints on the student. Second, the FPN stages and channels with large feature magnitude from the teacher model could dominate the gradient of distillation loss, which will overwhelm the effects of other features in KD and introduce much noise. To address the above issues, we propose to imitate features with Pearson Correlation Coefficient to focus on the relational information from the teacher and relax constraints on the magnitude of the features. Our method consistently outperforms the existing detection KD methods and works for both homogeneous and heterogeneous student-teacher pairs. Furthermore, it converges faster. With a powerful MaskRCNN-Swin detector as the teacher, ResNet-50 based RetinaNet and FCOS achieve 41.5% and 43.9% mAP on COCO2017, which are 4.1\% and 4.8\% higher than the baseline, respectively.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）是一种广泛使用的技术，用于在目标检测中训练紧凑模型。然而，目前还缺乏关于异质检测器之间如何进行蒸馏的研究。在本文中，我们凭经验发现，尽管学生的检测头和标签分配不同，但来自异构教师检测器的更好的 FPN 特征可以帮助学生。然而，直接将特征图与蒸馏检测器对齐会遇到两个问题。首先，教师和学生之间特征量级的差异可能会对学生施加过于严格的约束。其次，教师模型中具有较大特征量级的 FPN 阶段和通道可能会主导蒸馏损失的梯度，这将压倒 KD 中其他特征的影响并引入大量噪声。为了解决上述问题，我们建议用皮尔逊相关系数来模仿特征，以关注来自教师的关系信息，并放松对特征大小的限制。我们的方法始终优于现有的检测 KD 方法，并且适用于同质和异质的学生-教师对。此外，它收敛得更快。以强大的 MaskRCNN-Swin 检测器为教师，基于 ResNet-50 的 RetinaNet 和 FCOS 在 COCO2017 上实现了 41.5% 和 43.9% 的 mAP，分别比基线高 4.1% 和 4.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PKD框架，通过皮尔逊相关系数进行目标检测器的知识蒸馏，解决异构检测器间的特征对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在异构检测器间存在特征幅值差异导致的约束过严及梯度主导问题，影响蒸馏效果。
AI.method: 采用皮尔逊相关系数捕捉教师模型与学生模型间的特征关系，放松幅值约束并缓解梯度噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在COCO2017数据集上，基于ResNet-50的RetinaNet和FCOS分别达到41.5%和43.9% mAP，较基线提升4.1%和4.8%。
AI.conclusion: PKD方法适用于同构与异构检测器对，收敛速度更快且蒸馏效果优于现有方法。

However, there is still a lack of study on how to distill between heterogeneous detectors. In this paper, we empirically find that better FPN features from a heterogeneous teacher detector can help the student although their detection heads and label assignments are different. However, directly aligning the feature maps to distill detectors suffers from two problems. First, the difference in feature magnitude between the teacher and the student could enforce overly strict constraints on the student. Second, the FPN stages and channels with large feature magnitude from the teacher model could dominate the gradient of distillation loss, which will overwhelm the effects of other features in KD and introduce much noise. To address the above issues, we propose to imitate features with Pearson Correlation Coefficient to focus on the relational information from the teacher and relax constraints on the magnitude of the features. Our method consistently outperforms the existing detection KD methods and works for both homogeneous and heterogeneous student-teacher pairs. Furthermore, it converges faster. authors_text: Tianle Zhang,Wenjie Ruan,Jonathan E. Fieldsend
title: PRoA: A Probabilistic Robustness Assessment against Functional Perturbations
title_zh: PROA：针对功能扰动的概率稳健性评估
comment: The short version of this work will appear in the Proceedings of the 2022 European Conference on Machine Learning and Data Mining (ECML-PKDD 2022)
comments: The short version of this work will appear in the Proceedings of the 2022 European Conference on Machine Learning and Data Mining (ECML-PKDD 2022)
abstract: In safety-critical deep learning applications robustness measurement is a vital pre-deployment phase. However, existing robustness verification methods are not sufficiently practical for deploying machine learning systems in the real world. On the one hand, these methods attempt to claim that no perturbations can ``fool'' deep neural networks (DNNs), which may be too stringent in practice. On the other hand, existing works rigorously consider $L_p$ bounded additive perturbations on the pixel space, although perturbations, such as colour shifting and geometric transformations, are more practically and frequently occurring in the real world. Thus, from the practical standpoint, we present a novel and general {\it probabilistic robustness assessment method} (PRoA) based on the adaptive concentration, and it can measure the robustness of deep learning models against functional perturbations. PRoA can provide statistical guarantees on the probabilistic robustness of a model, \textit{i.e.}, the probability of failure encountered by the trained model after deployment. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of PRoA in terms of evaluating the probabilistic robustness against a broad range of functional perturbations, and PRoA can scale well to various large-scale deep neural networks compared to existing state-of-the-art baselines. For the purpose of reproducibility, we release our tool on GitHub: \url{ https://github.com/TrustAI/PRoA}.
summary: In safety-critical deep learning applications robustness measurement is a vital pre-deployment phase. However, existing robustness verification methods are not sufficiently practical for deploying machine learning systems in the real world. On the one hand, these methods attempt to claim that no perturbations can ``fool'' deep neural networks (DNNs), which may be too stringent in practice. On the other hand, existing works rigorously consider $L_p$ bounded additive perturbations on the pixel space, although perturbations, such as colour shifting and geometric transformations, are more practically and frequently occurring in the real world. Thus, from the practical standpoint, we present a novel and general {\it probabilistic robustness assessment method} (PRoA) based on the adaptive concentration, and it can measure the robustness of deep learning models against functional perturbations. PRoA can provide statistical guarantees on the probabilistic robustness of a model, \textit{i.e.}, the probability of failure encountered by the trained model after deployment. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of PRoA in terms of evaluating the probabilistic robustness against a broad range of functional perturbations, and PRoA can scale well to various large-scale deep neural networks compared to existing state-of-the-art baselines. For the purpose of reproducibility, we release our tool on GitHub: \url{ https://github.com/TrustAI/PRoA}.
abstract_zh: 在安全关键型深度学习应用中，稳健性测量是重要的部署前阶段。然而，现有的鲁棒性验证方法对于在现实世界中部署机器学习系统来说还不够实用。一方面，这些方法试图声称没有任何扰动可以“欺骗”深度神经网络（DNN），这在实践中可能过于严格。另一方面，现有的工作严格考虑像素空间上的$L_p$有界加性扰动，尽管诸如色移和几何变换之类的扰动在现实世界中更实际且更频繁地发生。因此，从实践的角度来看，我们提出了一种基于自适应集中的新颖且通用的概率鲁棒性评估方法（PRoA），它可以衡量深度学习模型对功能扰动的鲁棒性。 PRoA 可以为模型的概率鲁棒性提供统计保证，即训练后的模型在部署后遇到故障的概率。我们的实验证明了 PRoA 在评估针对各种功能扰动的概率稳健性方面的有效性和灵活性，并且与现有最先进的基线相比，PRoA 可以很好地扩展到各种大规模深度神经网络。出于可重复性的目的，我们在 GitHub 上发布了我们的工具：\url{ https://github.com/TrustAI/PRoA}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PRoA的概率鲁棒性评估方法，用于评估深度学习模型在面对功能扰动时的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒性验证方法过于严格或仅考虑像素空间的L_p扰动，无法有效应对现实世界中常见的颜色偏移和几何变换等功能扰动。
AI.method: 基于自适应集中理论，提出概率鲁棒性评估方法PRoA，通过统计保证量化模型部署后的失效概率。
AI.result: 实验表明PRoA在多种功能扰动下具有有效性和灵活性，且能良好扩展至大规模神经网络，优于现有基准方法。
AI.conclusion: PRoA为现实场景下的深度学习模型鲁棒性评估提供了实用且通用的解决方案。

search_text: PRoA: A Probabilistic Robustness Assessment against Functional Perturbations PROA：针对功能扰动的概率稳健性评估 In safety-critical deep learning applications robustness measurement is a vital pre-deployment phase. However, existing robustness verification methods are not sufficiently practical for deploying machine learning systems in the real world. On the one hand, these methods attempt to claim that no perturbations can ``fool'' deep neural networks (DNNs), which may be too stringent in practice. On the other hand, existing works rigorously consider $L_p$ bounded additive perturbations on the pixel space, although perturbations, such as colour shifting and geometric transformations, are more practically and frequently occurring in the real world. Thus, from the practical standpoint, we present a novel and general {\it probabilistic robustness assessment method} (PRoA) based on the adaptive concentration, and it can measure the robustness of deep learning models against functional perturbations. PRoA can provide statistical guarantees on the probabilistic robustness of a model, \textit{i.e.}, the probability of failure encountered by the trained model after deployment. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of PRoA in terms of evaluating the probabilistic robustness against a broad range of functional perturbations, and PRoA can scale well to various large-scale deep neural networks compared to existing state-of-the-art baselines. For the purpose of reproducibility, we release our tool on GitHub: \url{ https://github.com/TrustAI/PRoA}. 在安全关键型深度学习应用中，稳健性测量是重要的部署前阶段。然而，现有的鲁棒性验证方法对于在现实世界中部署机器学习系统来说还不够实用。一方面，这些方法试图声称没有任何扰动可以“欺骗”深度神经网络（DNN），这在实践中可能过于严格。另一方面，现有的工作严格考虑像素空间上的$L_p$有界加性扰动，尽管诸如色移和几何变换之类的扰动在现实世界中更实际且更频繁地发生。因此，从实践的角度来看，我们提出了一种基于自适应集中的新颖且通用的概率鲁棒性评估方法（PRoA），它可以衡量深度学习模型对功能扰动的鲁棒性。 PRoA 可以为模型的概率鲁棒性提供统计保证，即训练后的模型在部署后遇到故障的概率。我们的实验证明了 PRoA 在评估针对各种功能扰动的概率稳健性方面的有效性和灵活性，并且与现有最先进的基线相比，PRoA 可以很好地扩展到各种大规模深度神经网络。出于可重复性的目的，我们在 GitHub 上发布了我们的工具：\url{ https://github.com/TrustAI/PRoA}。 本文提出一种名为PRoA的概率鲁棒性评估方法，用于评估深度学习模型在面对功能扰动时的鲁棒性。 Tianle Zhang,Wenjie Ruan,Jonathan E. authors_text: Zhe Li,Zerong Zheng,Hongwen Zhang,Chaonan Ji,Yebin Liu
title: AvatarCap: Animatable Avatar Conditioned Monocular Human Volumetric Capture
title_zh: AvatarCap：可动画化的头像条件单眼人体体积捕捉
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022, project page: http://www.liuyebin.com/avatarcap/avatarcap.html, code: https://github.com/lizhe00/AvatarCap
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022, project page: http://www.liuyebin.com/avatarcap/avatarcap.html, code: https://github.com/lizhe00/AvatarCap
abstract: To address the ill-posed problem caused by partial observations in monocular human volumetric capture, we present AvatarCap, a novel framework that introduces animatable avatars into the capture pipeline for high-fidelity reconstruction in both visible and invisible regions. Our method firstly creates an animatable avatar for the subject from a small number (~20) of 3D scans as a prior. Then given a monocular RGB video of this subject, our method integrates information from both the image observation and the avatar prior, and accordingly recon-structs high-fidelity 3D textured models with dynamic details regardless of the visibility. To learn an effective avatar for volumetric capture from only few samples, we propose GeoTexAvatar, which leverages both geometry and texture supervisions to constrain the pose-dependent dynamics in a decomposed implicit manner. An avatar-conditioned volumetric capture method that involves a canonical normal fusion and a reconstruction network is further proposed to integrate both image observations and avatar dynamics for high-fidelity reconstruction in both observed and invisible regions. Overall, our method enables monocular human volumetric capture with detailed and pose-dependent dynamics, and the experiments show that our method outperforms state of the art. Code is available at https://github.com/lizhe00/AvatarCap.
summary: To address the ill-posed problem caused by partial observations in monocular human volumetric capture, we present AvatarCap, a novel framework that introduces animatable avatars into the capture pipeline for high-fidelity reconstruction in both visible and invisible regions. Our method firstly creates an animatable avatar for the subject from a small number (~20) of 3D scans as a prior. Then given a monocular RGB video of this subject, our method integrates information from both the image observation and the avatar prior, and accordingly recon-structs high-fidelity 3D textured models with dynamic details regardless of the visibility. To learn an effective avatar for volumetric capture from only few samples, we propose GeoTexAvatar, which leverages both geometry and texture supervisions to constrain the pose-dependent dynamics in a decomposed implicit manner. An avatar-conditioned volumetric capture method that involves a canonical normal fusion and a reconstruction network is further proposed to integrate both image observations and avatar dynamics for high-fidelity reconstruction in both observed and invisible regions. Overall, our method enables monocular human volumetric capture with detailed and pose-dependent dynamics, and the experiments show that our method outperforms state of the art. Code is available at https://github.com/lizhe00/AvatarCap.
abstract_zh: 为了解决单眼人体体积捕捉中部分观察引起的不适定问题，我们提出了 AvatarCap，这是一种新颖的框架，它将可动画的化身引入到捕捉管道中，以在可见和不可见区域进行高保真重建。我们的方法首先根据少量（~20）3D 扫描为主体创建一个可动画化身。然后，给定该主题的单眼 RGB 视频，我们的方法集成了图像观察和头像先验信息，并相应地重建了具有动态细节的高保真 3D 纹理模型，无论可见性如何。为了仅从少数样本中学习用于体积捕获的有效化身，我们提出了 GeoTexAvatar，它利用几何和纹理监督以分解的隐式方式约束与姿势相关的动态。进一步提出了一种涉及规范法线融合和重建网络的阿凡达条件体积捕获方法，以整合图像观察和阿凡达动力学，以在观察到的和不可见的区域中进行高保真重建。总体而言，我们的方法能够以详细且依赖姿势的动力学进行单眼人体体积捕捉，并且实验表明我们的方法优于现有技术。代码可在 https://github.com/lizhe00/AvatarCap 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AvatarCap框架，通过引入可动画的虚拟人偶先验，解决单目视频中人体体积捕捉的局部观测问题，实现可见与不可见区域的高保真重建。
AI.motivation: 单目人体体积捕捉因部分观测导致病态问题，传统方法难以准确重建遮挡区域的动态细节，需通过可学习的先验知识提升重建质量。
AI.method: 基于少量3D扫描生成可动画人偶先验，结合单目视频与人偶动态约束，提出GeoTexAvatar网络联合优化几何与纹理，通过规范法线融合与重建网络实现全视角高保真重建。
AI.result: 实验表明AvatarCap在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法，可生成具有姿态依赖动态细节的高质量人体体积模型，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入可动画人偶先验与多模态约束，AvatarCap有效解决了单目人体捕捉的病态问题，为动态细节重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hongyan Xu,Xiu Su,Dadong Wang
title: CNN-based Local Vision Transformer for COVID-19 Diagnosis
title_zh: 用于 COVID-19 诊断的基于 CNN 的局部视觉转换器
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Deep learning technology can be used as an assistive technology to help doctors quickly and accurately identify COVID-19 infections. Recently, Vision Transformer (ViT) has shown great potential towards image classification due to its global receptive field. However, due to the lack of inductive biases inherent to CNNs, the ViT-based structure leads to limited feature richness and difficulty in model training. In this paper, we propose a new structure called Transformer for COVID-19 (COVT) to improve the performance of ViT-based architectures on small COVID-19 datasets. It uses CNN as a feature extractor to effectively extract local structural information, and introduces average pooling to ViT's Multilayer Perception(MLP) module for global information. Experiments show the effectiveness of our method on the two COVID-19 datasets and the ImageNet dataset.
summary: Deep learning technology can be used as an assistive technology to help doctors quickly and accurately identify COVID-19 infections. Recently, Vision Transformer (ViT) has shown great potential towards image classification due to its global receptive field. However, due to the lack of inductive biases inherent to CNNs, the ViT-based structure leads to limited feature richness and difficulty in model training. In this paper, we propose a new structure called Transformer for COVID-19 (COVT) to improve the performance of ViT-based architectures on small COVID-19 datasets. It uses CNN as a feature extractor to effectively extract local structural information, and introduces average pooling to ViT's Multilayer Perception(MLP) module for global information. Experiments show the effectiveness of our method on the two COVID-19 datasets and the ImageNet dataset.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术可以作为一种辅助技术，帮助医生快速、准确地识别COVID-19感染。最近，视觉变换器（ViT）由于其全局感受野而在图像分类方面显示出巨大的潜力。然而，由于缺乏 CNN 固有的归纳偏差，基于 ViT 的结构导致特征丰富度有限且模型训练困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Transformer for COVID-19 (COVT) 的新结构，以提高基于 ViT 的架构在小型 COVID-19 数据集上的性能。它使用CNN作为特征提取器来有效地提取局部结构信息，并将平均池化引入ViT的多层感知（MLP）模块以获取全局信息。实验证明了我们的方法在两个 COVID-19 数据集和 ImageNet 数据集上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合CNN与Vision Transformer的COVT结构，旨在提升ViT在小规模COVID-19数据集上的诊断性能。
AI.motivation: ViT虽具有全局感受野优势，但缺乏CNN的归纳偏置导致特征表达不足和训练困难，尤其在小数据场景下表现受限。
AI.method: 设计COVT结构：采用CNN提取局部特征，通过平均池化增强ViT MLP模块的全局信息整合能力，实现局部-全局特征融合。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在两个COVID-19数据集和ImageNet数据集上均优于现有ViT结构及经典CNN模型。
AI.conclusion: COVT通过CNN与ViT的优势互补，有效解决了小数据集下的特征表达瓶颈，为医学影像分析提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合CNN与Vision Transformer的COVT结构，旨在提升ViT在小规模COVID-19数据集上的诊断性能。
ai_content.motivation: ViT虽具有全局感受野优势，但缺乏CNN的归纳偏置导致特征表达不足和训练困难，尤其在小数据场景下表现受限。
ai_content.method: 设计COVT结构：采用CNN提取局部特征，通过平均池化增强ViT MLP模块的全局信息整合能力，实现局部-全局特征融合。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法在两个COVID-19数据集和ImageNet数据集上均优于现有ViT结构及经典CNN模型。
ai_content.conclusion: COVT通过CNN与ViT的优势互补，有效解决了小数据集下的特征表达瓶颈，为医学影像分析提供新思路。

search_text: CNN-based Local Vision Transformer for COVID-19 Diagnosis 用于 COVID-19 诊断的基于 CNN 的局部视觉转换器 Deep learning technology can be used as an assistive technology to help doctors quickly and accurately identify COVID-19 infections. Recently, Vision Transformer (ViT) has shown great potential towards image classification due to its global receptive field. However, due to the lack of inductive biases inherent to CNNs, the ViT-based structure leads to limited feature richness and difficulty in model training. In this paper, we propose a new structure called Transformer for COVID-19 (COVT) to improve the performance of ViT-based architectures on small COVID-19 datasets. It uses CNN as a feature extractor to effectively extract local structural information, and introduces average pooling to ViT's Multilayer Perception(MLP) module for global information. Experiments show the effectiveness of our method on the two COVID-19 datasets and the ImageNet dataset. 深度学习技术可以作为一种辅助技术，帮助医生快速、准确地识别COVID-19感染。最近，视觉变换器（ViT）由于其全局感受野而在图像分类方面显示出巨大的潜力。然而，由于缺乏 CNN 固有的归纳偏差，基于 ViT 的结构导致特征丰富度有限且模型训练困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Transformer for COVID-19 (COVT) 的新结构，以提高基于 ViT 的架构在小型 COVID-19 数据集上的性能。它使用CNN作为特征提取器来有效地提取局部结构信息，并将平均池化引入ViT的多层感知（MLP）模块以获取全局信息。实验证明了我们的方法在两个 COVID-19 数据集和 ImageNet 数据集上的有效性。 本文提出一种结合CNN与Vision Transformer的COVT结构，旨在提升ViT在小规模COVID-19数据集上的诊断性能。 Hongyan Xu,Xiu Su,Dadong Wang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Ashish Tiwari,Shanmuganathan Raman
title: DeepPS2: Revisiting Photometric Stereo Using Two Differently Illuminated Images
title_zh: DeepPS2：使用两个不同照明的图像重新审视光度立体
comment: Accepted in ECCV 2022 Project Page: https://sites.google.com/iitgn.ac.in/deepps2/home
comments: Accepted in ECCV 2022 Project Page: https://sites.google.com/iitgn.ac.in/deepps2/home
abstract: Photometric stereo, a problem of recovering 3D surface normals using images of an object captured under different lightings, has been of great interest and importance in computer vision research. Despite the success of existing traditional and deep learning-based methods, it is still challenging due to: (i) the requirement of three or more differently illuminated images, (ii) the inability to model unknown general reflectance, and (iii) the requirement of accurate 3D ground truth surface normals and known lighting information for training. In this work, we attempt to address an under-explored problem of photometric stereo using just two differently illuminated images, referred to as the PS2 problem. It is an intermediate case between a single image-based reconstruction method like Shape from Shading (SfS) and the traditional Photometric Stereo (PS), which requires three or more images. We propose an inverse rendering-based deep learning framework, called DeepPS2, that jointly performs surface normal, albedo, lighting estimation, and image relighting in a completely self-supervised manner with no requirement of ground truth data. We demonstrate how image relighting in conjunction with image reconstruction enhances the lighting estimation in a self-supervised setting.
summary: Photometric stereo, a problem of recovering 3D surface normals using images of an object captured under different lightings, has been of great interest and importance in computer vision research. Despite the success of existing traditional and deep learning-based methods, it is still challenging due to: (i) the requirement of three or more differently illuminated images, (ii) the inability to model unknown general reflectance, and (iii) the requirement of accurate 3D ground truth surface normals and known lighting information for training. In this work, we attempt to address an under-explored problem of photometric stereo using just two differently illuminated images, referred to as the PS2 problem. It is an intermediate case between a single image-based reconstruction method like Shape from Shading (SfS) and the traditional Photometric Stereo (PS), which requires three or more images. We propose an inverse rendering-based deep learning framework, called DeepPS2, that jointly performs surface normal, albedo, lighting estimation, and image relighting in a completely self-supervised manner with no requirement of ground truth data. We demonstrate how image relighting in conjunction with image reconstruction enhances the lighting estimation in a self-supervised setting.
abstract_zh: 光度立体是利用在不同光照下捕获的物体的图像来恢复 3D 表面法线的问题，在计算机视觉研究中一直引起人们的极大兴趣和重要性。尽管现有的传统和基于深度学习的方法取得了成功，但它仍然具有挑战性，因为：(i) 需要三个或更多不同照明的图像，(ii) 无法对未知的一般反射率进行建模，以及 (iii) 需要准确的 3D 地面实况表面法线和已知的照明信息进行训练。在这项工作中，我们尝试仅使用两个不同照明的图像来解决尚未探索的光度立体问题，称为 PS2 问题。它是基于单一图像的重建方法（例如阴影形状 (SfS)）和传统光度立体 (PS) 之间的中间情况，后者需要三个或更多图像。我们提出了一种基于逆向渲染的深度学习框架，称为 DeepPS2，它以完全自我监督的方式联合执行表面法线、反照率、照明估计和图像重新照明，不需要地面实况数据。我们演示了图像重新照明如何与图像重建相结合来增强自我监督设置中的照明估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepPS2框架，通过两幅不同光照图像解决光度立体问题，无需地面真实数据即可联合估计表面法线、反照率和光照。
AI.motivation: 现有光度立体方法需三张以上图像、依赖已知光照和地面真实数据，且难以处理未知反射特性。本文针对仅用两幅图像的PS2问题提出新方案。
AI.method: 基于逆渲染的深度学习框架DeepPS2，在完全自监督下联合完成表面法线、反照率、光照估计及图像重照明，无需标注数据。
AI.result: 实验表明，图像重照明与重建的结合提升了自监督设置下的光照估计效果，有效解决了PS2问题。
AI.conclusion: DeepPS2为光度立体问题提供了新颖的两图像解决方案，克服了传统方法对多图像和地面真实数据的依赖，推动了自监督学习在该领域的应用。

authors_text: Yuan Zhang,Jianhong Wang,Joschka Boedecker
title: Robust Reinforcement Learning in Continuous Control Tasks with Uncertainty Set Regularization
title_zh: 具有不确定性集正则化的连续控制任务中的鲁棒强化学习
comment: Accepted at CoRL 2023
comments: Accepted at CoRL 2023
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is recognized as lacking generalization and robustness under environmental perturbations, which excessively restricts its application for real-world robotics. Prior work claimed that adding regularization to the value function is equivalent to learning a robust policy with uncertain transitions. Although the regularization-robustness transformation is appealing for its simplicity and efficiency, it is still lacking in continuous control tasks. In this paper, we propose a new regularizer named $\textbf{U}$ncertainty $\textbf{S}$et $\textbf{R}$egularizer (USR), by formulating the uncertainty set on the parameter space of the transition function. In particular, USR is flexible enough to be plugged into any existing RL framework. To deal with unknown uncertainty sets, we further propose a novel adversarial approach to generate them based on the value function. We evaluate USR on the Real-world Reinforcement Learning (RWRL) benchmark, demonstrating improvements in the robust performance for perturbed testing environments.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is recognized as lacking generalization and robustness under environmental perturbations, which excessively restricts its application for real-world robotics. Prior work claimed that adding regularization to the value function is equivalent to learning a robust policy with uncertain transitions. Although the regularization-robustness transformation is appealing for its simplicity and efficiency, it is still lacking in continuous control tasks. In this paper, we propose a new regularizer named $\textbf{U}$ncertainty $\textbf{S}$et $\textbf{R}$egularizer (USR), by formulating the uncertainty set on the parameter space of the transition function. In particular, USR is flexible enough to be plugged into any existing RL framework. To deal with unknown uncertainty sets, we further propose a novel adversarial approach to generate them based on the value function. We evaluate USR on the Real-world Reinforcement Learning (RWRL) benchmark, demonstrating improvements in the robust performance for perturbed testing environments.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）被认为在环境扰动下缺乏泛化性和鲁棒性，这过度限制了其在现实世界机器人技术中的应用。之前的工作声称，在价值函数中添加正则化相当于学习具有不确定转变的稳健策略。尽管正则化-鲁棒性变换以其简单性和高效性而引人注目，但它仍然缺乏连续控制任务。在本文中，我们通过制定转移函数参数空间上的不确定性集，提出了一种名为 $\textbf{U}$ncertainty $\textbf{S}$et $\textbf{R}$egularizer (USR) 的新正则化器。特别是，USR 足够灵活，可以插入任何现有的 RL 框架中。为了处理未知的不确定性集，我们进一步提出了一种新颖的对抗方法来基于价值函数生成它们。我们在现实世界强化学习 (RWRL) 基准上评估 USR，展示了在扰动测试环境下稳健性能的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种不确定性集正则化方法（USR），旨在提升连续控制任务中强化学习的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在环境扰动下泛化和鲁棒性不足，限制其在现实机器人中的应用，而传统正则化方法在连续控制任务中效果有限。
AI.method: 提出不确定性集正则化（USR），在转移函数参数空间构建不确定性集，并设计对抗方法生成未知不确定性集，可集成到任意RL框架中。
AI.result: 在RWRL基准测试中，USR在扰动测试环境中表现出更高的鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: USR有效增强了连续控制任务中强化学习的鲁棒性，为实际应用提供了新的解决方案。

In particular, USR is flexible enough to be plugged into any existing RL framework. To deal with unknown uncertainty sets, we further propose a novel adversarial approach to generate them based on the value function. We evaluate USR on the Real-world Reinforcement Learning (RWRL) benchmark, demonstrating improvements in the robust performance for perturbed testing environments. 强化学习（RL）被认为在环境扰动下缺乏泛化性和鲁棒性，这过度限制了其在现实世界机器人技术中的应用。之前的工作声称，在价值函数中添加正则化相当于学习具有不确定转变的稳健策略。尽管正则化-鲁棒性变换以其简单性和高效性而引人注目，但它仍然缺乏连续控制任务。在本文中，我们通过制定转移函数参数空间上的不确定性集，提出了一种名为 $\textbf{U}$ncertainty $\textbf{S}$et $\textbf{R}$egularizer (USR) 的新正则化器。特别是，USR 足够灵活，可以插入任何现有的 RL 框架中。为了处理未知的不确定性集，我们进一步提出了一种新颖的对抗方法来基于价值函数生成它们。我们在现实世界强化学习 (RWRL) 基准上评估 USR，展示了在扰动测试环境下稳健性能的改进。 本文提出了一种不确定性集正则化方法（USR），旨在提升连续控制任务中强化学习的鲁棒性。 Yuan Zhang,Jianhong Wang,Joschka Boedecker cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Jiahao Ma,Zicheng Duan,Liang Zheng,Chuong Nguyen
title: Multiview Detection with Cardboard Human Modeling
title_zh: 使用纸板人体建模进行多视图检测
abstract: Multiview detection uses multiple calibrated cameras with overlapping fields of views to locate occluded pedestrians. In this field, existing methods typically adopt a ``human modeling - aggregation'' strategy. To find robust pedestrian representations, some intuitively incorporate 2D perception results from each frame, while others use entire frame features projected to the ground plane. However, the former does not consider the human appearance and leads to many ambiguities, and the latter suffers from projection errors due to the lack of accurate height of the human torso and head. In this paper, we propose a new pedestrian representation scheme based on human point clouds modeling. Specifically, using ray tracing for holistic human depth estimation, we model pedestrians as upright, thin cardboard point clouds on the ground. Then, we aggregate the point clouds of the pedestrian cardboard across multiple views for a final decision. Compared with existing representations, the proposed method explicitly leverages human appearance and reduces projection errors significantly by relatively accurate height estimation. On four standard evaluation benchmarks, the proposed method achieves very competitive results. Our code and data will be released at https://github.com/ZichengDuan/MvCHM.

abstract_zh: 多视图检测使用多个具有重叠视野的校准摄像机来定位被遮挡的行人。在该领域，现有方法通常采用“人类建模-聚合”策略。为了找到稳健的行人表示，一些人直观地结合了每个帧的 2D 感知结果，而另一些人则使用投影到地平面的整个帧特征。然而，前者没有考虑人体外观，导致许多歧义，而后者则由于缺乏人体躯干和头部的准确高度而存在投影误差。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于人体点云建模的新行人表示方案。具体来说，使用光线追踪进行整体人体深度估计，我们将行人建模为地面上直立的薄纸板点云。然后，我们通过多个视图聚合行人纸板的点云以做出最终决定。与现有的表示相比，所提出的方法明确地利用了人类外观，并通过相对准确的高度估计显着减少了投影误差。在四个标准评估基准上，所提出的方法取得了非常有竞争力的结果。我们的代码和数据将发布在https://github.com/ZihengDuan/MvCHM。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于卡片式人体建模的多视角行人检测方法，以解决遮挡问题并提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用2D感知结果时忽略人体外观导致歧义，或依赖投影时因缺乏准确高度而产生误差，需更精确的表示方式。
AI.method: 采用光线追踪进行人体深度估计，将行人建模为地面上的直立卡片式点云，并聚合多视角点云信息进行决策。
AI.result: 在四个标准基准测试中取得具有竞争力的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过精确的人体外观建模和高度估计，显著减少投影误差，提升多视角行人检测效果。

authors_text: Maria Kaselimi,Eftychios Protopapadakis,Athanasios Voulodimos,Nikolaos Doulamis,Anastasios Doulamis
title: Towards trustworthy Energy Disaggregation: A review of challenges, methods and perspectives for Non-Intrusive Load Monitoring
title_zh: 迈向值得信赖的能源分解：非侵入式负载监控的挑战、方法和观点回顾
abstract: Non-intrusive load monitoring (NILM) is the task of disaggregating the total power consumption into its individual sub-components. Over the years, signal processing and machine learning algorithms have been combined to achieve this. A lot of publications and extensive research works are performed on energy disaggregation or NILM for the state-of-the-art methods to reach on the desirable performance. The initial interest of the scientific community to formulate and describe mathematically the NILM problem using machine learning tools has now shifted into a more practical NILM. Nowadays, we are in the mature NILM period where there is an attempt for NILM to be applied in real-life application scenarios. Thus, complexity of the algorithms, transferability, reliability, practicality and in general trustworthiness are the main issues of interest. This review narrows the gap between the early immature NILM era and the mature one. In particular, the paper provides a comprehensive literature review of the NILM methods for residential appliances only. The paper analyzes, summarizes and presents the outcomes of a large number of recently published scholarly articles. Also, the paper discusses the highlights of these methods and introduces the research dilemmas that should be taken into consideration by researchers to apply NILM methods. Finally, we show the need for transferring the traditional disaggregation models into a practical and trustworthy framework.

abstract_zh: 非侵入式负载监控 (NILM) 的任务是将总功耗分解为各个子组件。多年来，信号处理和机器学习算法相结合来实现这一目标。许多出版物和广泛的研究工作都是针对能量分解或 NILM 进行的，以采用最先进的方法来达到理想的性能。科学界最初的兴趣是使用机器学习工具以数学方式制定和描述 NILM 问题，现在已经转变为更实用的 NILM。如今，我们正处于NILM成熟期，正在尝试将NILM应用于现实应用场景。因此，算法的复杂性、可转移性、可靠性、实用性和总体可信度是人们感兴趣的主要问题。这一评论缩小了早期不成熟的 NILM 时代与成熟时代之间的差距。特别是，本文仅对家用电器的 NILM 方法进行了全面的文献综述。本文对近期发表的大量学术文章的成果进行了分析、总结和呈现。此外，本文还讨论了这些方法的亮点，并介绍了研究人员在应用 NILM 方法时应考虑的研究困境。最后，我们展示了将传统分解模型转变为实用且值得信赖的框架的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了非侵入式负载监测（NILM）在住宅电器中的挑战、方法及未来方向，旨在构建可信赖的能源分解框架。
AI.motivation: 随着NILM从理论研究转向实际应用，需解决算法复杂性、可靠性及实用性等关键问题，以建立可信的能源分解体系。
AI.method: 通过全面回顾近年来关于住宅电器NILM的学术文献，分析总结现有方法的优缺点及研究难点。
AI.result: 系统梳理了NILM技术的发展脉络，明确了当前研究在模型迁移、可靠性及实际部署中的核心挑战。
AI.conclusion: 未来需将传统分解模型转化为兼顾实用性与可信度的框架，以推动NILM在现实场景中的落地应用。

authors_text: Mingyu Kim,Jihwan Oh,Yongsik Lee,Joonkee Kim,Seonghwan Kim,Song Chong,Se-Young Yun
title: The StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenges+ : Learning of Multi-Stage Tasks and Environmental Factors without Precise Reward Functions
title_zh: 星际争霸多智能体挑战+：在没有精确奖励函数的情况下学习多阶段任务和环境因素
comment: ICML Workshop: AI for Agent Based Modeling 2022 Spotlight
comments: ICML Workshop: AI for Agent Based Modeling 2022 Spotlight
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel benchmark called the StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenges+, where agents learn to perform multi-stage tasks and to use environmental factors without precise reward functions. The previous challenges (SMAC) recognized as a standard benchmark of Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning are mainly concerned with ensuring that all agents cooperatively eliminate approaching adversaries only through fine manipulation with obvious reward functions. This challenge, on the other hand, is interested in the exploration capability of MARL algorithms to efficiently learn implicit multi-stage tasks and environmental factors as well as micro-control. This study covers both offensive and defensive scenarios. In the offensive scenarios, agents must learn to first find opponents and then eliminate them. The defensive scenarios require agents to use topographic features. For example, agents need to position themselves behind protective structures to make it harder for enemies to attack. We investigate MARL algorithms under SMAC+ and observe that recent approaches work well in similar settings to the previous challenges, but misbehave in offensive scenarios. Additionally, we observe that an enhanced exploration approach has a positive effect on performance but is not able to completely solve all scenarios. This study proposes new directions for future research.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel benchmark called the StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenges+, where agents learn to perform multi-stage tasks and to use environmental factors without precise reward functions. The previous challenges (SMAC) recognized as a standard benchmark of Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning are mainly concerned with ensuring that all agents cooperatively eliminate approaching adversaries only through fine manipulation with obvious reward functions. This challenge, on the other hand, is interested in the exploration capability of MARL algorithms to efficiently learn implicit multi-stage tasks and environmental factors as well as micro-control. This study covers both offensive and defensive scenarios. In the offensive scenarios, agents must learn to first find opponents and then eliminate them. We investigate MARL algorithms under SMAC+ and observe that recent approaches work well in similar settings to the previous challenges, but misbehave in offensive scenarios. Additionally, we observe that an enhanced exploration approach has a positive effect on performance but is not able to completely solve all scenarios. This study proposes new directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个名为“星际争霸多智能体挑战+”的新颖基准，其中智能体学习执行多阶段任务并使用环境因素，而无需精确的奖励函数。之前的挑战（SMAC）被认为是多智能体强化学习的标准基准，主要涉及确保所有智能体只能通过具有明显奖励函数的精细操作来合作消除接近的对手。另一方面，这一挑战对 MARL 算法的探索能力感兴趣，以有效学习隐式多阶段任务和环境因素以及微控制。这项研究涵盖了进攻和防守场景。在进攻场景中，智能体必须学会首先找到对手，然后消灭他们。防御场景要求代理使用地形特征。例如，特工需要将自己置于保护结构后面，以使敌人更难攻击。我们研究了 SMAC+ 下的 MARL 算法，并观察到最近的方法在与之前的挑战类似的环境中运行良好，但在攻击场景中表现不佳。此外，我们观察到增强的探索方法对性能有积极影响，但无法完全解决所有场景。这项研究为未来的研究提出了新的方向。

AI.tldr: 提出新的StarCraft多智能体挑战（SMAC+），研究在无精确奖励函数条件下多智能体强化学习对多阶段任务和环境因素的学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有SMAC基准仅关注明确奖励函数下的对抗场景，缺乏对隐式任务结构和环境因素利用能力的评估，需设计更复杂场景推动算法发展。
AI.method: 构建包含进攻（目标搜寻-消灭）与防守（地形利用）场景的SMAC+基准，通过对比实验分析现有MARL算法在隐式任务学习中的表现差异。
AI.result: 现有算法在防守场景表现稳定但在进攻场景失效，增强探索机制可提升性能但无法完全解决所有任务类型。
AI.conclusion: 需开发新型探索策略以应对多阶段隐式任务学习，未来研究应关注环境因素利用与任务结构发现的协同机制。

search_text: The StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenges+ : Learning of Multi-Stage Tasks and Environmental Factors without Precise Reward Functions 星际争霸多智能体挑战+：在没有精确奖励函数的情况下学习多阶段任务和环境因素 In this paper, we propose a novel benchmark called the StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenges+, where agents learn to perform multi-stage tasks and to use environmental factors without precise reward functions. The previous challenges (SMAC) recognized as a standard benchmark of Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning are mainly concerned with ensuring that all agents cooperatively eliminate approaching adversaries only through fine manipulation with obvious reward functions. This challenge, on the other hand, is interested in the exploration capability of MARL algorithms to efficiently learn implicit multi-stage tasks and environmental factors as well as micro-control. This study covers both offensive and defensive scenarios. In the offensive scenarios, agents must learn to first find opponents and then eliminate them. The defensive scenarios require agents to use topographic features. For example, agents need to position themselves behind protective structures to make it harder for enemies to attack. We investigate MARL algorithms under SMAC+ and observe that recent approaches work well in similar settings to the previous challenges, but misbehave in offensive scenarios. Additionally, we observe that an enhanced exploration approach has a positive effect on performance but is not able to completely solve all scenarios. This study proposes new directions for future research. 在本文中，我们提出了一个名为“星际争霸多智能体挑战+”的新颖基准，其中智能体学习执行多阶段任务并使用环境因素，而无需精确的奖励函数。之前的挑战（SMAC）被认为是多智能体强化学习的标准基准，主要涉及确保所有智能体只能通过具有明显奖励函数的精细操作来合作消除接近的对手。另一方面，这一挑战对 MARL 算法的探索能力感兴趣，以有效学习隐式多阶段任务和环境因素以及微控制。这项研究涵盖了进攻和防守场景。在进攻场景中，智能体必须学会首先找到对手，然后消灭他们。防御场景要求代理使用地形特征。例如，特工需要将自己置于保护结构后面，以使敌人更难攻击。我们研究了 SMAC+ 下的 MARL 算法，并观察到最近的方法在与之前的挑战类似的环境中运行良好，但在攻击场景中表现不佳。此外，我们观察到增强的探索方法对性能有积极影响，但无法完全解决所有场景。这项研究为未来的研究提出了新的方向。 提出新的StarCraft多智能体挑战（SMAC+），研究在无精确奖励函数条件下多智能体强化学习对多阶段任务和环境因素的学习能力。 Mingyu Kim,Jihwan Oh,Yongsik Lee,Joonkee Kim,Seonghwan Kim,Song Chong,Se-Young Yun cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Mikhail Cherniavskii,Boris Goldengorin
title: An almost linear time complexity algorithm for the Tool Loading Problem
title_zh: 工具加载问题的几乎线性时间复杂度算法
comment: Full version of the paper submitted to International Symposium on Algorithmics of Wireless Networks
comments: Full version of the paper submitted to International Symposium on Algorithmics of Wireless Networks
abstract: As shown by Tang, Denardo [9] the job Sequencing and tool Switching Problem (SSP) can be decomposed into the following two problems. Firstly, the Tool Loading Problem (TLP) - for a given sequence of jobs, find an optimal sequence of magazine states that minimizes the total number of tool switches. Secondly, the Job Sequencing Problem (JeSP) - find a sequence of jobs minimizing the total number of tool switches. Published in 1988, the well known Keep Tool Needed Soonest (KTNS) algorithm for solving the TLP has time complexity $O(mn)$. Here $m$ is the total number of tools necessary to complete all $n$ sequenced jobs on a single machine. A tool switch is needed since the tools required to complete all jobs cannot fit in the magazine, whose capacity $C < m$. We hereby propose a new Greedy Pipe Construction Algorithm (GPCA) with time complexity $O(Cn)$. Our new algorithm outperforms KTNS algorithm on large-scale datasets by at least an order of magnitude in terms of CPU times.
summary: As shown by Tang, Denardo [9] the job Sequencing and tool Switching Problem (SSP) can be decomposed into the following two problems. Firstly, the Tool Loading Problem (TLP) - for a given sequence of jobs, find an optimal sequence of magazine states that minimizes the total number of tool switches. Secondly, the Job Sequencing Problem (JeSP) - find a sequence of jobs minimizing the total number of tool switches. Published in 1988, the well known Keep Tool Needed Soonest (KTNS) algorithm for solving the TLP has time complexity $O(mn)$. Here $m$ is the total number of tools necessary to complete all $n$ sequenced jobs on a single machine. A tool switch is needed since the tools required to complete all jobs cannot fit in the magazine, whose capacity $C < m$. We hereby propose a new Greedy Pipe Construction Algorithm (GPCA) with time complexity $O(Cn)$. Our new algorithm outperforms KTNS algorithm on large-scale datasets by at least an order of magnitude in terms of CPU times.
abstract_zh: 正如 Tang，Denardo [9] 所示，作业排序和工具切换问题（SSP）可以分解为以下两个问题。首先，刀具装载问题 (TLP) - 对于给定的作业序列，找到刀库状态的最佳序列，以最大限度地减少刀具切换的总数。其次，作业排序问题（JeSP） - 找到最小化工具切换总数的作业序列。著名的 Keep Tool Needed Soonest (KTNS) 算法于 1988 年发布，用于求解 TLP，其时间复杂度为 $O(mn)$。这里 $m$ 是在一台机器上完成所有 $n$ 个有序作业所需的工具总数。由于完成所有作业所需的刀具无法放入容量 $C < m$ 的刀库中，因此需要刀具切换。我们在此提出一种新的贪婪管道构造算法（GPCA），时间复杂度为 $O(Cn)$。我们的新算法在大规模数据集上的 CPU 时间比 KTNS 算法至少高出一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时间复杂度接近线性的贪心管道构建算法（GPCA），用于解决工具加载问题（TLP），以优化工具切换次数。
AI.motivation: 现有KTNS算法时间复杂度为O(mn)，在大规模数据集上效率不足，需开发更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计贪心管道构建算法（GPCA），通过优先选择近期所需工具的策略，将时间复杂度降低至O(Cn)。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集上，GPCA的CPU时间比KTNS算法快至少一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: GPCA在保持最优解的同时显著提升计算效率，适用于大规模工具加载问题场景。

authors_text: Enzo Tartaglione,Francesca Gennari,Marco Grangetto
title: Disentangling private classes through regularization
title_zh: 通过正规化解开私人课程的束缚
abstract: Deep learning models are nowadays broadly deployed to solve an incredibly large variety of tasks. However, little attention has been devoted to connected legal aspects. In 2016, the European Union approved the General Data Protection Regulation which entered into force in 2018. Its main rationale was to protect the privacy and data protection of its citizens by the way of operating of the so-called "Data Economy". As data is the fuel of modern Artificial Intelligence, it is argued that the GDPR can be partly applicable to a series of algorithmic decision making tasks before a more structured AI Regulation enters into force. In the meantime, AI should not allow undesired information leakage deviating from the purpose for which is created. In this work we propose DisP, an approach for deep learning models disentangling the information related to some classes we desire to keep private, from the data processed by AI. In particular, DisP is a regularization strategy de-correlating the features belonging to the same private class at training time, hiding the information of private classes membership. Our experiments on state-of-the-art deep learning models show the effectiveness of DisP, minimizing the risk of extraction for the classes we desire to keep private.
summary: Deep learning models are nowadays broadly deployed to solve an incredibly large variety of tasks. However, little attention has been devoted to connected legal aspects. In 2016, the European Union approved the General Data Protection Regulation which entered into force in 2018. Its main rationale was to protect the privacy and data protection of its citizens by the way of operating of the so-called "Data Economy". As data is the fuel of modern Artificial Intelligence, it is argued that the GDPR can be partly applicable to a series of algorithmic decision making tasks before a more structured AI Regulation enters into force. In the meantime, AI should not allow undesired information leakage deviating from the purpose for which is created. In this work we propose DisP, an approach for deep learning models disentangling the information related to some classes we desire to keep private, from the data processed by AI. In particular, DisP is a regularization strategy de-correlating the features belonging to the same private class at training time, hiding the information of private classes membership. Our experiments on state-of-the-art deep learning models show the effectiveness of DisP, minimizing the risk of extraction for the classes we desire to keep private.
abstract_zh: 如今，深度学习模型被广泛部署来解决种类繁多的任务。然而，很少有人关注相关的法律方面。 2016年，欧盟批准了《通用数据保护条例》，并于2018年生效。其主要理由是通过所谓“数据经济”的运作方式来保护其公民的隐私和数据。由于数据是现代人工智能的燃料，因此有人认为，在更加结构化的人工智能法规生效之前，GDPR 可以部分适用于一系列算法决策任务。与此同时，人工智能不应允许偏离其创建目的的不良信息泄露。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DisP，一种深度学习模型的方法，将与我们希望保密的某些类别相关的信息与人工智能处理的数据分开。特别是，DisP 是一种正则化策略，在训练时对属于同一私有类的特征进行去相关，隐藏私有类成员资格的信息。我们对最先进的深度学习模型的实验表明了 DisP 的有效性，最大限度地降低了我们希望保密的类被提取的风险。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DisP的正则化方法，用于在深度学习模型中分离并隐藏特定私有类别的信息，以符合数据隐私保护法规。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习的广泛应用，数据隐私问题日益突出。欧盟《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）要求保护公民隐私，避免算法决策中泄露敏感信息，因此需要在AI模型中实现私有类别的信息隔离。
AI.method: DisP通过在训练过程中对属于同一私有类别的特征进行去相关正则化，隐藏模型对这些类别的敏感信息，从而实现信息分离。
AI.result: 实验表明，DisP能有效降低私有类别的信息泄露风险，在主流深度学习模型中表现出良好的隐私保护效果。
AI.conclusion: DisP为在AI系统中实现隐私保护提供了可行方案，有助于在全面AI法规出台前满足GDPR等隐私合规要求。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，DisP能有效降低私有类别的信息泄露风险，在主流深度学习模型中表现出良好的隐私保护效果。
ai_content_json.conclusion: DisP为在AI系统中实现隐私保护提供了可行方案，有助于在全面AI法规出台前满足GDPR等隐私合规要求。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DisP的正则化方法，用于在深度学习模型中分离并隐藏特定私有类别的信息，以符合数据隐私保护法规。
motivation: 随着深度学习的广泛应用，数据隐私问题日益突出。欧盟《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）要求保护公民隐私，避免算法决策中泄露敏感信息，因此需要在AI模型中实现私有类别的信息隔离。
method: DisP通过在训练过程中对属于同一私有类别的特征进行去相关正则化，隐藏模型对这些类别的敏感信息，从而实现信息分离。
result: 实验表明，DisP能有效降低私有类别的信息泄露风险，在主流深度学习模型中表现出良好的隐私保护效果。
conclusion: DisP为在AI系统中实现隐私保护提供了可行方案，有助于在全面AI法规出台前满足GDPR等隐私合规要求。
search_text: Disentangling private classes through regularization 通过正规化解开私人课程的束缚 Deep learning models are nowadays broadly deployed to solve an incredibly large variety of tasks. However, little attention has been devoted to connected legal aspects. In 2016, the European Union approved the General Data Protection Regulation which entered into force in 2018. Its main rationale was to protect the privacy and data protection of its citizens by the way of operating of the so-called "Data Economy". As data is the fuel of modern Artificial Intelligence, it is argued that the GDPR can be partly applicable to a series of algorithmic decision making tasks before a more structured AI Regulation enters into force. In the meantime, AI should not allow undesired information leakage deviating from the purpose for which is created. In this work we propose DisP, an approach for deep learning models disentangling the information related to some classes we desire to keep private, from the data processed by AI. In particular, DisP is a regularization strategy de-correlating the features belonging to the same private class at training time, hiding the information of private classes membership. Our experiments on state-of-the-art deep learning models show the effectiveness of DisP, minimizing the risk of extraction for the classes we desire to keep private. 如今，深度学习模型被广泛部署来解决种类繁多的任务。然而，很少有人关注相关的法律方面。 2016年，欧盟批准了《通用数据保护条例》，并于2018年生效。其主要理由是通过所谓“数据经济”的运作方式来保护其公民的隐私和数据。由于数据是现代人工智能的燃料，因此有人认为，在更加结构化的人工智能法规生效之前，GDPR 可以部分适用于一系列算法决策任务。与此同时，人工智能不应允许偏离其创建目的的不良信息泄露。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DisP，一种深度学习模型的方法，将与我们希望保密的某些类别相关的信息与人工智能处理的数据分开。特别是，DisP 是一种正则化策略，在训练时对属于同一私有类的特征进行去相关，隐藏私有类成员资格的信息。我们对最先进的深度学习模型的实验表明了 DisP 的有效性，最大限度地降低了我们希望保密的类被提取的风险。 本文提出了一种名为DisP的正则化方法，用于在深度学习模型中分离并隐藏特定私有类别的信息，以符合数据隐私保护法规。 Enzo Tartaglione,Francesca Gennari,Marco Grangetto cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Robert van Wijk,Andrea Michelle Rios Lazcano,Xabier Carrera Akutain,Barys Shyrokau
title: Data-driven Steering Torque Behaviour Modelling with Hidden Markov Models
title_zh: 使用隐马尔可夫模型的数据驱动转向扭矩行为建模
comment: submitted to IFAC HMM 2022
comments: submitted to IFAC HMM 2022
abstract: Modern Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) are limited in their ability to consider the drivers intention, resulting in unnatural guidance and low customer acceptance. In this research, we focus on a novel data-driven approach to predict driver steering torque. In particular, driver behavior is modeled by learning the parameters of a Hidden Markov Model (HMM) and estimation is performed with Gaussian Mixture Regression (GMR). An extensive parameter selection framework enables us to objectively select the model hyper-parameters and prevents overfitting. The final model behavior is optimized with a cost function balancing between accuracy and smoothness. Naturalistic driving data covering seven participants is obtained using a static driving simulator at Toyota Motor Europe for the training, evaluation, and testing of the proposed model. The results demonstrate that our approach achieved a 92% steering torque accuracy with a 37% increase in signal smoothness and 90% fewer data compared to a baseline. In addition, our model captures the complex and nonlinear human behavior and inter-driver variability from novice to expert drivers, showing an interesting potential to become a steering performance predictor in future user-oriented ADAS.
summary: Modern Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) are limited in their ability to consider the drivers intention, resulting in unnatural guidance and low customer acceptance. In this research, we focus on a novel data-driven approach to predict driver steering torque. In particular, driver behavior is modeled by learning the parameters of a Hidden Markov Model (HMM) and estimation is performed with Gaussian Mixture Regression (GMR). An extensive parameter selection framework enables us to objectively select the model hyper-parameters and prevents overfitting. The final model behavior is optimized with a cost function balancing between accuracy and smoothness. Naturalistic driving data covering seven participants is obtained using a static driving simulator at Toyota Motor Europe for the training, evaluation, and testing of the proposed model. The results demonstrate that our approach achieved a 92% steering torque accuracy with a 37% increase in signal smoothness and 90% fewer data compared to a baseline. In addition, our model captures the complex and nonlinear human behavior and inter-driver variability from novice to expert drivers, showing an interesting potential to become a steering performance predictor in future user-oriented ADAS.
abstract_zh: 现代高级驾驶员辅助系统 (ADAS) 考虑驾驶员意图的能力有限，导致引导不自然且客户接受度低。在这项研究中，我们专注于一种新颖的数据驱动方法来预测驾驶员转向扭矩。特别是，通过学习隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）的参数来对驾驶员行为进行建模，并使用高斯混合回归（GMR）进行估计。广泛的参数选择框架使我们能够客观地选择模型超参数并防止过度拟合。最终模型行为通过精确度和平滑度之间的成本函数平衡进行优化。使用丰田汽车欧洲公司的静态驾驶模拟器获得涵盖七名参与者的自然驾驶数据，用于训练、评估和测试所提出的模型。结果表明，与基线相比，我们的方法实现了 92% 的转向扭矩精度，信号平滑度提高了 37%，数据减少了 90%。此外，我们的模型捕捉了复杂且非线性的人类行为以及从新手到专家驾驶员的驾驶员之间的差异，显示出成为未来面向用户的 ADAS 中转向性能预测器的有趣潜力。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于数据驱动的隐藏马尔可夫模型（HMM）和高斯混合回归（GMR）的转向扭矩行为预测方法，以提升ADAS系统的驾驶员意图识别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有ADAS系统难以准确捕捉驾驶员意图，导致辅助引导不自然且用户接受度低，需更精准的模型提升系统适应性。
AI.method: 采用HMM建模驾驶员行为，结合GMR进行估计，通过参数选择框架优化模型，利用成本函数平衡准确性与平滑度。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到92%的转向扭矩准确率，信号平滑度提升37%，数据量减少90%，并有效捕捉复杂人类行为及不同驾驶水平的差异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了ADAS对驾驶员意图的预测能力，为个性化驾驶辅助系统提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Nikolaos Mylonas,Ioannis Mollas,Nick Bassiliades,Grigorios Tsoumakas
title: Local Multi-Label Explanations for Random Forest
title_zh: 随机森林的局部多标签解释
comment: 11 pages, 1 figues, 8 tables, submitted to XKDD (workshop of ECML PKDD 2022)
comments: 11 pages, 1 figues, 8 tables, submitted to XKDD (workshop of ECML PKDD 2022)
abstract: Multi-label classification is a challenging task, particularly in domains where the number of labels to be predicted is large. Deep neural networks are often effective at multi-label classification of images and textual data. When dealing with tabular data, however, conventional machine learning algorithms, such as tree ensembles, appear to outperform competition. Random forest, being a popular ensemble algorithm, has found use in a wide range of real-world problems. Such problems include fraud detection in the financial domain, crime hotspot detection in the legal sector, and in the biomedical field, disease probability prediction when patient records are accessible. Since they have an impact on people's lives, these domains usually require decision-making systems to be explainable. Random Forest falls short on this property, especially when a large number of tree predictors are used. This issue was addressed in a recent research named LionForests, regarding single label classification and regression. In this work, we adapt this technique to multi-label classification problems, by employing three different strategies regarding the labels that the explanation covers. Finally, we provide a set of qualitative and quantitative experiments to assess the efficacy of this approach.
summary: Multi-label classification is a challenging task, particularly in domains where the number of labels to be predicted is large. Deep neural networks are often effective at multi-label classification of images and textual data. When dealing with tabular data, however, conventional machine learning algorithms, such as tree ensembles, appear to outperform competition. Random forest, being a popular ensemble algorithm, has found use in a wide range of real-world problems. Such problems include fraud detection in the financial domain, crime hotspot detection in the legal sector, and in the biomedical field, disease probability prediction when patient records are accessible. Since they have an impact on people's lives, these domains usually require decision-making systems to be explainable. Random Forest falls short on this property, especially when a large number of tree predictors are used. This issue was addressed in a recent research named LionForests, regarding single label classification and regression. In this work, we adapt this technique to multi-label classification problems, by employing three different strategies regarding the labels that the explanation covers. Finally, we provide a set of qualitative and quantitative experiments to assess the efficacy of this approach.
abstract_zh: 多标签分类是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是在要预测的标签数量很大的领域。深度神经网络通常可以有效地对图像和文本数据进行多标签分类。然而，在处理表格数据时，传统的机器学习算法（例如树集成）似乎优于竞争对手。随机森林是一种流行的集成算法，已广泛应用于现实世界的问题中。此类问题包括金融领域的欺诈检测、法律领域的犯罪热点检测以及生物医学领域的可访问患者记录时的疾病概率预测。由于它们对人们的生活产生影响，因此这些领域通常要求决策系统是可解释的。随机森林在这一特性上存在不足，尤其是在使用大量树预测器时。最近一项名为 LionForests 的研究解决了这个问题，该研究涉及单标签分类和回归。在这项工作中，我们通过针对解释所涵盖的标签采用三种不同的策略，将该技术应用于多标签分类问题。最后，我们提供了一组定性和定量实验来评估这种方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对随机森林模型的多标签分类局部解释方法，通过三种标签覆盖策略提升模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 随机森林在金融、法律、生物医学等领域广泛应用，但其可解释性不足，尤其在多标签分类场景下缺乏有效解释方法。
AI.method: 基于LionForests技术框架，设计三种标签覆盖策略（如独立标签、相关标签组、全局标签集）生成局部解释。
AI.result: 定性实验验证了解释的合理性，定量实验表明方法在多个基准数据集上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多标签随机森林模型提供了有效的局部解释方案，有助于提升模型在关键领域的可信任度和可解释性。
