This issue was addressed in a recent research named LionForests, regarding single label classification and regression. In this work, we adapt this technique to multi-label classification problems, by employing three different strategies regarding the labels that the explanation covers. Finally, we provide a set of qualitative and quantitative experiments to assess the efficacy of this approach. 多标签分类是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是在要预测的标签数量很大的领域。深度神经网络通常可以有效地对图像和文本数据进行多标签分类。然而，在处理表格数据时，传统的机器学习算法（例如树集成）似乎优于竞争对手。随机森林是一种流行的集成算法，已广泛应用于现实世界的问题中。此类问题包括金融领域的欺诈检测、法律领域的犯罪热点检测以及生物医学领域的可访问患者记录时的疾病概率预测。由于它们对人们的生活产生影响，因此这些领域通常要求决策系统是可解释的。随机森林在这一特性上存在不足，尤其是在使用大量树预测器时。最近一项名为 LionForests 的研究解决了这个问题，该研究涉及单标签分类和回归。在这项工作中，我们通过针对解释所涵盖的标签采用三种不同的策略，将该技术应用于多标签分类问题。最后，我们提供了一组定性和定量实验来评估这种方法的有效性。 本文提出针对随机森林模型的多标签分类局部解释方法，通过三种标签覆盖策略提升模型可解释性。 Nikolaos Mylonas,Ioannis Mollas,Nick Bassiliades,Grigorios Tsoumakas cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yashvardhan Didwania,Jayakrishnan Nair,N. Hemachandra
title: Unsupervised Crowdsourcing with Accuracy and Cost Guarantees
title_zh: 无监督众包，具有准确性和成本保证
comment: To be presented at WiOpt 2022
comments: To be presented at WiOpt 2022
abstract: We consider the problem of cost-optimal utilization of a crowdsourcing platform for binary, unsupervised classification of a collection of items, given a prescribed error threshold. Workers on the crowdsourcing platform are assumed to be divided into multiple classes, based on their skill, experience, and/or past performance. We model each worker class via an unknown confusion matrix, and a (known) price to be paid per label prediction. For this setting, we propose algorithms for acquiring label predictions from workers, and for inferring the true labels of items. We prove that if the number of (unlabeled) items available is large enough, our algorithms satisfy the prescribed error thresholds, incurring a cost that is near-optimal. Finally, we validate our algorithms, and some heuristics inspired by them, through an extensive case study.
summary: We consider the problem of cost-optimal utilization of a crowdsourcing platform for binary, unsupervised classification of a collection of items, given a prescribed error threshold. Workers on the crowdsourcing platform are assumed to be divided into multiple classes, based on their skill, experience, and/or past performance. We model each worker class via an unknown confusion matrix, and a (known) price to be paid per label prediction. For this setting, we propose algorithms for acquiring label predictions from workers, and for inferring the true labels of items. We prove that if the number of (unlabeled) items available is large enough, our algorithms satisfy the prescribed error thresholds, incurring a cost that is near-optimal. Finally, we validate our algorithms, and some heuristics inspired by them, through an extensive case study.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在给定规定的错误阈值的情况下，以成本最优的方式利用众包平台对项目集合进行二元、无监督分类的问题。众包平台上的工作人员被假定根据他们的技能、经验和/或过去的表现分为多个类别。我们通过未知的混淆矩阵和每个标签预测要支付的（已知）价格来对每个工人类别进行建模。对于这种设置，我们提出了从工作人员那里获取标签预测并推断项目的真实标签的算法。我们证明，如果可用的（未标记的）项目数量足够大，我们的算法满足规定的错误阈值，从而产生接近最优的成本。最后，我们通过广泛的案例研究来验证我们的算法以及受其启发的一些启发式方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在保证分类准确率的前提下，通过众包平台以最低成本完成二分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有众包分类方法难以同时满足误差阈值约束和成本优化需求，且未充分考虑工人能力差异对结果的影响。
AI.method: 建立工人能力混淆矩阵模型，设计标签获取算法与真值推断算法，通过理论证明在样本量充足时可满足误差约束并接近最优成本。
AI.result: 算法在保证误差阈值的同时实现近似最优成本，案例研究验证了方法有效性及启发式策略的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为无监督众包分类提供了兼顾准确性与成本控制的理论框架和实践方案。

authors_text: Yuheng Lu,Chenfeng Xu,Xiaobao Wei,Xiaodong Xie,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Kurt Keutzer,Shanghang Zhang
title: Open-Vocabulary 3D Detection via Image-level Class and Debiased Cross-modal Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过图像级分类和去偏跨模态对比学习进行开放词汇 3D 检测
abstract: Current point-cloud detection methods have difficulty detecting the open-vocabulary objects in the real world, due to their limited generalization capability. Moreover, it is extremely laborious and expensive to collect and fully annotate a point-cloud detection dataset with numerous classes of objects, leading to the limited classes of existing point-cloud datasets and hindering the model to learn general representations to achieve open-vocabulary point-cloud detection. As far as we know, we are the first to study the problem of open-vocabulary 3D point-cloud detection. Instead of seeking a point-cloud dataset with full labels, we resort to ImageNet1K to broaden the vocabulary of the point-cloud detector. We propose OV-3DETIC, an Open-Vocabulary 3D DETector using Image-level Class supervision. Specifically, we take advantage of two modalities, the image modality for recognition and the point-cloud modality for localization, to generate pseudo labels for unseen classes. Then we propose a novel debiased cross-modal contrastive learning method to transfer the knowledge from image modality to point-cloud modality during training. Without hurting the latency during inference, OV-3DETIC makes the point-cloud detector capable of achieving open-vocabulary detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed OV-3DETIC achieves at least 10.77 % mAP improvement (absolute value) and 9.56 % mAP improvement (absolute value) by a wide range of baselines on the SUN-RGBD dataset and ScanNet dataset, respectively. Besides, we conduct sufficient experiments to shed light on why the proposed OV-3DETIC works.
summary: Current point-cloud detection methods have difficulty detecting the open-vocabulary objects in the real world, due to their limited generalization capability. Moreover, it is extremely laborious and expensive to collect and fully annotate a point-cloud detection dataset with numerous classes of objects, leading to the limited classes of existing point-cloud datasets and hindering the model to learn general representations to achieve open-vocabulary point-cloud detection. As far as we know, we are the first to study the problem of open-vocabulary 3D point-cloud detection. Instead of seeking a point-cloud dataset with full labels, we resort to ImageNet1K to broaden the vocabulary of the point-cloud detector. We propose OV-3DETIC, an Open-Vocabulary 3D DETector using Image-level Class supervision. Specifically, we take advantage of two modalities, the image modality for recognition and the point-cloud modality for localization, to generate pseudo labels for unseen classes. Then we propose a novel debiased cross-modal contrastive learning method to transfer the knowledge from image modality to point-cloud modality during training. Without hurting the latency during inference, OV-3DETIC makes the point-cloud detector capable of achieving open-vocabulary detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed OV-3DETIC achieves at least 10.77 % mAP improvement (absolute value) and 9.56 % mAP improvement (absolute value) by a wide range of baselines on the SUN-RGBD dataset and ScanNet dataset, respectively. Besides, we conduct sufficient experiments to shed light on why the proposed OV-3DETIC works.
abstract_zh: 当前的点云检测方法由于泛化能力有限，难以检测现实世界中的开放词汇对象。此外，收集和完全注释具有众多对象类别的点云检测数据集是极其费力和昂贵的，导致现有点云数据集的类别有限，并阻碍模型学习通用表示以实现开放词汇点云检测。据我们所知，我们是第一个研究开放词汇3D点云检测问题的人。我们没有寻求具有完整标签的点云数据集，而是借助 ImageNet1K 来扩大点云检测器的词汇量。我们提出了 OV-3DETIC，一种使用图像级类监督的开放词汇 3D 检测器。具体来说，我们利用两种模式，即用于识别的图像模式和用于定位的点云模式，为看不见的类生成伪标签。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的去偏跨模态对比学习方法，在训练过程中将知识从图像模态转移到点云模态。在不影响推理期间延迟的情况下，OV-3DETIC 使点云检测器能够实现开放词汇检测。大量实验表明，所提出的 OV-3DETIC 在 SUN-RGBD 数据集和 ScanNet 数据集上的各种基线上分别实现了至少 10.77% mAP 改进（绝对值）和 9.56% mAP 改进（绝对值）。此外，我们进行了足够的实验来阐明所提出的 OV-3DETIC 为何有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像级类别监督和去偏跨模态对比学习的开放词汇3D点云检测方法OV-3DETIC。
AI.motivation: 现有点云检测方法因数据集类别有限难以实现开放词汇检测，而构建全面标注的点云数据集成本高昂且效率低下。
AI.method: 利用ImageNet1K扩展检测词汇，通过图像模态识别与点云模态定位生成未见类伪标签，并提出去偏跨模态对比学习方法实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 在SUN-RGBD和ScanNet数据集上分别实现10.77%和9.56%的mAP绝对提升，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨模态知识迁移和伪标签生成，OV-3DETIC在无需全面标注数据的情况下实现了开放词汇点云检测的性能突破。

authors_text: Yasar Abbas Ur Rehman,Yan Gao,Jiajun Shen,Pedro Porto Buarque de Gusmao,Nicholas Lane
title: Federated Self-supervised Learning for Video Understanding
title_zh: 用于视频理解的联合自监督学习
abstract: The ubiquity of camera-enabled mobile devices has lead to large amounts of unlabelled video data being produced at the edge. Although various self-supervised learning (SSL) methods have been proposed to harvest their latent spatio-temporal representations for task-specific training, practical challenges including privacy concerns and communication costs prevent SSL from being deployed at large scales. To mitigate these issues, we propose the use of Federated Learning (FL) to the task of video SSL. In this work, we evaluate the performance of current state-of-the-art (SOTA) video-SSL techniques and identify their shortcomings when integrated into the large-scale FL setting simulated with kinetics-400 dataset. We follow by proposing a novel federated SSL framework for video, dubbed FedVSSL, that integrates different aggregation strategies and partial weight updating. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and significance of FedVSSL as it outperforms the centralized SOTA for the downstream retrieval task by 6.66% on UCF-101 and 5.13% on HMDB-51.
summary: The ubiquity of camera-enabled mobile devices has lead to large amounts of unlabelled video data being produced at the edge. Although various self-supervised learning (SSL) methods have been proposed to harvest their latent spatio-temporal representations for task-specific training, practical challenges including privacy concerns and communication costs prevent SSL from being deployed at large scales. To mitigate these issues, we propose the use of Federated Learning (FL) to the task of video SSL. In this work, we evaluate the performance of current state-of-the-art (SOTA) video-SSL techniques and identify their shortcomings when integrated into the large-scale FL setting simulated with kinetics-400 dataset. We follow by proposing a novel federated SSL framework for video, dubbed FedVSSL, that integrates different aggregation strategies and partial weight updating. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and significance of FedVSSL as it outperforms the centralized SOTA for the downstream retrieval task by 6.66% on UCF-101 and 5.13% on HMDB-51.
abstract_zh: 带摄像头的移动设备的普及导致边缘产生大量未标记的视频数据。尽管已经提出了各种自监督学习（SSL）方法来收集其潜在的时空表示以用于特定任务的训练，但包括隐私问题和通信成本在内的实际挑战阻碍了 SSL 的大规模部署。为了缓解这些问题，我们建议使用联邦学习 (FL) 来完成视频 SSL 任务。在这项工作中，我们评估了当前最先进 (SOTA) 视频 SSL 技术的性能，并确定了它们在集成到使用 Kinetics-400 数据集模拟的大规模 FL 设置中时的缺点。接下来，我们提出了一种新颖的视频联合 SSL 框架，称为 FedVSSL，它集成了不同的聚合策略和部分权重更新。大量实验证明了 FedVSSL 的有效性和重要性，因为它在下游检索任务上比集中式 SOTA 在 UCF-101 上优于集中式 SOTA 6.66%，在 HMDB-51 上优于集中式 SOTA 5.13%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出联邦自监督学习框架FedVSSL，用于解决视频理解中隐私保护和通信成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频自监督学习方法因隐私泄露风险和高通信成本难以大规模部署，联邦学习可提供分布式解决方案。
AI.method: 设计FedVSSL框架，结合聚合策略优化和部分权重更新机制，适配联邦学习环境下的视频自监督学习。
AI.result: 在UCF-101数据集上优于集中式方法6.66%，在HMDB-51数据集上提升5.13%。
AI.conclusion: FedVSSL有效解决了联邦学习场景下视频自监督学习的挑战，为隐私保护的分布式视频理解提供新思路。

search_text: Federated Self-supervised Learning for Video Understanding 用于视频理解的联合自监督学习 The ubiquity of camera-enabled mobile devices has lead to large amounts of unlabelled video data being produced at the edge. Although various self-supervised learning (SSL) methods have been proposed to harvest their latent spatio-temporal representations for task-specific training, practical challenges including privacy concerns and communication costs prevent SSL from being deployed at large scales. To mitigate these issues, we propose the use of Federated Learning (FL) to the task of video SSL. In this work, we evaluate the performance of current state-of-the-art (SOTA) video-SSL techniques and identify their shortcomings when integrated into the large-scale FL setting simulated with kinetics-400 dataset. We follow by proposing a novel federated SSL framework for video, dubbed FedVSSL, that integrates different aggregation strategies and partial weight updating. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and significance of FedVSSL as it outperforms the centralized SOTA for the downstream retrieval task by 6.66% on UCF-101 and 5.13% on HMDB-51. 带摄像头的移动设备的普及导致边缘产生大量未标记的视频数据。尽管已经提出了各种自监督学习（SSL）方法来收集其潜在的时空表示以用于特定任务的训练，但包括隐私问题和通信成本在内的实际挑战阻碍了 SSL 的大规模部署。为了缓解这些问题，我们建议使用联邦学习 (FL) 来完成视频 SSL 任务。在这项工作中，我们评估了当前最先进 (SOTA) 视频 SSL 技术的性能，并确定了它们在集成到使用 Kinetics-400 数据集模拟的大规模 FL 设置中时的缺点。接下来，我们提出了一种新颖的视频联合 SSL 框架，称为 FedVSSL，它集成了不同的聚合策略和部分权重更新。大量实验证明了 FedVSSL 的有效性和重要性，因为它在下游检索任务上比集中式 SOTA 在 UCF-101 上优于集中式 SOTA 6.66%，在 HMDB-51 上优于集中式 SOTA 5.13%。 本文提出联邦自监督学习框架FedVSSL，用于解决视频理解中隐私保护和通信成本高的问题。 Yasar Abbas Ur Rehman,Yan Gao,Jiajun Shen,Pedro Porto Buarque de Gusmao,Nicholas Lane cs.CV

authors_text: Agus Gunawan,Xu Yin,Kang Zhang
title: Understanding and Improving Group Normalization
title_zh: 理解和改进群体标准化
abstract: Various normalization layers have been proposed to help the training of neural networks. Group Normalization (GN) is one of the effective and attractive studies that achieved significant performances in the visual recognition task. Despite the great success achieved, GN still has several issues that may negatively impact neural network training. In this paper, we introduce an analysis framework and discuss the working principles of GN in affecting the training process of the neural network. From experimental results, we conclude the real cause of GN's inferior performance against Batch normalization (BN): 1) \textbf{unstable training performance}, 2) \textbf{more sensitive} to distortion, whether it comes from external noise or perturbations introduced by the regularization. In addition, we found that GN can only help the neural network training in some specific period, unlike BN, which helps the network throughout the training. To solve these issues, we propose a new normalization layer built on top of GN, by incorporating the advantages of BN. Experimental results on the image classification task demonstrated that the proposed normalization layer outperforms the official GN to improve recognition accuracy regardless of the batch sizes and stabilize the network training.
summary: Various normalization layers have been proposed to help the training of neural networks. Group Normalization (GN) is one of the effective and attractive studies that achieved significant performances in the visual recognition task. Despite the great success achieved, GN still has several issues that may negatively impact neural network training. In this paper, we introduce an analysis framework and discuss the working principles of GN in affecting the training process of the neural network. From experimental results, we conclude the real cause of GN's inferior performance against Batch normalization (BN): 1) \textbf{unstable training performance}, 2) \textbf{more sensitive} to distortion, whether it comes from external noise or perturbations introduced by the regularization. In addition, we found that GN can only help the neural network training in some specific period, unlike BN, which helps the network throughout the training. To solve these issues, we propose a new normalization layer built on top of GN, by incorporating the advantages of BN. Experimental results on the image classification task demonstrated that the proposed normalization layer outperforms the official GN to improve recognition accuracy regardless of the batch sizes and stabilize the network training.
abstract_zh: 人们已经提出了各种归一化层来帮助神经网络的训练。组归一化（GN）是有效且有吸引力的研究之一，在视觉识别任务中取得了显着的成绩。尽管取得了巨大的成功，GN 仍然存在一些可能对神经网络训练产生负面影响的问题。在本文中，我们介绍了一个分析框架，并讨论了 GN 在影响神经网络训练过程中的工作原理。从实验结果中，我们得出了 GN 相对于批量归一化（BN）性能较差的真正原因：1）\textbf{训练性能不稳定}，2）\textbf{对失真更敏感}，无论是来自外部噪声还是正则化引入的扰动。另外，我们发现GN只能在某个特定时期帮助神经网络训练，而BN则在整个训练过程中帮助网络。为了解决这些问题，我们结合 BN 的优点，提出了一个基于 GN 的新归一化层。图像分类任务的实验结果表明，无论批量大小如何，所提出的归一化层都优于官方 GN，可以提高识别精度并稳定网络训练。

AI.tldr: 分析Group Normalization（GN）的局限性并提出改进方法以提升神经网络训练效果
AI.motivation: 尽管GN在视觉任务中表现良好，但存在训练不稳定、对失真敏感及仅在特定阶段有效等问题，需改进以提升性能
AI.method: 设计一种结合Batch Normalization优势的新型归一化层，以增强GN的稳定性与适应性
AI.result: 在图像分类任务中，新方法在不同批量大小下均提升识别准确率，且稳定训练过程
AI.conclusion: GN存在训练不稳定等缺陷，新方法通过融合BN优势有效提升了性能与稳定性

authors_text: Yan Zhao,Ruihai Wu,Zhehuan Chen,Yourong Zhang,Qingnan Fan,Kaichun Mo,Hao Dong
title: DualAfford: Learning Collaborative Visual Affordance for Dual-gripper Manipulation
title_zh: DualAfford：学习双夹具操作的协作视觉可供性
abstract: It is essential yet challenging for future home-assistant robots to understand and manipulate diverse 3D objects in daily human environments. Towards building scalable systems that can perform diverse manipulation tasks over various 3D shapes, recent works have advocated and demonstrated promising results learning visual actionable affordance, which labels every point over the input 3D geometry with an action likelihood of accomplishing the downstream task (e.g., pushing or picking-up). However, these works only studied single-gripper manipulation tasks, yet many real-world tasks require two hands to achieve collaboratively. In this work, we propose a novel learning framework, DualAfford, to learn collaborative affordance for dual-gripper manipulation tasks. The core design of the approach is to reduce the quadratic problem for two grippers into two disentangled yet interconnected subtasks for efficient learning. Using the large-scale PartNet-Mobility and ShapeNet datasets, we set up four benchmark tasks for dual-gripper manipulation. Experiments prove the effectiveness and superiority of our method over three baselines.
summary: It is essential yet challenging for future home-assistant robots to understand and manipulate diverse 3D objects in daily human environments. Towards building scalable systems that can perform diverse manipulation tasks over various 3D shapes, recent works have advocated and demonstrated promising results learning visual actionable affordance, which labels every point over the input 3D geometry with an action likelihood of accomplishing the downstream task (e.g., pushing or picking-up). However, these works only studied single-gripper manipulation tasks, yet many real-world tasks require two hands to achieve collaboratively. In this work, we propose a novel learning framework, DualAfford, to learn collaborative affordance for dual-gripper manipulation tasks. The core design of the approach is to reduce the quadratic problem for two grippers into two disentangled yet interconnected subtasks for efficient learning. Using the large-scale PartNet-Mobility and ShapeNet datasets, we set up four benchmark tasks for dual-gripper manipulation. Experiments prove the effectiveness and superiority of our method over three baselines.
abstract_zh: 对于未来的家庭助理机器人来说，理解和操纵日常人类环境中的各种 3D 物体至关重要，但也具有挑战性。为了构建能够在各种 3D 形状上执行不同操作任务的可扩展系统，最近的工作提倡并展示了学习视觉可操作可供性的有希望的结果，它用完成下游任务（例如，推动或拾取）的动作可能性来标记输入 3D 几何上的每个点。然而，这些工作仅研究了单夹具操作任务，而许多现实世界的任务需要两只手才能协作完成。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的学习框架 DualAfford，用于学习双夹具操作任务的协作可供性。该方法的核心设计是将两个夹具的二次问题简化为两个分离但互连的子任务，以实现高效学习。使用大规模 PartNet-Mobility 和 ShapeNet 数据集，我们为双夹具操作设置了四个基准任务。实验证明了我们的方法相对于三个基线的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DualAfford框架，用于学习双机械臂协作操作的视觉可操作性，解决家庭服务机器人处理复杂3D物体时的双臂协同问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉可操作性研究仅针对单机械臂操作，而实际场景中许多任务需要双臂协作完成，如何高效学习双臂协同的可操作性仍是挑战。
AI.method: 将双臂协同问题分解为两个解耦但关联的子任务，通过PartNet-Mobility和ShapeNet数据集训练模型，建立四个基准任务验证方法。
AI.result: 实验表明DualAfford在四个双臂操作基准任务中优于三个基线方法，证明了其有效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为双臂协作操作提供了新思路，可扩展至更复杂的家庭服务机器人操作场景。

The core design of the approach is to reduce the quadratic problem for two grippers into two disentangled yet interconnected subtasks for efficient learning. Using the large-scale PartNet-Mobility and ShapeNet datasets, we set up four benchmark tasks for dual-gripper manipulation. Experiments prove the effectiveness and superiority of our method over three baselines. 对于未来的家庭助理机器人来说，理解和操纵日常人类环境中的各种 3D 物体至关重要，但也具有挑战性。为了构建能够在各种 3D 形状上执行不同操作任务的可扩展系统，最近的工作提倡并展示了学习视觉可操作可供性的有希望的结果，它用完成下游任务（例如，推动或拾取）的动作可能性来标记输入 3D 几何上的每个点。然而，这些工作仅研究了单夹具操作任务，而许多现实世界的任务需要两只手才能协作完成。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的学习框架 DualAfford，用于学习双夹具操作任务的协作可供性。该方法的核心设计是将两个夹具的二次问题简化为两个分离但互连的子任务，以实现高效学习。使用大规模 PartNet-Mobility 和 ShapeNet 数据集，我们为双夹具操作设置了四个基准任务。实验证明了我们的方法相对于三个基线的有效性和优越性。 本文提出DualAfford框架，用于学习双机械臂协作操作的视觉可操作性，解决家庭服务机器人处理复杂3D物体时的双臂协同问题。 Yan Zhao,Ruihai Wu,Zhehuan Chen,Yourong Zhang,Qingnan Fan,Kaichun Mo,Hao Dong cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Fabian Kreppel,Christian Melzer,Diego Olvera Millán,Janis Wagner,Janine Hilder,Ulrich Poschinger,Ferdinand Schmidt-Kaler,André Brinkmann
title: Quantum Circuit Compiler for a Shuttling-Based Trapped-Ion Quantum Computer
title_zh: 用于基于穿梭的俘获离子量子计算机的量子电路编译器
comment: 35 pages, 25 figures, 4 tables, accepted in Quantum
comments: 35 pages, 25 figures, 4 tables, accepted in Quantum
abstract: The increasing capabilities of quantum computing hardware and the challenge of realizing deep quantum circuits require fully automated and efficient tools for compiling quantum circuits. To express arbitrary circuits in a sequence of native gates specific to the quantum computer architecture, it is necessary to make algorithms portable across the landscape of quantum hardware providers. In this work, we present a compiler capable of transforming and optimizing a quantum circuit targeting a shuttling-based trapped-ion quantum processor. It consists of custom algorithms set on top of the quantum circuit framework Pytket. The performance was evaluated for a wide range of quantum circuits and the results show that the gate counts can be reduced by factors up to 5.1 compared to standard Pytket and up to 2.2 compared to standard Qiskit compilation.
summary: The increasing capabilities of quantum computing hardware and the challenge of realizing deep quantum circuits require fully automated and efficient tools for compiling quantum circuits. To express arbitrary circuits in a sequence of native gates specific to the quantum computer architecture, it is necessary to make algorithms portable across the landscape of quantum hardware providers. In this work, we present a compiler capable of transforming and optimizing a quantum circuit targeting a shuttling-based trapped-ion quantum processor. It consists of custom algorithms set on top of the quantum circuit framework Pytket. The performance was evaluated for a wide range of quantum circuits and the results show that the gate counts can be reduced by factors up to 5.1 compared to standard Pytket and up to 2.2 compared to standard Qiskit compilation.
abstract_zh: 量子计算硬件能力的不断增强以及实现深度量子电路的挑战需要完全自动化且高效的量子电路编译工具。为了用特定于量子计算机架构的原生门序列来表达任意电路，有必要使算法在量子硬件提供商的环境中可移植。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种编译器，能够转换和优化针对基于穿梭的俘获离子量子处理器的量子电路。它由设置在量子电路框架 Pytket 之上的自定义算法组成。对各种量子电路的性能进行了评估，结果表明，与标准 Pytket 相比，门数最多可减少 5.1 倍，与标准 Qiskit 编译相比，最多可减少 2.2 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对基于穿梭技术的离子阱量子计算机的量子电路编译器，旨在优化量子电路以适应特定硬件架构。
AI.motivation: 随着量子计算硬件能力的提升，实现深层量子电路面临挑战，需要高效且自动化的编译工具以适配不同量子硬件架构。
AI.method: 基于Pytket量子电路框架开发定制化算法，设计针对穿梭式离子阱量子处理器的电路优化编译器。
AI.result: 在多种量子电路测试中，该编译器相比标准Pytket减少高达5.1倍的门数量，相比Qiskit减少2.2倍的门数量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的编译器有效提升了针对穿梭式离子阱量子计算机的电路优化效率，为跨平台量子算法实现提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zhi Yang,Yadong Yan,Haitao Gan,Jing Zhao,Zhiwei Ye
title: A Safe Semi-supervised Graph Convolution Network
title_zh: 安全的半监督图卷积网络
abstract: In the semi-supervised learning field, Graph Convolution Network (GCN), as a variant model of GNN, has achieved promising results for non-Euclidean data by introducing convolution into GNN. However, GCN and its variant models fail to safely use the information of risk unlabeled data, which will degrade the performance of semi-supervised learning. Therefore, we propose a Safe GCN framework (Safe-GCN) to improve the learning performance. In the Safe-GCN, we design an iterative process to label the unlabeled data. In each iteration, a GCN and its supervised version(S-GCN) are learned to find the unlabeled data with high confidence. The high-confidence unlabeled data and their pseudo labels are then added to the label set. Finally, both added unlabeled data and labeled ones are used to train a S-GCN which can achieve the safe exploration of the risk unlabeled data and enable safe use of large numbers of unlabeled data. The performance of Safe-GCN is evaluated on three well-known citation network datasets and the obtained results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework over several graph-based semi-supervised learning methods.
summary: In the semi-supervised learning field, Graph Convolution Network (GCN), as a variant model of GNN, has achieved promising results for non-Euclidean data by introducing convolution into GNN. However, GCN and its variant models fail to safely use the information of risk unlabeled data, which will degrade the performance of semi-supervised learning. Therefore, we propose a Safe GCN framework (Safe-GCN) to improve the learning performance. In the Safe-GCN, we design an iterative process to label the unlabeled data. In each iteration, a GCN and its supervised version(S-GCN) are learned to find the unlabeled data with high confidence. The high-confidence unlabeled data and their pseudo labels are then added to the label set. Finally, both added unlabeled data and labeled ones are used to train a S-GCN which can achieve the safe exploration of the risk unlabeled data and enable safe use of large numbers of unlabeled data. The performance of Safe-GCN is evaluated on three well-known citation network datasets and the obtained results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework over several graph-based semi-supervised learning methods.
abstract_zh: 在半监督学习领域，图卷积网络（GCN）作为GNN的变种模型，通过在GNN中引入卷积，在非欧几里得数据上取得了可喜的结果。然而，GCN 及其变体模型无法安全地使用风险未标记数据的信息，这会降低半监督学习的性能。因此，我们提出了一个安全GCN框架（Safe-GCN）来提高学习性能。在 Safe-GCN 中，我们设计了一个迭代过程来标记未标记的数据。在每次迭代中，学习 GCN 及其监督版本（S-GCN）以高置信度地找到未标记的数据。然后将高置信度的未标记数据及其伪标签添加到标签集中。最后，使用添加的未标记数据和标记数据来训练S-GCN，可以实现对风险未标记数据的安全探索，并实现大量未标记数据的安全使用。 Safe-GCN 的性能在三个著名的引文网络数据集上进行了评估，获得的结果证明了所提出的框架相对于几种基于图的半监督学习方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种安全的半监督图卷积网络框架（Safe-GCN），旨在通过有效利用风险未标记数据提升半监督学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积网络（GCN）及其变体无法安全利用风险未标记数据，导致半监督学习性能下降，需设计安全机制以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计迭代过程，通过GCN与监督版本S-GCN联合学习，筛选高置信度未标记数据并生成伪标签，最终结合新增数据训练S-GCN实现安全探索。
AI.result: 在三个知名引文网络数据集上实验验证，Safe-GCN相比其他图基半监督方法表现出更优性能。
AI.conclusion: Safe-GCN通过迭代筛选与伪标签机制，有效安全地利用大量未标记数据，为半监督图学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shunyu Liu,Kaixuan Chen,Na Yu,Jie Song,Zunlei Feng,Mingli Song
title: Ask-AC: An Initiative Advisor-in-the-Loop Actor-Critic Framework
title_zh: Ask-AC：主动顾问循环演员评论家框架
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man and Cybernetics: Systems (TSMC)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man and Cybernetics: Systems (TSMC)
abstract: Despite the promising results achieved, state-of-the-art interactive reinforcement learning schemes rely on passively receiving supervision signals from advisor experts, in the form of either continuous monitoring or pre-defined rules, which inevitably result in a cumbersome and expensive learning process. In this paper, we introduce a novel initiative advisor-in-the-loop actor-critic framework, termed as Ask-AC, that replaces the unilateral advisor-guidance mechanism with a bidirectional learner-initiative one, and thereby enables a customized and efficacious message exchange between learner and advisor. At the heart of Ask-AC are two complementary components, namely action requester and adaptive state selector, that can be readily incorporated into various discrete actor-critic architectures. The former component allows the agent to initiatively seek advisor intervention in the presence of uncertain states, while the latter identifies the unstable states potentially missed by the former especially when environment changes, and then learns to promote the ask action on such states. Experimental results on both stationary and non-stationary environments and across different actor-critic backbones demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly improves the learning efficiency of the agent, and achieves the performances on par with those obtained by continuous advisor monitoring.
summary: Despite the promising results achieved, state-of-the-art interactive reinforcement learning schemes rely on passively receiving supervision signals from advisor experts, in the form of either continuous monitoring or pre-defined rules, which inevitably result in a cumbersome and expensive learning process. In this paper, we introduce a novel initiative advisor-in-the-loop actor-critic framework, termed as Ask-AC, that replaces the unilateral advisor-guidance mechanism with a bidirectional learner-initiative one, and thereby enables a customized and efficacious message exchange between learner and advisor. At the heart of Ask-AC are two complementary components, namely action requester and adaptive state selector, that can be readily incorporated into various discrete actor-critic architectures. The former component allows the agent to initiatively seek advisor intervention in the presence of uncertain states, while the latter identifies the unstable states potentially missed by the former especially when environment changes, and then learns to promote the ask action on such states. Experimental results on both stationary and non-stationary environments and across different actor-critic backbones demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly improves the learning efficiency of the agent, and achieves the performances on par with those obtained by continuous advisor monitoring.
abstract_zh: 尽管取得了有希望的结果，但最先进的交互式强化学习方案依赖于被动接收来自顾问专家的监督信号，以持续监控或预定义规则的形式，这不可避免地导致繁琐且昂贵的学习过程。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的主动顾问循环参与者评论家框架，称为 Ask-AC，该框架用双向学习者主动机制取代了单边顾问指导机制，从而实现了学习者和顾问之间定制且有效的消息交换。 Ask-AC 的核心是两个互补的组件，即动作请求器和自适应状态选择器，它们可以很容易地合并到各种离散的行动者-批评者架构中。前一个组件允许智能体在存在不确定状态的情况下主动寻求顾问干预，而后者识别前者可能错过的不稳定状态，特别是当环境发生变化时，然后学习促进对这些状态的询问动作。在固定和非固定环境以及不同的 actor-critic 主干上的实验结果表明，所提出的框架显着提高了代理的学习效率，并实现了与连续顾问监控所获得的性能相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Ask-AC的主动专家介入的Actor-Critic框架，通过双向交互机制提升交互式强化学习的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式强化学习方法依赖专家被动监督，导致学习过程繁琐且成本高昂，亟需更高效的专家-学习者协作机制。
AI.method: 设计了两个核心组件：动作请求器（主动寻求专家介入）与自适应状态选择器（识别环境变化中的不稳定状态并触发询问），集成于离散Actor-Critic架构中。
AI.result: 在静态与非静态环境中，Ask-AC显著提升学习效率，性能可媲美持续专家监控方案。
AI.conclusion: Ask-AC通过主动双向交互机制，有效解决了传统被动监督的局限性，为交互式强化学习提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Ask-AC: An Initiative Advisor-in-the-Loop Actor-Critic Framework Ask-AC：主动顾问循环演员评论家框架 Despite the promising results achieved, state-of-the-art interactive reinforcement learning schemes rely on passively receiving supervision signals from advisor experts, in the form of either continuous monitoring or pre-defined rules, which inevitably result in a cumbersome and expensive learning process. In this paper, we introduce a novel initiative advisor-in-the-loop actor-critic framework, termed as Ask-AC, that replaces the unilateral advisor-guidance mechanism with a bidirectional learner-initiative one, and thereby enables a customized and efficacious message exchange between learner and advisor. At the heart of Ask-AC are two complementary components, namely action requester and adaptive state selector, that can be readily incorporated into various discrete actor-critic architectures. The former component allows the agent to initiatively seek advisor intervention in the presence of uncertain states, while the latter identifies the unstable states potentially missed by the former especially when environment changes, and then learns to promote the ask action on such states. Experimental results on both stationary and non-stationary environments and across different actor-critic backbones demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly improves the learning efficiency of the agent, and achieves the performances on par with those obtained by continuous advisor monitoring. 尽管取得了有希望的结果，但最先进的交互式强化学习方案依赖于被动接收来自顾问专家的监督信号，以持续监控或预定义规则的形式，这不可避免地导致繁琐且昂贵的学习过程。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的主动顾问循环参与者评论家框架，称为 Ask-AC，该框架用双向学习者主动机制取代了单边顾问指导机制，从而实现了学习者和顾问之间定制且有效的消息交换。 Ask-AC 的核心是两个互补的组件，即动作请求器和自适应状态选择器，它们可以很容易地合并到各种离散的行动者-批评者架构中。前一个组件允许智能体在存在不确定状态的情况下主动寻求顾问干预，而后者识别前者可能错过的不稳定状态，特别是当环境发生变化时，然后学习促进对这些状态的询问动作。在固定和非固定环境以及不同的 actor-critic 主干上的实验结果表明，所提出的框架显着提高了代理的学习效率，并实现了与连续顾问监控所获得的性能相当的性能。 本文提出了一种名为Ask-AC的主动专家介入的Actor-Critic框架，通过双向交互机制提升交互式强化学习的效率。 Shunyu Liu,Kaixuan Chen,Na Yu,Jie Song,Zunlei Feng,Mingli Song cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ruoyu Feng,Xin Jin,Zongyu Guo,Runsen Feng,Yixin Gao,Tianyu He,Zhizheng Zhang,Simeng Sun,Zhibo Chen
title: Image Coding for Machines with Omnipotent Feature Learning
title_zh: 具有万能特征学习的机器图像编码
comment: Accepted by ECCV2022
comments: Accepted by ECCV2022
abstract: Image Coding for Machines (ICM) aims to compress images for AI tasks analysis rather than meeting human perception. Learning a kind of feature that is both general (for AI tasks) and compact (for compression) is pivotal for its success. In this paper, we attempt to develop an ICM framework by learning universal features while also considering compression. We name such features as omnipotent features and the corresponding framework as Omni-ICM. Considering self-supervised learning (SSL) improves feature generalization, we integrate it with the compression task into the Omni-ICM framework to learn omnipotent features. However, it is non-trivial to coordinate semantics modeling in SSL and redundancy removing in compression, so we design a novel information filtering (IF) module between them by co-optimization of instance distinguishment and entropy minimization to adaptively drop information that is weakly related to AI tasks (e.g., some texture redundancy). Different from previous task-specific solutions, Omni-ICM could directly support AI tasks analysis based on the learned omnipotent features without joint training or extra transformation. Albeit simple and intuitive, Omni-ICM significantly outperforms existing traditional and learning-based codecs on multiple fundamental vision tasks.
summary: Image Coding for Machines (ICM) aims to compress images for AI tasks analysis rather than meeting human perception. Learning a kind of feature that is both general (for AI tasks) and compact (for compression) is pivotal for its success. In this paper, we attempt to develop an ICM framework by learning universal features while also considering compression. We name such features as omnipotent features and the corresponding framework as Omni-ICM. Considering self-supervised learning (SSL) improves feature generalization, we integrate it with the compression task into the Omni-ICM framework to learn omnipotent features. However, it is non-trivial to coordinate semantics modeling in SSL and redundancy removing in compression, so we design a novel information filtering (IF) module between them by co-optimization of instance distinguishment and entropy minimization to adaptively drop information that is weakly related to AI tasks (e.g., some texture redundancy). Different from previous task-specific solutions, Omni-ICM could directly support AI tasks analysis based on the learned omnipotent features without joint training or extra transformation. Albeit simple and intuitive, Omni-ICM significantly outperforms existing traditional and learning-based codecs on multiple fundamental vision tasks.
abstract_zh: 机器图像编码（ICM）旨在压缩图像以进行人工智能任务分析，而不是满足人类的感知。学习一种既通用（对于人工智能任务）又紧凑（对于压缩）的特征是其成功的关键。在本文中，我们尝试通过学习通用特征同时考虑压缩来开发 ICM 框架。我们将此类功能称为全能功能，并将相应的框架称为 Omni-ICM。考虑到自监督学习（SSL）可以提高特征泛化能力，我们将其与压缩任务集成到 Omni-ICM 框架中以学习全能特征。然而，协调 SSL 中的语义建模和压缩中的冗余消除并非易事，因此我们通过实例区分和熵最小化的共同优化，在它们之间设计了一种新颖的信息过滤（IF）模块，以自适应地丢弃与 AI 任务弱相关的信息（例如，一些纹理冗余）。与以往的特定任务解决方案不同，Omni-ICM可以根据学习到的全能特征直接支持AI任务分析，无需联合训练或额外改造。尽管简单直观，Omni-ICM 在多项基本视觉任务上的性能显着优于现有的传统和基于学习的编解码器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Omni-ICM的图像编码框架，旨在学习适用于AI任务的通用且紧凑的特征，以实现图像压缩。
AI.motivation: 传统的图像压缩方法主要关注人类感知，而AI任务需要通用且紧凑的特征。因此，本文尝试开发一种能够同时满足通用特征学习和压缩需求的框架。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为Omni-ICM的框架，结合自监督学习和压缩任务，并设计了一个信息过滤模块，通过实例区分和熵最小化进行共优化，以自适应地去除与AI任务弱相关的冗余信息。
AI.result: Omni-ICM在多个基础视觉任务上显著优于现有的传统和基于学习的编码器。
AI.conclusion: Omni-ICM能够直接支持AI任务分析，无需联合训练或额外转换，是一种简单且直观的图像编码方法。

authors_text: Fredrik Svanström,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez,Cristofer Englund
title: Drone Detection and Tracking in Real-Time by Fusion of Different Sensing Modalities
title_zh: 通过融合不同传感方式实时检测和跟踪无人机
comment: Under consideration at Drones
comments: Under consideration at Drones
abstract: Automatic detection of flying drones is a key issue where its presence, especially if unauthorized, can create risky situations or compromise security. Here, we design and evaluate a multi-sensor drone detection system. In conjunction with standard video cameras and microphone sensors, we explore the use of thermal infrared cameras, pointed out as a feasible and promising solution that is scarcely addressed in the related literature. Our solution integrates a fish-eye camera as well to monitor a wider part of the sky and steer the other cameras towards objects of interest. The sensing solutions are complemented with an ADS-B receiver, a GPS receiver, and a radar module. However, our final deployment has not included the latter due to its limited detection range. The thermal camera is shown to be a feasible solution as good as the video camera, even if the camera employed here has a lower resolution. Two other novelties of our work are the creation of a new public dataset of multi-sensor annotated data that expands the number of classes compared to existing ones, as well as the study of the detector performance as a function of the sensor-to-target distance. Sensor fusion is also explored, showing that the system can be made more robust in this way, mitigating false detections of the individual sensors.
summary: Automatic detection of flying drones is a key issue where its presence, especially if unauthorized, can create risky situations or compromise security. Here, we design and evaluate a multi-sensor drone detection system. In conjunction with standard video cameras and microphone sensors, we explore the use of thermal infrared cameras, pointed out as a feasible and promising solution that is scarcely addressed in the related literature. Our solution integrates a fish-eye camera as well to monitor a wider part of the sky and steer the other cameras towards objects of interest. The sensing solutions are complemented with an ADS-B receiver, a GPS receiver, and a radar module. However, our final deployment has not included the latter due to its limited detection range. The thermal camera is shown to be a feasible solution as good as the video camera, even if the camera employed here has a lower resolution. Two other novelties of our work are the creation of a new public dataset of multi-sensor annotated data that expands the number of classes compared to existing ones, as well as the study of the detector performance as a function of the sensor-to-target distance. Sensor fusion is also explored, showing that the system can be made more robust in this way, mitigating false detections of the individual sensors.
abstract_zh: 自动检测飞行无人机是一个关键问题，它的存在，尤其是未经授权的情况下，可能会造成危险情况或危及安全。在这里，我们设计并评估了多传感器无人机检测系统。结合标准摄像机和麦克风传感器，我们探索了热红外摄像机的使用，指出这是一种可行且有前途的解决方案，但相关文献中几乎没有提及。我们的解决方案还集成了鱼眼摄像机，可以监视更广阔的天空，并将其他摄像机引导至感兴趣的物体。该传感解决方案还配有 ADS-B 接收器、GPS 接收器和雷达模块。然而，由于其检测范围有限，我们的最终部署并未包括后者。热像仪被证明是与摄像机一样好的可行解决方案，即使这里使用的相机具有较低的分辨率。我们工作的另外两个新颖之处是创建了一个新的多传感器注释数据公共数据集，与现有数据集相比，该数据集扩展了类别数量，以及研究探测器性能与传感器到目标距离的函数关系。还探讨了传感器融合，表明通过这种方式可以使系统更加稳健，从而减少各个传感器的错误检测。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并评估了一种融合多种传感模态的实时无人机检测与追踪系统，结合可见光摄像头、热红外摄像头、麦克风等传感器，并创建了新的多传感器标注数据集。
AI.motivation: 未经授权的无人机可能引发安全风险，现有检测方法存在局限性，热红外摄像头等传感器的潜力尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 集成鱼眼摄像头、可见光摄像头、热红外摄像头、ADS-B接收器和GPS接收器，通过传感器融合技术提升检测鲁棒性，并构建包含多类目标的公开数据集。
AI.result: 热红外摄像头在分辨率较低的情况下仍能实现与可见光摄像头相当的检测效果，传感器融合有效降低误检率，新数据集扩展了现有研究的类别范围。
AI.conclusion: 多传感器融合系统能有效提升无人机检测性能，热红外摄像头是可行方案，公开数据集为后续研究提供了重要资源。

search_text: Drone Detection and Tracking in Real-Time by Fusion of Different Sensing Modalities 通过融合不同传感方式实时检测和跟踪无人机 Automatic detection of flying drones is a key issue where its presence, especially if unauthorized, can create risky situations or compromise security. Here, we design and evaluate a multi-sensor drone detection system. In conjunction with standard video cameras and microphone sensors, we explore the use of thermal infrared cameras, pointed out as a feasible and promising solution that is scarcely addressed in the related literature. Our solution integrates a fish-eye camera as well to monitor a wider part of the sky and steer the other cameras towards objects of interest. The sensing solutions are complemented with an ADS-B receiver, a GPS receiver, and a radar module. However, our final deployment has not included the latter due to its limited detection range. The thermal camera is shown to be a feasible solution as good as the video camera, even if the camera employed here has a lower resolution. Two other novelties of our work are the creation of a new public dataset of multi-sensor annotated data that expands the number of classes compared to existing ones, as well as the study of the detector performance as a function of the sensor-to-target distance. Sensor fusion is also explored, showing that the system can be made more robust in this way, mitigating false detections of the individual sensors. 自动检测飞行无人机是一个关键问题，它的存在，尤其是未经授权的情况下，可能会造成危险情况或危及安全。在这里，我们设计并评估了多传感器无人机检测系统。结合标准摄像机和麦克风传感器，我们探索了热红外摄像机的使用，指出这是一种可行且有前途的解决方案，但相关文献中几乎没有提及。我们的解决方案还集成了鱼眼摄像机，可以监视更广阔的天空，并将其他摄像机引导至感兴趣的物体。该传感解决方案还配有 ADS-B 接收器、GPS 接收器和雷达模块。然而，由于其检测范围有限，我们的最终部署并未包括后者。热像仪被证明是与摄像机一样好的可行解决方案，即使这里使用的相机具有较低的分辨率。我们工作的另外两个新颖之处是创建了一个新的多传感器注释数据公共数据集，与现有数据集相比，该数据集扩展了类别数量，以及研究探测器性能与传感器到目标距离的函数关系。还探讨了传感器融合，表明通过这种方式可以使系统更加稳健，从而减少各个传感器的错误检测。 本文设计并评估了一种融合多种传感模态的实时无人机检测与追踪系统，结合可见光摄像头、热红外摄像头、麦克风等传感器，并创建了新的多传感器标注数据集。 Fredrik Svanström,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez,Cristofer Englund cs.CV

authors_text: Shangrong Yang,Chunyu Lin,Kang Liao,Yao Zhao
title: FishFormer: Annulus Slicing-based Transformer for Fisheye Rectification with Efficacy Domain Exploration
title_zh: FishFormer：基于环形切片的变压器，用于鱼眼整流和功效域探索
abstract: Numerous significant progress on fisheye image rectification has been achieved through CNN. Nevertheless, constrained by a fixed receptive field, the global distribution and the local symmetry of the distortion have not been fully exploited. To leverage these two characteristics, we introduced Fishformer that processes the fisheye image as a sequence to enhance global and local perception. We tuned the Transformer according to the structural properties of fisheye images. First, the uneven distortion distribution in patches generated by the existing square slicing method confuses the network, resulting in difficult training. Therefore, we propose an annulus slicing method to maintain the consistency of the distortion in each patch, thus perceiving the distortion distribution well. Second, we analyze that different distortion parameters have their own efficacy domains. Hence, the perception of the local area is as important as the global, but Transformer has a weakness for local texture perception. Therefore, we propose a novel layer attention mechanism to enhance the local perception and texture transfer. Our network simultaneously implements global perception and focused local perception decided by the different parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method provides superior performance compared with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Numerous significant progress on fisheye image rectification has been achieved through CNN. Nevertheless, constrained by a fixed receptive field, the global distribution and the local symmetry of the distortion have not been fully exploited. To leverage these two characteristics, we introduced Fishformer that processes the fisheye image as a sequence to enhance global and local perception. We tuned the Transformer according to the structural properties of fisheye images. First, the uneven distortion distribution in patches generated by the existing square slicing method confuses the network, resulting in difficult training. Therefore, we propose an annulus slicing method to maintain the consistency of the distortion in each patch, thus perceiving the distortion distribution well. Second, we analyze that different distortion parameters have their own efficacy domains. Hence, the perception of the local area is as important as the global, but Transformer has a weakness for local texture perception. Therefore, we propose a novel layer attention mechanism to enhance the local perception and texture transfer. Our network simultaneously implements global perception and focused local perception decided by the different parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method provides superior performance compared with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 通过 CNN，在鱼眼图像校正方面取得了许多重大进展。然而，受固定感受野的限制，畸变的全局分布和局部对称性尚未得到充分利用。为了利用这两个特性，我们引入了 Fishformer，它将鱼眼图像处理为序列，以增强全局和局部感知。我们根据鱼眼图像的结构特性调整 Transformer。首先，现有的方形切片方法生成的块中失真分布不均匀，使网络混乱，导致训练困难。因此，我们提出了一种环形切片方法来保持每个补丁中畸变的一致性，从而很好地感知畸变分布。其次，我们分析不同的畸变参数有各自的功效域。因此，局部区域的感知与全局一样重要，但 Transformer 在局部纹理感知方面存在弱点。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的层注意机制来增强局部感知和纹理传输。我们的网络同时实现全局感知和由不同参数决定的集中局部感知。大量的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法提供了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FishFormer模型，通过环形切片和注意力机制改进鱼眼图像校正效果。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN因固定感受野限制，无法充分挖掘鱼眼图像的全局分布与局部对称性特征。
AI.method: 设计环形切片方法保持图像块畸变一致性，并引入层注意力机制增强局部纹理感知能力。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法较现有技术取得更优校正性能。
AI.conclusion: FishFormer通过全局与局部感知的协同机制，有效提升了鱼眼图像校正的准确性。

authors_text: J. Fernandes,J. Sá Silva,A. Rodrigues,F. Boavida,R. Gaspar,C. Godinho,R. Francisco
title: Social Sensing and Human in the Loop Profiling during Pandemics: the Vitoria application
title_zh: 大流行期间的社会感知和人类参与分析：维多利亚应用程序
comment: 23 pages, 12 figures and 4 tables
comments: 23 pages, 12 figures and 4 tables
abstract: As the number of smart devices that surround us increases, so do the opportunities to leverage them to create socially- and context-aware systems. Smart devices can be used for better understanding human behaviour and its societal implications. As an example of a scenario in which the role of socially aware systems is crucial, consider the SARS-CoV-2 pandemic. In this paper we present an innovative Humanin-The-Loop Cyber Physical system that can collect passive data from people, such as physical activity, sleep information, and discrete location, as well as collect self-reported data, and provide individualised user feedback. In this paper, we also present a three and a half months field trial implemented in Portugal. This trial was part of a larger scope project that was supported by the Portuguese National Health System, to evaluate the indicators and effects of the pandemic. Results concerning various applications usage statistics are presented, comparing the most used applications, their objective and their usage pattern in work/non-work periods. Additionally,the time-lagged cross correlation between some of the collected metrics, Covid events, and media news, are explored. This type of applications can be used not only in the context of Covid but also in future pandemics, to assist individuals in self-regulation of their contagion risk, based on personalized information, while also function as a means for raising self-awareness of risks related to psychological wellbeing.

abstract_zh: 随着我们周围智能设备数量的增加，利用它们创建社交和情境感知系统的机会也在增加。智能设备可用于更好地理解人类行为及其社会影响。作为社会意识系统的作用至关重要的场景的一个例子，请考虑 SARS-CoV-2 大流行。在本文中，我们提出了一种创新的人机循环网络物理系统，该系统可以收集人们的被动数据，例如身体活动、睡眠信息和离散位置，以及收集自我报告的数据，并提供个性化的用户反馈。在本文中，我们还介绍了在葡萄牙进行的为期三个半月的现场试验。该试验是葡萄牙国家卫生系统支持的更大范围项目的一部分，旨在评估大流行的指标和影响。提供了有关各种应用程序使用统计的结果，比较了最常用的应用程序、它们的目标以及它们在工作/非工作期间的使用模式。此外，还探讨了一些收集的指标、Covid 事件和媒体新闻之间的时滞互相关性。此类应用程序不仅可以用于新冠疫情，还可以用于未来的流行病，根据个性化信息帮助个人自我调节传染风险，同时也可以作为提高对心理健康相关风险的自我意识的一种手段。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合社会感知与人类在环的系统，通过收集用户行为数据与自报信息，辅助疫情中的个人风险管理和心理风险意识提升。
AI.motivation: 利用智能设备收集社会行为数据，以更好地理解人类行为对公共卫生的影响，特别是在疫情期间实现个性化风险预警与自我调节。
AI.method: 开发Human-in-the-Loop的CPS系统，采集物理活动、睡眠、位置等被动数据及自报数据，结合葡萄牙国家卫生系统的实地试验，分析应用使用统计与疫情事件、媒体新闻的时滞相关性。
AI.result: 试验显示不同应用的使用模式存在工作/非工作时段差异，部分健康指标与疫情事件、新闻存在显著时滞相关性，验证了系统的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可扩展至未来疫情管理，通过个性化数据反馈实现传染风险控制与心理健康风险预警的双重目标。

Smart devices can be used for better understanding human behaviour and its societal implications. As an example of a scenario in which the role of socially aware systems is crucial, consider the SARS-CoV-2 pandemic. In this paper we present an innovative Humanin-The-Loop Cyber Physical system that can collect passive data from people, such as physical activity, sleep information, and discrete location, as well as collect self-reported data, and provide individualised user feedback. In this paper, we also present a three and a half months field trial implemented in Portugal. This trial was part of a larger scope project that was supported by the Portuguese National Health System, to evaluate the indicators and effects of the pandemic. Results concerning various applications usage statistics are presented, comparing the most used applications, their objective and their usage pattern in work/non-work periods. Additionally,the time-lagged cross correlation between some of the collected metrics, Covid events, and media news, are explored. This type of applications can be used not only in the context of Covid but also in future pandemics, to assist individuals in self-regulation of their contagion risk, based on personalized information, while also function as a means for raising self-awareness of risks related to psychological wellbeing. 随着我们周围智能设备数量的增加，利用它们创建社交和情境感知系统的机会也在增加。智能设备可用于更好地理解人类行为及其社会影响。作为社会意识系统的作用至关重要的场景的一个例子，请考虑 SARS-CoV-2 大流行。在本文中，我们提出了一种创新的人机循环网络物理系统，该系统可以收集人们的被动数据，例如身体活动、睡眠信息和离散位置，以及收集自我报告的数据，并提供个性化的用户反馈。在本文中，我们还介绍了在葡萄牙进行的为期三个半月的现场试验。该试验是葡萄牙国家卫生系统支持的更大范围项目的一部分，旨在评估大流行的指标和影响。提供了有关各种应用程序使用统计的结果，比较了最常用的应用程序、它们的目标以及它们在工作/非工作期间的使用模式。此外，还探讨了一些收集的指标、Covid 事件和媒体新闻之间的时滞互相关性。此类应用程序不仅可以用于新冠疫情，还可以用于未来的流行病，根据个性化信息帮助个人自我调节传染风险，同时也可以作为提高对心理健康相关风险的自我意识的一种手段。 本文提出一种结合社会感知与人类在环的系统，通过收集用户行为数据与自报信息，辅助疫情中的个人风险管理和心理风险意识提升。 J. Fernandes,J. Sá Silva,A. Rodrigues,F. Boavida,R. Gaspar,C. Godinho,R. Francisco cs.HC,eess.SY

authors_text: Ainkaran Santhirasekaram,Avinash Kori,Mathias Winkler,Andrea Rockall,Ben Glocker
title: Vector Quantisation for Robust Segmentation
title_zh: 用于稳健分割的矢量量化
abstract: The reliability of segmentation models in the medical domain depends on the model's robustness to perturbations in the input space. Robustness is a particular challenge in medical imaging exhibiting various sources of image noise, corruptions, and domain shifts. Obtaining robustness is often attempted via simulating heterogeneous environments, either heuristically in the form of data augmentation or by learning to generate specific perturbations in an adversarial manner. We propose and justify that learning a discrete representation in a low dimensional embedding space improves robustness of a segmentation model. This is achieved with a dictionary learning method called vector quantisation. We use a set of experiments designed to analyse robustness in both the latent and output space under domain shift and noise perturbations in the input space. We adapt the popular UNet architecture, inserting a quantisation block in the bottleneck. We demonstrate improved segmentation accuracy and better robustness on three segmentation tasks. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/AinkaranSanthi/Vector-Quantisation-for-Robust-Segmentation}
summary: The reliability of segmentation models in the medical domain depends on the model's robustness to perturbations in the input space. Robustness is a particular challenge in medical imaging exhibiting various sources of image noise, corruptions, and domain shifts. Obtaining robustness is often attempted via simulating heterogeneous environments, either heuristically in the form of data augmentation or by learning to generate specific perturbations in an adversarial manner. We propose and justify that learning a discrete representation in a low dimensional embedding space improves robustness of a segmentation model. This is achieved with a dictionary learning method called vector quantisation. We use a set of experiments designed to analyse robustness in both the latent and output space under domain shift and noise perturbations in the input space. We adapt the popular UNet architecture, inserting a quantisation block in the bottleneck. We demonstrate improved segmentation accuracy and better robustness on three segmentation tasks. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/AinkaranSanthi/Vector-Quantisation-for-Robust-Segmentation}
abstract_zh: 医学领域分割模型的可靠性取决于模型对输入空间扰动的鲁棒性。鲁棒性是医学成像中的一个特殊挑战，它表现出各种图像噪声、损坏和域偏移的来源。通常通过模拟异构环境来尝试获得鲁棒性，或者以数据增强的形式启发式，或者通过学习以对抗方式生成特定的扰动。我们提出并证明在低维嵌入空间中学习离散表示可以提高分割模型的鲁棒性。这是通过称为矢量量化的字典学习方法来实现的。我们使用一组实验来分析输入空间中域移位和噪声扰动下潜在空间和输出空间的鲁棒性。我们采用流行的 UNet 架构，在瓶颈中插入量化块。我们在三个分割任务上展示了更高的分割准确性和更好的鲁棒性。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/AinkaranSanthi/Vector-Quantization-for-Robust-Segmentation} 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用向量量化方法提升医学影像分割模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 医学影像分割面临噪声、领域偏移等挑战，传统数据增强或对抗生成方法效果有限，需探索更有效的鲁棒性提升方案。
AI.method: 通过字典学习方法实现向量量化，在UNet瓶颈处插入量化块，学习低维嵌入空间的离散表示以增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在三个分割任务中验证了方法有效性，分割准确率和鲁棒性均优于基线模型，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 向量量化能有效提升分割模型对输入扰动的鲁棒性，为医学影像分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Avinash Kori,Ben Glocker,Francesca Toni
title: GLANCE: Global to Local Architecture-Neutral Concept-based Explanations
title_zh: GLANCE：全球到本地建筑中立的基于概念的解释
abstract: Most of the current explainability techniques focus on capturing the importance of features in input space. However, given the complexity of models and data-generating processes, the resulting explanations are far from being `complete', in that they lack an indication of feature interactions and visualization of their `effect'. In this work, we propose a novel twin-surrogate explainability framework to explain the decisions made by any CNN-based image classifier (irrespective of the architecture). For this, we first disentangle latent features from the classifier, followed by aligning these features to observed/human-defined `context' features. These aligned features form semantically meaningful concepts that are used for extracting a causal graph depicting the `perceived' data-generating process, describing the inter- and intra-feature interactions between unobserved latent features and observed `context' features. This causal graph serves as a global model from which local explanations of different forms can be extracted. Specifically, we provide a generator to visualize the `effect' of interactions among features in latent space and draw feature importance therefrom as local explanations. Our framework utilizes adversarial knowledge distillation to faithfully learn a representation from the classifiers' latent space and use it for extracting visual explanations. We use the styleGAN-v2 architecture with an additional regularization term to enforce disentanglement and alignment. We demonstrate and evaluate explanations obtained with our framework on Morpho-MNIST and on the FFHQ human faces dataset. Our framework is available at \url{https://github.com/koriavinash1/GLANCE-Explanations}.
summary: Most of the current explainability techniques focus on capturing the importance of features in input space. However, given the complexity of models and data-generating processes, the resulting explanations are far from being `complete', in that they lack an indication of feature interactions and visualization of their `effect'. In this work, we propose a novel twin-surrogate explainability framework to explain the decisions made by any CNN-based image classifier (irrespective of the architecture). For this, we first disentangle latent features from the classifier, followed by aligning these features to observed/human-defined `context' features. These aligned features form semantically meaningful concepts that are used for extracting a causal graph depicting the `perceived' data-generating process, describing the inter- and intra-feature interactions between unobserved latent features and observed `context' features. This causal graph serves as a global model from which local explanations of different forms can be extracted. Specifically, we provide a generator to visualize the `effect' of interactions among features in latent space and draw feature importance therefrom as local explanations. Our framework utilizes adversarial knowledge distillation to faithfully learn a representation from the classifiers' latent space and use it for extracting visual explanations. We use the styleGAN-v2 architecture with an additional regularization term to enforce disentanglement and alignment. We demonstrate and evaluate explanations obtained with our framework on Morpho-MNIST and on the FFHQ human faces dataset. Our framework is available at \url{https://github.com/koriavinash1/GLANCE-Explanations}.
abstract_zh: 当前大多数可解释性技术都侧重于捕获输入空间中特征的重要性。然而，考虑到模型和数据生成过程的复杂性，所得的解释远非“完整”，因为它们缺乏特征交互的指示及其“效果”的可视化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的双代理可解释性框架来解释任何基于 CNN 的图像分类器（无论架构如何）做出的决策。为此，我们首先从分类器中分离出潜在特征，然后将这些特征与观察到的/人类定义的“上下文”特征对齐。这些对齐的特征形成语义上有意义的概念，用于提取描述“感知”数据生成过程的因果图，描述未观察到的潜在特征和观察到的“上下文”特征之间的特征间和特征内交互。该因果图充当全局模型，可以从中提取不同形式的局部解释。具体来说，我们提供了一个生成器来可视化潜在空间中特征之间相互作用的“效果”，并从中得出特征重要性作为局部解释。我们的框架利用对抗性知识蒸馏来忠实地从分类器的潜在空间中学习表示，并将其用于提取视觉解释。我们使用带有附加正则化项的 styleGAN-v2 架构来强制解缠结和对齐。我们在 Morpho-MNIST 和 FFHQ 人脸数据集上演示并评估使用我们的框架获得的解释。我们的框架位于 \url{https://github.com/koriavinash1/GLANCE-Explanations}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLANCE框架，通过全局到局部的架构中立概念解释方法，为任意CNN图像分类器生成可解释的决策依据。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性技术无法完整捕捉特征交互作用及效应，导致解释不充分，需更全面的特征关联分析方法。
AI.method: 采用双代理框架，通过解耦潜在特征、对齐上下文特征构建因果图，结合对抗性知识蒸馏和styleGAN-v2生成可视化解释。
AI.result: 在Morpho-MNIST和FFHQ数据集上验证了框架有效性，可生成特征交互的可视化效应及局部解释。
AI.conclusion: GLANCE通过因果图实现全局-局部解释，为模型决策提供更完整的概念化分析，适用于不同架构的CNN模型。

authors_text: Ainkaran Santhirasekaram,Avinash Kori,Andrea Rockall,Mathias Winkler,Francesca Toni,Ben Glocker
title: Hierarchical Symbolic Reasoning in Hyperbolic Space for Deep Discriminative Models
title_zh: 深度判别模型双曲空间中的分层符号推理
abstract: Explanations for \emph{black-box} models help us understand model decisions as well as provide information on model biases and inconsistencies. Most of the current explainability techniques provide a single level of explanation, often in terms of feature importance scores or feature attention maps in input space. Our focus is on explaining deep discriminative models at \emph{multiple levels of abstraction}, from fine-grained to fully abstract explanations. We achieve this by using the natural properties of \emph{hyperbolic geometry} to more efficiently model a hierarchy of symbolic features and generate \emph{hierarchical symbolic rules} as part of our explanations. Specifically, for any given deep discriminative model, we distill the underpinning knowledge by discretisation of the continuous latent space using vector quantisation to form symbols, followed by a \emph{hyperbolic reasoning block} to induce an \emph{abstraction tree}. We traverse the tree to extract explanations in terms of symbolic rules and its corresponding visual semantics. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on the MNIST and AFHQ high-resolution animal faces dataset. Our framework is available at \url{https://github.com/koriavinash1/SymbolicInterpretability}.
summary: Explanations for \emph{black-box} models help us understand model decisions as well as provide information on model biases and inconsistencies. Most of the current explainability techniques provide a single level of explanation, often in terms of feature importance scores or feature attention maps in input space. Our focus is on explaining deep discriminative models at \emph{multiple levels of abstraction}, from fine-grained to fully abstract explanations. We achieve this by using the natural properties of \emph{hyperbolic geometry} to more efficiently model a hierarchy of symbolic features and generate \emph{hierarchical symbolic rules} as part of our explanations. Specifically, for any given deep discriminative model, we distill the underpinning knowledge by discretisation of the continuous latent space using vector quantisation to form symbols, followed by a \emph{hyperbolic reasoning block} to induce an \emph{abstraction tree}. We traverse the tree to extract explanations in terms of symbolic rules and its corresponding visual semantics. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on the MNIST and AFHQ high-resolution animal faces dataset. Our framework is available at \url{https://github.com/koriavinash1/SymbolicInterpretability}.
abstract_zh: 对 \emph{black-box} 模型的解释有助于我们理解模型决策，并提供有关模型偏差和不一致的信息。当前大多数可解释性技术提供单一级别的解释，通常根据输入空间中的特征重要性得分或特征注意图。我们的重点是解释 \emph{多个抽象级别} 的深层判别模型，从细粒度解释到完全抽象解释。我们通过使用 \emph{双曲几何} 的自然属性来更有效地建模符号特征的层次结构并生成 \emph{层次符号规则} 作为我们解释的一部分来实现这一点。具体来说，对于任何给定的深度判别模型，我们通过使用向量量化形成符号的连续潜在空间的离散化来提取基础知识，然后通过 \emph{双曲线推理块} 来归纳 \emph{抽象树}。我们遍历树以提取符号规则及其相应的视觉语义的解释。我们在 MNIST 和 AFHQ 高分辨率动物面部数据集上证明了我们的方法的有效性。我们的框架位于 \url{https://github.com/koriavinash1/SymbolicInterpretability}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在双曲空间中利用分层符号推理解释深度判别模型的方法，通过构建抽象树生成多层级符号规则。
AI.motivation: 现有模型解释技术仅提供单一层次的解释，难以捕捉模型决策的多层级抽象结构，尤其缺乏对符号特征层次的系统性分析。
AI.method: 通过向量量化离散化连续潜在空间生成符号，结合双曲几何特性构建抽象树，利用树结构提取符号规则及对应视觉语义。
AI.result: 在MNIST和AFHQ数据集上验证了方法有效性，实现了从细粒度到全抽象层次的多级解释。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过双曲空间建模和符号推理，为深度模型提供了更符合人类认知的层次化解释方案。

authors_text: Thomas Hickling,Abdelhafid Zenati,Nabil Aouf,Phillippa Spencer
title: Explainability in Deep Reinforcement Learning, a Review into Current Methods and Applications
title_zh: 深度强化学习的可解释性，对当前方法和应用的回顾
comment: 30 pages, 6 figures, Paper Review
comments: 30 pages, 6 figures, Paper Review
abstract: The use of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) schemes has increased dramatically since their first introduction in 2015. Though uses in many different applications are being found, they still have a problem with the lack of interpretability. This has bread a lack of understanding and trust in the use of DRL solutions from researchers and the general public. To solve this problem, the field of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) has emerged. This entails a variety of different methods that look to open the DRL black boxes, ranging from the use of interpretable symbolic Decision Trees (DT) to numerical methods like Shapley Values. This review looks at which methods are being used and for which applications. This is done to identify which models are the best suited to each application or if a method is being underutilised.
summary: The use of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) schemes has increased dramatically since their first introduction in 2015. Though uses in many different applications are being found, they still have a problem with the lack of interpretability. This has bread a lack of understanding and trust in the use of DRL solutions from researchers and the general public. To solve this problem, the field of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) has emerged. This entails a variety of different methods that look to open the DRL black boxes, ranging from the use of interpretable symbolic Decision Trees (DT) to numerical methods like Shapley Values. This review looks at which methods are being used and for which applications. This is done to identify which models are the best suited to each application or if a method is being underutilised.
abstract_zh: 自 2015 年首次推出以来，深度强化学习 (DRL) 方案的使用急剧增加。尽管已在许多不同的应用中找到了用途，但它们仍然存在缺乏可解释性的问题。这导致研究人员和公众对 DRL 解决方案的使用缺乏理解和信任。为了解决这个问题，可解释人工智能（XAI）领域应运而生。这需要各种不同的方法来打开 DRL 黑匣子，从使用可解释的符号决策树 (DT) 到 Shapley 值等数值方法。本次审查着眼于正在使用哪些方法以及用于哪些应用程序。这样做是为了确定哪些模型最适合每个应用程序，或者某种方法是否未得到充分利用。

AI.tldr: 综述当前深度强化学习（DRL）可解释性方法及其应用，评估不同方法的适用性。
AI.motivation: DRL应用广泛但存在可解释性不足问题，导致信任缺失，需通过可解释人工智能（XAI）方法提升透明度。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾分析现有XAI方法（如决策树、Shapley值等），比较其在不同应用场景中的优劣。
AI.result: 识别出不同应用场景下最适合的可解释方法，并发现部分方法存在未充分利用的情况。
AI.conclusion: 需根据具体应用需求选择合适可解释性方法，并进一步推动DRL与XAI的结合研究。

authors_text: Weichen Fan,Jinghuan Chen,Jiabin Ma,Jun Hou,Shuai Yi
title: StyleFlow For Content-Fixed Image to Image Translation
title_zh: StyleFlow 用于内容固定的图像到图像的转换
abstract: Image-to-image (I2I) translation is a challenging topic in computer vision. We divide this problem into three tasks: strongly constrained translation, normally constrained translation, and weakly constrained translation. The constraint here indicates the extent to which the content or semantic information in the original image is preserved. Although previous approaches have achieved good performance in weakly constrained tasks, they failed to fully preserve the content in both strongly and normally constrained tasks, including photo-realism synthesis, style transfer, and colorization, etc. To achieve content-preserving transfer in strongly constrained and normally constrained tasks, we propose StyleFlow, a new I2I translation model that consists of normalizing flows and a novel Style-Aware Normalization (SAN) module. With the invertible network structure, StyleFlow first projects input images into deep feature space in the forward pass, while the backward pass utilizes the SAN module to perform content-fixed feature transformation and then projects back to image space. Our model supports both image-guided translation and multi-modal synthesis. We evaluate our model in several I2I translation benchmarks, and the results show that the proposed model has advantages over previous methods in both strongly constrained and normally constrained tasks.
summary: Image-to-image (I2I) translation is a challenging topic in computer vision. We divide this problem into three tasks: strongly constrained translation, normally constrained translation, and weakly constrained translation. The constraint here indicates the extent to which the content or semantic information in the original image is preserved. Although previous approaches have achieved good performance in weakly constrained tasks, they failed to fully preserve the content in both strongly and normally constrained tasks, including photo-realism synthesis, style transfer, and colorization, etc. To achieve content-preserving transfer in strongly constrained and normally constrained tasks, we propose StyleFlow, a new I2I translation model that consists of normalizing flows and a novel Style-Aware Normalization (SAN) module. With the invertible network structure, StyleFlow first projects input images into deep feature space in the forward pass, while the backward pass utilizes the SAN module to perform content-fixed feature transformation and then projects back to image space. Our model supports both image-guided translation and multi-modal synthesis. We evaluate our model in several I2I translation benchmarks, and the results show that the proposed model has advantages over previous methods in both strongly constrained and normally constrained tasks.
abstract_zh: 图像到图像（I2I）转换是计算机视觉中的一个具有挑战性的主题。我们将此问题分为三个任务：强约束翻译、通常约束翻译和弱约束翻译。这里的约束表示原始图像中的内容或语义信息被保留的程度。尽管以前的方法在弱约束任务中取得了良好的性能，但它们未能在强约束任务和正常约束任务中完全保留内容，包括照片写实合成、风格转移和着色等。为了在强约束和正常约束任务中实现内容保留转移，我们提出了StyleFlow，这是一种新的I2I翻译模型，由归一化流和新颖的风格感知归一化（SAN）模块组成。利用可逆网络结构，StyleFlow首先在前向传递中将输入图像投影到深层特征空间，而后向传递利用SAN模块进行内容固定的特征转换，然后投影回图像空间。我们的模型支持图像引导翻译和多模态合成。我们在几个 I2I 翻译基准中评估我们的模型，结果表明，所提出的模型在强约束和通常约束任务中都比以前的方法具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleFlow模型，解决强约束和正常约束下的图像到图像转换问题，实现内容固定转换。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在弱约束任务表现良好，但无法在强约束和正常约束任务中充分保留原始图像内容，导致生成结果失真。
AI.method: 设计StyleFlow模型，结合归一化流与风格感知归一化(SAN)模块，利用可逆网络结构实现特征空间投影与内容固定转换。
AI.result: 在多个I2I基准测试中，StyleFlow在强约束和正常约束任务中均优于现有方法，显著提升内容保留效果。
AI.conclusion: StyleFlow通过创新网络结构有效解决了内容固定转换难题，为图像翻译任务提供了新思路。

search_text: StyleFlow For Content-Fixed Image to Image Translation StyleFlow 用于内容固定的图像到图像的转换 Image-to-image (I2I) translation is a challenging topic in computer vision. We divide this problem into three tasks: strongly constrained translation, normally constrained translation, and weakly constrained translation. The constraint here indicates the extent to which the content or semantic information in the original image is preserved. Although previous approaches have achieved good performance in weakly constrained tasks, they failed to fully preserve the content in both strongly and normally constrained tasks, including photo-realism synthesis, style transfer, and colorization, etc. To achieve content-preserving transfer in strongly constrained and normally constrained tasks, we propose StyleFlow, a new I2I translation model that consists of normalizing flows and a novel Style-Aware Normalization (SAN) module. With the invertible network structure, StyleFlow first projects input images into deep feature space in the forward pass, while the backward pass utilizes the SAN module to perform content-fixed feature transformation and then projects back to image space. Our model supports both image-guided translation and multi-modal synthesis. We evaluate our model in several I2I translation benchmarks, and the results show that the proposed model has advantages over previous methods in both strongly constrained and normally constrained tasks. 图像到图像（I2I）转换是计算机视觉中的一个具有挑战性的主题。我们将此问题分为三个任务：强约束翻译、通常约束翻译和弱约束翻译。这里的约束表示原始图像中的内容或语义信息被保留的程度。尽管以前的方法在弱约束任务中取得了良好的性能，但它们未能在强约束任务和正常约束任务中完全保留内容，包括照片写实合成、风格转移和着色等。为了在强约束和正常约束任务中实现内容保留转移，我们提出了StyleFlow，这是一种新的I2I翻译模型，由归一化流和新颖的风格感知归一化（SAN）模块组成。利用可逆网络结构，StyleFlow首先在前向传递中将输入图像投影到深层特征空间，而后向传递利用SAN模块进行内容固定的特征转换，然后投影回图像空间。我们的模型支持图像引导翻译和多模态合成。我们在几个 I2I 翻译基准中评估我们的模型，结果表明，所提出的模型在强约束和通常约束任务中都比以前的方法具有优势。 本文提出StyleFlow模型，解决强约束和正常约束下的图像到图像转换问题，实现内容固定转换。 Weichen Fan,Jinghuan Chen,Jiabin Ma,Jun Hou,Shuai Yi cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Yukai Wang,Chunlei Peng,Decheng Liu,Nannan Wang,Xinbo Gao
title: Spatial-Temporal Frequency Forgery Clue for Video Forgery Detection in VIS and NIR Scenario
title_zh: 可见光和近红外场景下视频伪造检测的时空频率伪造线索
abstract: In recent years, with the rapid development of face editing and generation, more and more fake videos are circulating on social media, which has caused extreme public concerns. Existing face forgery detection methods based on frequency domain find that the GAN forged images have obvious grid-like visual artifacts in the frequency spectrum compared to the real images. But for synthesized videos, these methods only confine to single frame and pay little attention to the most discriminative part and temporal frequency clue among different frames. To take full advantage of the rich information in video sequences, this paper performs video forgery detection on both spatial and temporal frequency domains and proposes a Discrete Cosine Transform-based Forgery Clue Augmentation Network (FCAN-DCT) to achieve a more comprehensive spatial-temporal feature representation. FCAN-DCT consists of a backbone network and two branches: Compact Feature Extraction (CFE) module and Frequency Temporal Attention (FTA) module. We conduct thorough experimental assessments on two visible light (VIS) based datasets WildDeepfake and Celeb-DF (v2), and our self-built video forgery dataset DeepfakeNIR, which is the first video forgery dataset on near-infrared modality. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on detecting forgery videos in both VIS and NIR scenarios.
summary: In recent years, with the rapid development of face editing and generation, more and more fake videos are circulating on social media, which has caused extreme public concerns. Existing face forgery detection methods based on frequency domain find that the GAN forged images have obvious grid-like visual artifacts in the frequency spectrum compared to the real images. But for synthesized videos, these methods only confine to single frame and pay little attention to the most discriminative part and temporal frequency clue among different frames. To take full advantage of the rich information in video sequences, this paper performs video forgery detection on both spatial and temporal frequency domains and proposes a Discrete Cosine Transform-based Forgery Clue Augmentation Network (FCAN-DCT) to achieve a more comprehensive spatial-temporal feature representation. FCAN-DCT consists of a backbone network and two branches: Compact Feature Extraction (CFE) module and Frequency Temporal Attention (FTA) module. We conduct thorough experimental assessments on two visible light (VIS) based datasets WildDeepfake and Celeb-DF (v2), and our self-built video forgery dataset DeepfakeNIR, which is the first video forgery dataset on near-infrared modality. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on detecting forgery videos in both VIS and NIR scenarios.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着人脸编辑和生成的快速发展，越来越多的假视频在社交媒体上流传，引起了公众的极度关注。现有基于频域的人脸伪造检测方法发现，与真实图像相比，GAN 伪造图像在频谱上具有明显的网格状视觉伪影。但对于合成视频，这些方法仅局限于单帧，很少关注不同帧之间最具辨别力的部分和时间频率线索。为了充分利用视频序列中丰富的信息，本文在时空频域上进行视频伪造检测，并提出一种基于离散余弦变换的伪造线索增强网络（FCAN-DCT），以实现更全面的时空特征表示。 FCAN-DCT由一个主干网络和两个分支组成：紧凑特征提取（CFE）模块和频率时间注意力（FTA）模块。我们对两个基于可见光 (VIS) 的数据集 WildDeepfake 和 Celeb-DF (v2) 以及我们自建的视频伪造数据集 DeepfakeNIR（这是第一个近红外模态的视频伪造数据集）进行了彻底的实验评估。实验结果证明了我们的方法在 VIS 和 NIR 场景中检测伪造视频的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空频率伪造线索的视频伪造检测方法，适用于可见光（VIS）和近红外（NIR）场景。
AI.motivation: 现有基于频率域的伪造检测方法仅关注单帧图像，忽视了视频中帧间最具有判别性的时序频率线索，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计离散余弦变换（DCT）为基础的伪造线索增强网络（FCAN-DCT），包含紧凑特征提取模块（CFE）和频率时序注意力模块（FTA），同时利用时空频率特征进行检测。
AI.result: 在WildDeepfake、Celeb-DF（v2）和自建的近红外伪造数据集DeepfakeNIR上验证，方法在VIS和NIR场景下均表现出优越的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合时空频率特征可有效提升视频伪造检测能力，且提出的近红外数据集为该领域研究提供了新资源。

authors_text: Matti Henning,Jan Strohbeck,Michael Buchholz,Klaus Dietmayer
title: Identification of Threat Regions From a Dynamic Occupancy Grid Map for Situation-Aware Environment Perception
title_zh: 从动态占用网格图中识别威胁区域以实现态势感知环境感知
comment: Accepted for publication at the 25th IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems 2022. V2: added IEEE copyright notice V3: Added DOI
comments: Accepted for publication at the 25th IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems 2022. V2: added IEEE copyright notice V3: Added DOI
abstract: The advance towards higher levels of automation within the field of automated driving is accompanied by increasing requirements for the operational safety of vehicles. Induced by the limitation of computational resources, trade-offs between the computational complexity of algorithms and their potential to ensure safe operation of automated vehicles are often encountered. Situation-aware environment perception presents one promising example, where computational resources are distributed to regions within the perception area that are relevant for the task of the automated vehicle. While prior map knowledge is often leveraged to identify relevant regions, in this work, we present a lightweight identification of safety-relevant regions that relies solely on online information. We show that our approach enables safe vehicle operation in critical scenarios, while retaining the benefits of non-uniformly distributed resources within the environment perception.
summary: The advance towards higher levels of automation within the field of automated driving is accompanied by increasing requirements for the operational safety of vehicles. Induced by the limitation of computational resources, trade-offs between the computational complexity of algorithms and their potential to ensure safe operation of automated vehicles are often encountered. Situation-aware environment perception presents one promising example, where computational resources are distributed to regions within the perception area that are relevant for the task of the automated vehicle. While prior map knowledge is often leveraged to identify relevant regions, in this work, we present a lightweight identification of safety-relevant regions that relies solely on online information. We show that our approach enables safe vehicle operation in critical scenarios, while retaining the benefits of non-uniformly distributed resources within the environment perception.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶领域向更高水平的自动化发展，伴随着对车辆操作安全性的更高要求。由于计算资源的限制，经常会遇到算法的计算复杂性与其确保自动驾驶车辆安全运行的潜力之间的权衡。情境感知环境感知提供了一个有前景的示例，其中计算资源被分配到感知区域内与自动车辆任务相关的区域。虽然通常利用先前的地图知识来识别相关区域，但在这项工作中，我们提出了仅依赖于在线信息的安全相关区域的轻量级识别。我们表明，我们的方法可以在关键场景中实现车辆的安全运行，同时保留环境感知中非均匀分布资源的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态占用网格地图的威胁区域识别方法，用于提升自动驾驶车辆的环境感知安全性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶自动化水平提升需要更高的操作安全性，但计算资源有限导致算法复杂度与安全性的权衡问题。传统方法依赖先验地图知识，而本文旨在通过在线信息实现轻量化安全区域识别。
AI.method: 提出仅依赖在线实时数据的轻量级算法，从动态占用网格地图中识别与车辆任务相关的安全关键区域。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能在关键场景下保障车辆安全运行，同时实现环境感知资源的非均匀高效分配。
AI.conclusion: 无需先验地图知识的在线威胁区域识别方法，为自动驾驶提供了兼顾安全性与计算效率的环境感知解决方案。

authors_text: Ziyuan Zhao,Andong Zhu,Zeng Zeng,Bharadwaj Veeravalli,Cuntai Guan
title: ACT-Net: Asymmetric Co-Teacher Network for Semi-supervised Memory-efficient Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: ACT-Net：用于半监督内存高效医学图像分割的非对称联合教师网络
comment: ef:2022 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
comments: ef:2022 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
abstract: While deep models have shown promising performance in medical image segmentation, they heavily rely on a large amount of well-annotated data, which is difficult to access, especially in clinical practice. On the other hand, high-accuracy deep models usually come in large model sizes, limiting their employment in real scenarios. In this work, we propose a novel asymmetric co-teacher framework, ACT-Net, to alleviate the burden on both expensive annotations and computational costs for semi-supervised knowledge distillation. We advance teacher-student learning with a co-teacher network to facilitate asymmetric knowledge distillation from large models to small ones by alternating student and teacher roles, obtaining tiny but accurate models for clinical employment. To verify the effectiveness of our ACT-Net, we employ the ACDC dataset for cardiac substructure segmentation in our experiments. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that ACT-Net outperforms other knowledge distillation methods and achieves lossless segmentation performance with 250x fewer parameters.
summary: While deep models have shown promising performance in medical image segmentation, they heavily rely on a large amount of well-annotated data, which is difficult to access, especially in clinical practice. On the other hand, high-accuracy deep models usually come in large model sizes, limiting their employment in real scenarios. In this work, we propose a novel asymmetric co-teacher framework, ACT-Net, to alleviate the burden on both expensive annotations and computational costs for semi-supervised knowledge distillation. We advance teacher-student learning with a co-teacher network to facilitate asymmetric knowledge distillation from large models to small ones by alternating student and teacher roles, obtaining tiny but accurate models for clinical employment. To verify the effectiveness of our ACT-Net, we employ the ACDC dataset for cardiac substructure segmentation in our experiments. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that ACT-Net outperforms other knowledge distillation methods and achieves lossless segmentation performance with 250x fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 虽然深度模型在医学图像分割方面表现出了良好的性能，但它们严重依赖于大量注释良好的数据，而这些数据很难访问，尤其是在临床实践中。另一方面，高精度深度模型通常具有较大的模型尺寸，限制了它们在实际场景中的使用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的非对称联合教师框架 ACT-Net，以减轻半监督知识蒸馏的昂贵注释和计算成本的负担。我们通过合作教师网络推进师生学习，通过交替学生和教师的角色，促进从大模型到小模型的不对称知识蒸馏，获得用于临床就业的微小但准确的模型。为了验证 ACT-Net 的有效性，我们在实验中使用 ACDC 数据集进行心脏亚结构分割。大量的实验结果表明，ACT-Net 优于其他知识蒸馏方法，并以减少 250 倍的参数实现无损分割性能。

AI.result: 实验结果表明，ACT-Net在ACDC数据集上优于其他知识蒸馏方法，实现了参数减少250倍且无损分割性能。
AI.conclusion: ACT-Net有效缓解了标注数据和计算成本的负担，为临床应用提供了高效准确的医学图像分割模型。
