search_text: ACT-Net: Asymmetric Co-Teacher Network for Semi-supervised Memory-efficient Medical Image Segmentation ACT-Net：用于半监督内存高效医学图像分割的非对称联合教师网络 While deep models have shown promising performance in medical image segmentation, they heavily rely on a large amount of well-annotated data, which is difficult to access, especially in clinical practice. On the other hand, high-accuracy deep models usually come in large model sizes, limiting their employment in real scenarios. In this work, we propose a novel asymmetric co-teacher framework, ACT-Net, to alleviate the burden on both expensive annotations and computational costs for semi-supervised knowledge distillation. We advance teacher-student learning with a co-teacher network to facilitate asymmetric knowledge distillation from large models to small ones by alternating student and teacher roles, obtaining tiny but accurate models for clinical employment. To verify the effectiveness of our ACT-Net, we employ the ACDC dataset for cardiac substructure segmentation in our experiments. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that ACT-Net outperforms other knowledge distillation methods and achieves lossless segmentation performance with 250x fewer parameters. 虽然深度模型在医学图像分割方面表现出了良好的性能，但它们严重依赖于大量注释良好的数据，而这些数据很难访问，尤其是在临床实践中。另一方面，高精度深度模型通常具有较大的模型尺寸，限制了它们在实际场景中的使用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的非对称联合教师框架 ACT-Net，以减轻半监督知识蒸馏的昂贵注释和计算成本的负担。我们通过合作教师网络推进师生学习，通过交替学生和教师的角色，促进从大模型到小模型的不对称知识蒸馏，获得用于临床就业的微小但准确的模型。为了验证 ACT-Net 的有效性，我们在实验中使用 ACDC 数据集进行心脏亚结构分割。大量的实验结果表明，ACT-Net 优于其他知识蒸馏方法，并以减少 250 倍的参数实现无损分割性能。 本文提出了一种名为ACT-Net的非对称共教师网络，用于半监督记忆高效的医学图像分割。 Ziyuan Zhao,Andong Zhu,Zeng Zeng,Bharadwaj Veeravalli,Cuntai Guan eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: André Artelt,Barbara Hammer
title: "Even if ..." -- Diverse Semifactual Explanations of Reject
title_zh: “即使……”——拒绝的多种半事实解释
abstract: Machine learning based decision making systems applied in safety critical areas require reliable high certainty predictions. For this purpose, the system can be extended by an reject option which allows the system to reject inputs where only a prediction with an unacceptably low certainty would be possible. While being able to reject uncertain samples is important, it is also of importance to be able to explain why a particular sample was rejected. With the ongoing rise of eXplainable AI (XAI), a lot of explanation methodologies for machine learning based systems have been developed -- explaining reject options, however, is still a novel field where only very little prior work exists. In this work, we propose to explain rejects by semifactual explanations, an instance of example-based explanation methods, which them self have not been widely considered in the XAI community yet. We propose a conceptual modeling of semifactual explanations for arbitrary reject options and empirically evaluate a specific implementation on a conformal prediction based reject option.
summary: Machine learning based decision making systems applied in safety critical areas require reliable high certainty predictions. For this purpose, the system can be extended by an reject option which allows the system to reject inputs where only a prediction with an unacceptably low certainty would be possible. While being able to reject uncertain samples is important, it is also of importance to be able to explain why a particular sample was rejected. With the ongoing rise of eXplainable AI (XAI), a lot of explanation methodologies for machine learning based systems have been developed -- explaining reject options, however, is still a novel field where only very little prior work exists. In this work, we propose to explain rejects by semifactual explanations, an instance of example-based explanation methods, which them self have not been widely considered in the XAI community yet. We propose a conceptual modeling of semifactual explanations for arbitrary reject options and empirically evaluate a specific implementation on a conformal prediction based reject option.
abstract_zh: 应用在安全关键领域的基于机器学习的决策系统需要可靠的高确定性预测。为此，可以通过拒绝选项来扩展系统，该拒绝选项允许系统拒绝仅可能进行具有不可接受的低确定性的预测的输入。虽然能够拒绝不确定的样本很重要，但能够解释为什么特定样本被拒绝也很重要。随着 eXplainable AI (XAI) 的不断兴起，许多基于机器学习的系统的解释方法已经被开发出来——然而，解释拒绝选项仍然是一个新颖的领域，之前的工作很少。在这项工作中，我们建议通过半事实解释来解释拒绝，这是基于示例的解释方法的一个实例，但它们本身尚未在 XAI 社区中得到广泛考虑。我们提出了对任意拒绝选项的半事实解释的概念模型，并根据经验评估基于拒绝选项的共形预测的具体实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用半事实解释方法为机器学习系统的拒绝选项提供可解释性，以应对安全关键领域中高置信度预测的需求。
AI.motivation: 在安全关键领域，机器学习系统需要通过拒绝选项规避低置信度预测，但现有可解释AI方法对拒绝决策的解释能力不足，亟需新方法填补研究空白。
AI.method: 提出半事实解释的概念模型，将其作为基于实例的解释方法应用于任意拒绝选项，并在符合预测的拒绝机制上实现具体方案进行评估。
AI.result: 验证了半事实解释方法在符合预测的拒绝选项场景中的有效性，展示了其生成多样化解释的能力。
AI.conclusion: 半事实解释为拒绝决策提供了新颖的可解释性框架，为XAI领域开辟了新方向，并证明了其在实际应用中的可行性。

authors_text: Matti Henning,Michael Buchholz,Klaus Dietmayer
title: Situation-Aware Environment Perception for Decentralized Automation Architectures
title_zh: 分散式自动化架构的态势感知环境感知
comment: V2: added DOI to copyright notice
comments: V2: added DOI to copyright notice
abstract: Advances in the field of environment perception for automated agents have resulted in an ongoing increase in generated sensor data. The available computational resources to process these data are bound to become insufficient for real-time applications. Reducing the amount of data to be processed by identifying the most relevant data based on the agents' situation, often referred to as situation-awareness, has gained increasing research interest, and the importance of complementary approaches is expected to increase further in the near future. In this work, we extend the applicability range of our recently introduced concept for situation-aware environment perception to the decentralized automation architecture of the UNICARagil project. Considering the specific driving capabilities of the vehicle and using real-world data on target hardware in a post-processing manner, we provide an estimate for the daily reduction in power consumption that accumulates to 36.2%. While achieving these promising results, we additionally show the need to consider scalability in data processing in the design of software modules as well as in the design of functional systems if the benefits of situation-awareness shall be leveraged optimally.
summary: Advances in the field of environment perception for automated agents have resulted in an ongoing increase in generated sensor data. The available computational resources to process these data are bound to become insufficient for real-time applications. Reducing the amount of data to be processed by identifying the most relevant data based on the agents' situation, often referred to as situation-awareness, has gained increasing research interest, and the importance of complementary approaches is expected to increase further in the near future. In this work, we extend the applicability range of our recently introduced concept for situation-aware environment perception to the decentralized automation architecture of the UNICARagil project. Considering the specific driving capabilities of the vehicle and using real-world data on target hardware in a post-processing manner, we provide an estimate for the daily reduction in power consumption that accumulates to 36.2%. While achieving these promising results, we additionally show the need to consider scalability in data processing in the design of software modules as well as in the design of functional systems if the benefits of situation-awareness shall be leveraged optimally.
abstract_zh: 自动化代理环境感知领域的进步导致生成的传感器数据不断增加。用于处理这些数据的可用计算资源必然会不足以满足实时应用程序的需要。通过根据代理的情况识别最相关的数据（通常称为态势感知）来减少要处理的数据量，已经引起了越来越多的研究兴趣，并且补充方法的重要性预计在不久的将来会进一步增加。在这项工作中，我们将最近引入的态势感知环境感知概念的适用范围扩展到 UNICARagil 项目的去中心化自动化架构。考虑到车辆的具体驾驶能力，并通过后处理的方式使用目标硬件上的真实数据，我们估算出每天累计可减少 36.2% 的功耗。在实现这些有希望的结果的同时，我们还表明，如果要最佳地利用态势感知的好处，就需要在软件模块的设计以及功能系统的设计中考虑数据处理的可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文将情境感知环境感知方法扩展至去中心化自动化架构，以优化计算资源利用。
AI.motivation: 传感器数据激增导致计算资源不足，需通过情境感知筛选关键数据以提升实时处理效率。
AI.method: 基于车辆特性和真实硬件数据后处理，评估情境感知对功耗的降低效果并分析系统可扩展性需求。
AI.result: 实现每日36.2%的功耗降低，同时揭示软件模块与系统设计中需重视数据处理可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 情境感知能显著优化资源消耗，但需在架构设计中同步解决数据处理的可扩展性挑战。

In this work, we extend the applicability range of our recently introduced concept for situation-aware environment perception to the decentralized automation architecture of the UNICARagil project. Considering the specific driving capabilities of the vehicle and using real-world data on target hardware in a post-processing manner, we provide an estimate for the daily reduction in power consumption that accumulates to 36.2%. While achieving these promising results, we additionally show the need to consider scalability in data processing in the design of software modules as well as in the design of functional systems if the benefits of situation-awareness shall be leveraged optimally. 自动化代理环境感知领域的进步导致生成的传感器数据不断增加。用于处理这些数据的可用计算资源必然会不足以满足实时应用程序的需要。通过根据代理的情况识别最相关的数据（通常称为态势感知）来减少要处理的数据量，已经引起了越来越多的研究兴趣，并且补充方法的重要性预计在不久的将来会进一步增加。在这项工作中，我们将最近引入的态势感知环境感知概念的适用范围扩展到 UNICARagil 项目的去中心化自动化架构。考虑到车辆的具体驾驶能力，并通过后处理的方式使用目标硬件上的真实数据，我们估算出每天累计可减少 36.2% 的功耗。在实现这些有希望的结果的同时，我们还表明，如果要最佳地利用态势感知的好处，就需要在软件模块的设计以及功能系统的设计中考虑数据处理的可扩展性。 本文将情境感知环境感知方法扩展至去中心化自动化架构，以优化计算资源利用。 Matti Henning,Michael Buchholz,Klaus Dietmayer cs.RO
